seriesMetadata.description:
Min Kyung‑hee falls in love with a spirit called “Zero,” an entity that has followed her around ever since her first year of high school. As soon as she becomes an adult, she holds a “spirit wedding” with Zero and makes a plan: she will use a man in the real world as an empty shell, just a vessel, in order to give Zero a physical body. Things go smoothly at first as she puts in the effort to win over this “shell” man and her plan advances without a hitch. But one day, Kyung‑hee realizes what her own heart truly feels—and she comes to regret all of her choices. She has always chosen to run away rather than take responsibility. Will she avoid it all again this time too, or will she face the consequences of her love and her decisions?

Joe Yabuki has learned how to toughen up and stop trusting others after a troubling youth spent bouncing between orphanages and fending off bullies. After finally escaping the cycle of violent temporary homes, Joe adopts a delinquent lifestyle in the streets of San'ya, a slum in Tokyo. He makes his way through the world with his fists, picking fights with anyone he pleases.

Danpei Tange, a washed-up and alcoholic former boxing coach, notices Joe's animalistic combat ability and attempts to mentor the wild teenager. Despite developing an explosive relationship, the two form a close bond and rely on each other to look after the other homeless children in San'ya.

Unable to abandon his destructive habits, Joe is arrested for petty crimes. In jail, he meets and fights with lifelong friends and rivals, including the boxing prodigy Tooru Rikiishi. Continuously challenging Rikiishi to fights, Joe is knocked out time after time due to his savage brawling style failing in the face of Rikiishi's controlled boxing technique. But eventually, Joe stuns his rival with a knockout blow, earning Rikiishi's respect and the promise that they will one day meet again inside the professional ring.

Finding a reason to live within boxing, Joe takes life head-on with a new purpose. As he rises through Japan's amateur and professional boxing scenes, he contends with painful loss and increasing injury. Joe's passion for fighting is all-consuming, and he grapples with the idea that a life without boxing may not be one worth living.

**Original Manga:** [Comic DAYS](https://comic-days.com/episode/10044607041220263091), [Kodansha Comics](https://www.kodansha.co.jp/comic/products/0000002420), [Pocket Shonen Magazine](https://pocket.shonenmagazine.com/title/00801/episode/266927) | [Mechacomic](https://mechacomic.jp/books/56994)

Mitsuhiko Okaya, a down-on-his-luck man, is betrayed by both his wife and his junior at work.
Mocked as a useless "window-sill editor" at his company and sinking into despair, he suddenly encounters two high school girls he should have never met—yet somehow feels a strange sense of familiarity.
There’s Akari, the lively, cheerful younger twin who loves to playfully tease him, and Nanako, the shy, awkward older sister who hides a surprisingly naughty side.
It turns out… they were once his students from the cram school where he worked during his college days.

label: I'm the Only One Who Doesn't Know That Villainess Is a Man

seriesMetadata.description:
Fortunately, it’s still in my childhood days, not too severe yet. To prevent worsening of condition, I must stick close to treatment, the villainess Rachel. 

“Never come near me again” 

”I hate noisy and chaotic things” 

”We don’t need that , so just leave” 

…Well, it’s not easy to stick by sharp tongued villainess. Still I destroy the original work diligently to survive. But it seems we couldn’t completely avoid the original work, and we have to part ways. 

Ten years later. 

The caring villainess sends a handsome bodyguard, worried about my safety. 

”You’ll make my face explode. Have you fallen for me” 

But this man somehow remind me of Rachel. But his personality seems different... 

Maybe it’s just my imagination? 

Or so I thought. 

”So are you going to have contract marriage, you’re holding the hand like this once you’re married.” 

As I stutter in surprise, he closes the distance between us. I can feel his breath. 

”You should also kiss.” 

His face up close is clearly that of a man’s. Could you do this with someone else. Wait a minute. Wasn’t he supposed to be the villian?!

seriesMetadata.description: Nai, a young girl who, after being reincarnated, found herself an orphan and had to survive in dire circumstances. One day, she is chosen to become a saint, and her second life is turned completely upside down. Thanks to the intervention of the duke who supports her, Nai takes the entrance exam for the Royal Academy, attended by many children of the nobility and passes with flying colors. But for some unknown reason, she is admitted not to the general section, but to the honors section! This class consists solely of children of the high nobility: a prince, a duke’s daughter, the son of the head of the royal guard…! “Am I in a romance game?” Nai wonders, perplexed. But another girl from the common people, also admitted to the elite class, begins to “conquer” the princes…! A forbidden love story with a nobleman who is already engaged will gradually turn the class into a veritable battlefield, which is a real headache for Nai, who simply wants to live in peace with her dear childhood friends… So there are two “reincarnated” girls in this world straight out of an otome game!? The long-awaited manga about school life in a parallel world, straight out of an otome game, but full of pitfalls!

Shiomi harbors a secret while attending his all-boys school, which is creating self-portraits in drag within the privacy of his art studio. But his most protected moments are witnessed by the absolute worst person possible, Aihara. With his secret now exposed, Shiomi's life is about to be turned completely upside down.

Master swordsman Hyeon Dokgo was crushed after being branded as the public enemy of the entire martial world. Broken in body and spirit, Hyeon believes his days and his troubles are finally over… until trouble finds him in the form of Somi, an adorable and unusually gifted little girl who refuses to leave his side. Through Somi, the battle-obsessed warrior who once dreamed of becoming the most feared name in Murim begins to discover the warmth of a heart he never knew existed.

label: I Became a Mage in a Medieval Fantasy World

seriesMetadata.description:
"Ian Raven, you are… nothing.” 

In a medieval fantasy world, a boy named Ian is reincarnated as the son of an ordinary farmer. Just as the status window declared, Ian lived a life as “no one.” Then one day, the mage Elendis appears before him. And for the simple reason that he “has black hair mentioned in a prophecy,” she takes Ian in as her disciple. After six years of harsh training, Ian finally sets out on an adventure as a mage. 

But this medieval fantasy world is far more complicated than it seems! He shudders at its outrageous standards of hygiene and grows angry at the unfathomable selfishness of people. From a boy who was nothing, to a mage who will change the world— This is the chaotic adventure story of Ian, a mage in a medieval fantasy world!

seriesMetadata.description:
From Yen On:  
In Orario, fearless adventurers band together in search of fame and fortune within the monstrous underground labyrinth known as the Dungeon. But while riches and renown are incentive enough for most, Bell Cranel, would-be hero extraordinaire, has bigger plans. He wants to pick up girls. Is it wrong to face the perils of the Dungeon alone, in a single-member guild blessed by a failed goddess? Maybe. Is it wrong to dream of playing hero to hapless maidens in the Dungeon? Maybe not. After one misguided adventure, Bell quickly discovers that anything can happen in the labyrinth. Even chance encounters with beautiful women. The only problem? He's the one who winds up the damsel in distress! 

[Official English](https://tapas.io/series/is-it-wrong-to-try-to-pick-up-girls-in-a-dungeon-novel/info)

seriesMetadata.description:
From Yen On:  
For twelve years, the virtual world of Yggdrasil has served as the playground and battlefield for the skeletal lord Momonga and his guild of fellow monsters, Ainz Ooal Gown. But the guild’s glory days are over, and the game is shutting down permanently. When Momonga logs in one last time just to be there when the servers go dark, something happens-and suddenly, fantasy is reality. A rogues’ gallery of fanatically devoted NPCs is ready to obey his every order, but the world Momonga now inhabits is not the one he remembers. The game may be over, but the epic tale of Ainz Ooal Gown is only beginning.

[Official English](https://tapas.io/series/overlord-novel/info)

seriesMetadata.description:
From Seven Seas:  
Kicked out by his family and wandering the streets, an unemployed 34-year-old shut-in thinks he’s hit rock-bottom. He just as he’s hit and killed by a speeding truck! Awakening to find himself reborn as an infant in a world of swords and sorcery, but with the memories of his first life intact, Rudeus Greyrat is determined not to repeat his past mistakes. He’s going to make the most of this reincarnation as he sets off on the adventure of a second lifetime.

seriesMetadata.description:
Bell Cranel is just trying to find his way in the world. Of course, in his case, the “world” is an enormous dungeon filled with monsters, below a city run by gods and goddesses who have way too much time on their hands. He’s got big dreams but not much more when a roll on the random encounter table brings him face-to-face with the girl of his dreams—but what does a beginning adventurer have to offer a brilliant swordswoman? And what if the lonely goddess who sponsors his solo adventuring gets jealous…?!

*Source: Yen Press, Vol. 1*

From [Sapphire Sky](https://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=40349905948):

Nishina Yukito, who is the only boy in a family of girls, moved out of his house in hopes of a peaceful life. One day, he sees something strange on the roof of the school. It's a spaceship and a mysterious girl with a crown emerges. She introduces herself as the imperial Princess Lacey of Planet Kura-ura, who claims that she is searching for the "White Rabbit", who is supposed to help her fulfill the wishes of ten humans... and Yukito is the rabbit?!

Raised to kill like a pack of loyal hounds, the Baskerville children took countless lives as a band of fearsome assassins. Despite being the shunned illegitimate son of the brood, Vikir served his family faithfully, only to meet his untimely demise at his father’s hands. But when he is inexplicably reborn with a second chance at life, Vikir, armed with the memories and knowledge of his past, swears to rise above the pack and take his revenge. This time, he’s ready to bite the hand that feeds.

*Source: Tapas*

----

The children of the Baskerville family are trained as loyal hounds from a young age, knowing nothing apart from a life of death and deception. After faithfully serving his family for forty years, Vikir Von Baskerville was rewarded with betrayal and execution by the hands of the man he called his father. But when he’s given a second chance at life by being reborn with his memories of his past life intact, Vikir swears to have his revenge against the family he once served. Once again, he must survive the brutal life that awaits all the hounds of Baskerville, but this time he vows to bite the hand that feeds him.

*Source: Yen Press, Vol. 1*

----

seriesMetadata.description:
The protagonist, Yang Jun, is transmigrated into a lowly mushroom man leader in an underground dungeon, a weak being bullied by all.

These dungeons are frequented by “players,” not humans but other species such as snails, earthworms, bacteria, idealistic birdfolk, victory-obsessed drake lizards, and brutal demonkind.

To survive and one day see the surface again, Yang Jun cultivates mushroom soldiers and leads his people in a rising conquest.

[Original Webtoon](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc40698)

Seo Do-Young, who worked as a scout for the professional baseball Unicorns, becomes unemployed after the team is disbanded due to poor performance. An unidentified app called [High School Baseball Tycoon] appears before her. Seo Do-Young attempts to use the app to turn Cheongil High School, which was ranked last, into the strongest team in the nation.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=849538), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13991372)

An evil necromancer slays the king and carries off his daughter, secreting her in the legendary Dragon Tower.

To save the princess, her steadfast Royal Guard assays the stronghold, but the way is blocked by powerful eldritch creatures… So, to supplement their forces in the face of mounting casualties, they press ordinary folks from the surrounding villages into service—including Yuva, a sturdy young farmboy with a strong back but no experience in battle, and only a battered old helm and wooden shield to protect him.

*Source: Kodansha USA, Vol. 1*

During a flashback, an interviewer inquires Kuzumi Taiga, a prospective student for Seinagi Private High School, on what he would do if he could use magic, during his entrance interview. He replies, "take over the world", with an outburst of laughter, from an attractive girl, following his answer.  
After the entrance exam, the school rejects his application; although he recalls almost nothing after this event, he does recall the girl, and believes the cause of his school of choice rejecting his application involves her.  
Wandering around outside of the school the next day, Kuzumi tries to enter, but an invisible barrier blocks him. A teacher, Mr. Hiiragi, confuses Kuzumi for a student of the school ditching class and pulls Kuzumi into the school through the barrier.  
Seinagi Private High School is actually a magic school and Mr. Hiiragi has just accidentally pulled Kuzumi, a teenager with no magical skill, through the barrier into this school.

seriesMetadata.description:
Yang Chen, a worthless outcast cast out by his own family, unexpectedly awakens an SSS-Class profession: Dark Summoner, with a hidden passive — Summoning costs reduced by 100x!

With ease, he calls forth powerful dark creatures. Right from the start, he summons the Goddess of Death, who annihilates his enemies with just a glance.

Rising from the very bottom, he turns his fate around — clashing head-on with his clan, the holy temple, brutal bosses, and even heavenly angels from the upper realm.

No one who dares cross him survives.

He smashes through every reckless enemy standing in his way!

[Original Webtoon](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/657388)

From Viz:  
After winning the national championship, 15-year-old figure skater Rou Shirakawa was on his way to the Olympics. But with his mother’s tragic death on his mind, he threw it all away in an outburst of rage. Banned from figure skating, he and his sister move to Hokkaido. When he meets some local kids at the skating pond, they convince him to be a stand-in player for their soon-to-be-disbanded hockey team. The team has never won a game, and they’re up against the local champs but if they’ve got to go down, they want to score at least one goal before it’s all over. Rou hasn’t got a clue how to play ice hockey, but he sure knows how to skate!

[Mechacomic](https://mechacomic.jp/books/184400), [Piccoma](https://piccoma.com/web/product/156388?etype=episode), [Shonen Jump+](https://shonenjumpplus.com/episode/17106567265037259878), [Tonarino Young Jump](https://tonarinoyj.jp/episode/4856001361539329011), [Yangjiang+](https://ynjn.jp/title/10666), [Young Jump Comics](https://www.shueisha.co.jp/books/items/contents.html?isbn=978-4-08-893086-2), [Zebrack](https://zebrack-comic.shueisha.co.jp/title/68662)

Calling upon his former governess, William Jones, gentleman, is startled when his knock is answered by an uncommonly beautiful servant, the soft-spoken Emma. Throughout his visit, William’s eyes drift to the maid whenever she enters the room, and he contrives to meet Emma socially as she goes about her errands. But London society is a web of strict codes and divisions. For the son of a wealthy merchant, seeking out a working-class girl is simply not done! William’s father plans for his son to marry into the peerage and elevate the Jones family to greater heights, but although William says and does what is expected of him, he longs only for Emma’s company…

*Source: Yen Press, Vol. 1*

Volumes 8-10 are called "Emma: Further Tales".

Note: Won the Excellence Prize at the Japan Media Arts Festival in 2005.

[Official Japanese](https://www.kadokawa.co.jp/series/11626/?i=301407000933)

recommendations.title: Boku no Hatsukoi o Kimi ni Sasagu

seriesMetadata.description:
Straight As, athlete and overall "Ms. Popularity," Yukino, is the perfect student. Or at least that" 's how she appears to the outside world. But when the curtains are drawn, a lazy young egomaniac lurks who will do anything and everything to be the top student in her school. Yukino finds her resolve put to the test as after years as the Idol of her class a threat emerges in the MORE perfect Soiichiro. A good-natured, studious and athletic boy he is her equal in every way but one. That behind the act is a genuine heart driven to succeed. Yukino is desperate to regain her status any way she can, but through embarrassing flub-ups at every turn, Soiichiro remains untouched even as they find respect for one another, and maybe, after all the dust has cleared, something more. 

(From TokyoPop)

Also included are the following short stories:  
• *The Tiger and the Chameleon - A Promise for One Week* (Vol 1)  
• *Ashita Mata Mori de Aoune* (Meet Me Again Tomorrow in the Forest; Vol 4): Always an outcast because of her black hair the heroine of the story finds a strange man in the forest - a man from Earth - and he has black hair, too.  
• *Abareru Ousama*: Komako Sakuraya's childhood friend, Kazune, changed so much in 10 years. He sees Komako as a teasing target. High School is different, so will they be lovers or rivals?

From Square Enix:  
Traumatized by a childhood incident with a friend who took exception to his love of traditional dolls, doll-artisan hopeful Wakana Gojou passes his days as a loner, finding solace in the home ec room at his high school. To Wakana, people like beautiful Marin Kitagawa, a trendy girl who's always surrounded by a throng of friends, is practically an alien from another world. But when cheerful Marin, never one to be shy, spots Wakana sewing away one day after school, she barges in with the aim of roping her quiet classmate into her secret hobby: Cosplay! Will Wakana's wounded heart be able to handle the invasion from this sexy alien?

Roxanna spent years grieving her first love who supposedly died at the hands of her father, a greedy and cruel nobleman. However, when her household is annihilated, she discovers that the man who led the downfall of her family is her first love, Curtis. No longer the gentle boy Roxanna once cherished, he has transformed into a cold, formidable warrior driven by a calculated thirst for retribution. Since then, Roxanna is content to live humbly and quietly in a nunnery. However, as circumstances bring her and Curtis to reunite, the desire for vengeance rears its ugly head once again.

seriesMetadata.description:
Jeok‑un Mountain Pass is a front‑line border zone between the demon race and the interspecies Federation—a strategic strongpoint where training and real combat happen simultaneously. The Federation military, following prophecies from an ancient scripture, is searching for the foretold “Ten Transcendents” who will help reclaim lost territory, so conscription and selection processes are in constant operation. However, what the recruits discover is that something even more terrifying than war with the demons awaits them: the absurdity and brutal hazing of military life itself. This is a dark fantasy story about surviving not just monsters, but the suffocating reality of military culture in a fantasy world.


**Original Webtoon:**    
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=845515), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13489719)

seriesMetadata.description:
Hyacinth, an aspiring hero, sets out to defeat the Demon King in hopes of gaining fame. Although her heart is already set on being a hero, she keeps finding herself in dizzying, compromising situations…

Instead of being stabbed by a sword, she finds herself getting 'pierced' by other things—and strangely, she doesn't exactly hate it?

A romantic comedy between an retired Demon King bored with everything and an overly passionate hero.

I sacrificed my precious vacation to attend a pop-up event of a certain modern fantasy I loved so much.

And on that very day, I got transported into that fantasy world.

As none other than a newly hired employee at a renowned major corporation! A dream workplace with tons of benefits, a high salary, and kind, competent supervisors.

Using my knowledge of the world, I quickly climb the corporate ladder!

But am I happy, you ask?

Please, let me go back home.

"You son of a bitch. I regret having someone like you as a friend."

I was taken in by Yoon Cha-Heon, with whom I had formed a relationship as a patron, filling the void left by my parents who passed away in an accident.

I knew that this choice would lead to a life close to Yoon Cha-Heon's attachment doll... but there was no other way, as I couldn't escape it.

Yoon Cha-Heon caused incidents and accidents to gain my attention, and as I was enduring the shared punishment, thinking only that if I lived as quietly as a mouse for just one year, I could be free...

"My dick just got hard from the first time I saw you. Is that enough?"

I face Seo Je-Hwi, a vulgar, frivolous, and strange delinquent, again.

Young-ha, who has long dreamed of a spring-like love, is about to marry Seo-ju, whom she has been secretly in love with. She eagerly awaits her first night with Seo-ju, who has become her husband, but Seo-ju must leave for the north to defend her country. It is said that it will be at least five years before Seo-ju returns after the war. Unable to wait for Seo-ju indefinitely, Young-ha sets out for the north to meet her husband herself…

[Original Webtoon](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/finding_my_husband)

**King's Maker:**  
Wolfgang Goldenleonard, the 4th Prince of the kingdom, returns to the palace after years of living in hiding. He rejects everything about his new royal life, but is intrigued by the mysterious and dutiful Shin Soohyuk, a catamite of the King. As Wolfgang slowly opens up and learns the ways of the palace, Soohyuk begins to see something special about the wild, unkempt, and stubborn young prince. He might just be the one Soohyuk has been waiting for... the one who could light the flame of rebellion.

**King's Maker: Triple Crown**  
The King is back. With the defeat of his father, Wolfgang Goldenleonard has achieved all that he's sought -- the love of Shin Soohyuk, the power of the throne, and vengeance over the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. But, Soohyuk, a "possession" of the former king, views their rocky relationship as one of war trophy and victor, despite Wolfgang showering him with affection. As uncertainty grows in the royal courts, forces beyond their control are preparing a second coup d'etat. Will these two be able to keep a grasp on the throne and on each other?

Joo Yeon-ho works as a private academy instructor. One day, his former tutoring student Ahn Ji-hye — whom he hadn’t seen in four years — comes back into his life, completely unrecognizable from the girl he once knew. Unable to refuse due to circumstances, he finds himself reluctantly agreeing to an energy-draining cohabitation with her… The diligent and bright student he once remembered is nowhere to be found. Ji-hye has transformed into a total immature mess, acting like a carefree, irresponsible kid with no sense of adult responsibility!

seriesMetadata.description:
The one I fell in love with was the bully’s mother――. In the suffocating town of Hoyama, where the power dynamics from childhood remain deeply rooted, Makoto was mocked as a “frog” and spent his days working at a factory without dreaming of anything. His only hope was Miyuki, the mother of his childhood friend Kazuya. He was saved by his conversations with her, but she is the mayor’s wife, and Kazuya is the very person who bullied Makoto. One day, Kazuya, who had left town, returns, making his daily life the worst. Then, Miyuki appears and makes a shocking proposal──!

Kazuma Suzuki was just your average high schooler—until his childhood friend, Rua Takayashiki, a beautiful, sharp-tongued girl who also happened to be the granddaughter of the school chairman and the nation’s top idol, cut all ties with him using a line straight out of a drama.

Forced into submission for years as her so-called childhood friend, Kazuma decides it’s finally time for his first-ever rebellion. He’s done playing lapdog. This time, he’s taking back his freedom—and aiming for a normal school life.

Escaping a powerful beauty like her is easier said than done...

Onoda is a straight guy and he is three years younger than Harumi Deguchi. They have nothing in common and at first, they were just friends. But that’s not enough for Harumi- he wants more from Ryo and he realizes that he has fallen in love with him. Feeling anxious and emotional, he wants to tell him how he feels… but he can’t. Fearing rejection, he’d rather be just friends and not ruin what he has with him. Here- we have a story of pain, sorrow and happiness of being in love.

Yvette, the eldest daughter of the Cleaves marquis family, dreams of “bearing and raising the child of the person she loves.” But one day, she receives news that her fiancé has died in the war. Then, on the day of the funeral, the crown prince informs her that she is a “damaged” and “infertile” woman, and furthermore orders her to marry Grand Duke Owen Langford, a man feared as a “war maniac.” In order to protect the Cleaves family, Yvette agrees to marry Owen, only to discover that he has no fewer than three children. And since the children cannot accept their new stepmother, they do everything they can to drive Yvette out of the house... Will Yvette be able to overcome rejection and misunderstandings to build a true family with them? And moreover, what is the hidden truth behind this marriage of convenience...?

On the day I was promised in marriage to a prince, I witnessed my father and the Empress tangled together in a disgraceful affair. For my mother’s sake, I tried to endure it and pretend I hadn’t seen anything.

But when my mother learned the truth, she took her own life - leaving me with nothing but revenge. To deal with mad people, shouldn’t I become just as mad myself?

“Your Highness, the Crown Prince, will you marry me?”

The day before the wedding, I proposed to my fiancé’s half-brother - the Crown Prince - so that I could take revenge on my father and the Empress.

One is Shim Chong, a young beggar living off the kindness of others to support herself and her blind father. seriesMetadata.description: Killed by her twin sister, Diana finds herself traveling back in time to the morning of her graduation. She begins her struggle to save Alan, her first love, who died in her previous life. A restart for a young lady who met a tragic end, a romance fantasy with a significant age gap begins.

label: Condom Fusoku no Sekai de, Issen Koetai Watashi-tachi

seriesMetadata.description:
It's the "Great Condom Shortage of the Modern Age!" Japan is facing a record-breaking condom shortage, and the number of "sex refugees" is on the rise. Even so, people still want to connect with the ones they love. As the lines of citizens hoping to buy condoms grow longer and longer, a government minister makes a shocking confession: "Even I've never bought condoms." And so begin the stories of men and women navigating unprecedented crisis. Like a former idol who is interrupted while streaming her condom hoard by an aggressive fan barging in. Or a girlfriend who wants to do it even if she has to take the pill confronting her extremely rigid, straight-laced boyfriend. Come along for the ride as the desperate, absurd, and all-too-real feelings of these men and women collide amidst the condom crisis in this collection of stories.

[Official English](https://coolmic.me/titles/8360)

Lee Su had everything taken from her by her husband, Taegang, who committed adultery with her stepmother—and was then murdered by him.
When she opens her eyes, it's her wedding day, seven years ago.

In this life, I will never be victimized again.

Before Lee Su, who has resolved to take revenge, appears a man—Moon Jung-hyuk.
"Once my ex-boyfriend role is over, let's get married. The term is six months."

Through a contract born of mutual need, Lee Su begins to succeed in her revenge plans against her husband and stepmother, one by one.

Meanwhile, Moon Jung-hyuk, who promised cooperation in exchange for a contract marriage, cannot hide the look in his eyes—fixed only on her.

And before she knows it, Lee Su's heart, once consumed entirely by revenge, slowly begins to melt…

_Source: Naver Series, translated_

[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=851667), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14246965)

label: Sare Tsuma no Revenge Plan ~ Uragiri no Daishou o Anata ni

seriesMetadata.description: https://mechacomic.jp/books/252916

Yuu Tomonoga is a genius who was accepted to an American university at the young age of 13 and later accepted into the university's graduate program. Unfortunately, he loses funding for his research, but decides to drop out and continue the research on his own. He travels back to Japan in hopes of getting funding, but he quickly runs out of money for daily living. Luckily, he gets a call from an old friend and accepts his offer to teach at an all-girls school.

In a world where every boy and girl has a special power called Iris, Toru who, as a result of not having any kind of special power, was bullied from a young age, lives by his motto "minimal exposure" to live without standing out. But his peaceful school life changes when he receives a certain confession from the school's most popular girl, Koyuki. His motto begins to shake.

categories.name: Character/s Trying to Live a Normal Life
Female Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description: Mira Sasaki is a first-year high school student who wants to have the time of her life in a band. She told a teacher that she wanted to join the pop music band, but to her surprise, it had been disbanded. In fact, almost all music-related clubs had been wiped out! In this rare situation, Mira joined the only active music-related club, the Vocaloid Research Club. She didn't have the slightest clue what Vocaloid was, but her worries were quickly put to rest. She was soon surrounded by upperclassmen overflowing with their love for Vocaloid. Whether you love Vocaloid or don't know about it yet, everyone is warmly welcomed! Voca-ken's laid-back, short comedy has begun!

He is the spokesperson for the God of Light, the captain of the Twelve Holy Knights, and (some say) the man closest to perfection. Beneath the veneer of the Sun Knight, however, lies a very different sort of character...

A girl named Nona lives in plain sight among humans, hiding her true identity as a mage as she spends her days in peace with her best friend Lovi. But one day, Nona uses magic to fix Lovi's glasses and subsequently catches the attention of the Bureau of Magic Surveillance. The story follows Tohno Shiki, a teenage boy who, after a near-fatal accident in his childhood, gained the mysterious power to perceive lines covering everything around him. When he cuts along these lines, whatever it was immediately falls apart with a clean cut; in other words, killing it. He would have quickly gone insane from living in a world that could fall apart so easily, had it not been for a wandering self-proclaimed magician who gave him a pair of glasses that blocked his unnatural perception when worn.

Soon afterwards, he was disinherited from his family and sent to live with some relatives. For eight years he lived a normal life, hiding his special eyes, until one day he receives a letter inviting him to come back home. Shiki suddenly becomes caught up in strange and life-threatening series of events, ones that are somehow linked to his childhood accident and a forgotten past...

seriesMetadata.description:
The world has been redefined by the sudden appearance of gates.
Countless beasts were unleashed, and countless awakeners were born.
Weapon Awakeners, who summon weapons, and Ability Awakeners, who use abilities. Depending on their strength, they range from D-rank to SS-rank.
Yoo Seo-Jin, an S-ranked Weapon Awakener, is offered a job at Abyss Management due to his outstanding skills and great personality.

“So what will I be doing?”
“There's only one thing I need you to do, and that's to stay here and not quit.”
“...?”

He's assigned to be the only team member to Koo Doha, one of only three superior awakeners which is more commonly known as SSS-rank.
His boss is all skill and no character!

“If I hadn't attacked, you'd have been killed!”
“I'd rather be killed!”
“Oh, yeah! I'm sorry I saved you, but unfortunately I'm a stupid S-class!”
“If you're sorry, write your resignation and resign! Write your resignation and get out!”

Work life is harder than raiding!

seriesMetadata.description: 'You have been reincarnated as our Dungeon Master. Lure in as many adventurers as you can with their own greed. Through exploration and combat, create a dungeon that drains them of their blood, mana, and life itself.' After passing away from a terminal illness on Earth, the protagonist awakens before a young demon, the Dungeon Core, who tasks him with this mission. However, instead of creating a lethal labyrinth filled with deadly monsters and traps, he decides to use his knowledge of Japanese culture to build something entirely different: a Hot Spring (Onsen) Dungeon. Featuring baths designed for skincare and waters with rejuvenating properties, his 'dungeon' quickly becomes the talk of the town. Instead of bloodthirsty warriors, the place begins to swarm with female knights, noble ladies, and even queens seeking beauty treatments. What started as a simple management plan evolves into a phenomenon that reshapes the economy, diplomacy, and culture of the entire fantasy world.

Jia was always a nice-mannered girl, but that didn't stop her from yelling at the cool and distant Jaehee in high school. Now 9 years later, Jaehee wants to spend more time with his first love. Jia knows to look past his games, but does she really want to when he's become such a catch? Based on the hit novel by Choi SooHyon.

seriesMetadata.description:
After dying and waking up again, she finds herself in the world of a trashy romance fantasy novel she had read while alive. Worse still, she has reincarnated as the villainous stepmother who is destined to be killed by her darkened son. No way. She refuses to die like that! She is determined to stop her son from falling into darkness at all costs. …But despite her resolve, this body turns out to be extremely frail. She collapses after walking only a little, can barely do anything properly, and if she pushes herself too hard, she might die before her son ever gets the chance to kill her… She must become healthy, shower her son with love, and destroy every last death flag! Thus begins the desperate survival strategy of a sickly mother doing everything she can to stay alive.

seriesMetadata.description:
Angel, a former top-tier mercenary, was forced to retire due to an injury. Left by his fiancée, he now spends his days drowning in alcohol—a middle-aged adventurer (and a virgin).
One day, his niece Liz, whom he once taught swordsmanship, suddenly barges into his life!
Angel is bewildered by how she has grown into an astonishingly beautiful girl, but Liz pays no heed to his hesitation and boldly declares that she will become his wife—?!
A heart-pounding fantasy adventure, in more ways than one, featuring a beautiful young heroine and her middle-aged uncle!

The saintess on her 20th life loop knows the truth:

One day, the world will be destroyed by the Demon King.

Yet in this otherwise hopeless timeline, an unbelievably adorable little girl named Maria is suddenly born!

“For her sake, I want to avoid the bad ending.”

As various people who have lived through countless loops—a saintess, a duke’s daughter, a prince, and Maria’s older brother—share this wish, Maria’s very existence begins to change the future!

And to make matters even more surprising, one of her new friends is a boy who is destined to become the future Demon King—

Could this little girl be the one who saves the world?

A hilarious romantic comedy in which a cast of repeatedly looping side characters shower endless affection on a noble girl experiencing her very first life! ([Sana Scans](/group/zgbui9j/sana-scans))

From Yen Press:  
When Roman architect Lucius is criticized for his "outdated" thermae designs, he retreats to the local bath to collect his thoughts. All Lucius wants is to recapture the Rome of earlier days, when one could enjoy a relaxing bath without the pressure of merchants and roughhousing patrons. Slipping deeper into the warm water, Lucius is suddenly caught in the suction and dragged through the drainage at the bottom of the bath! He emerges coughing and sputtering amid a group of strange-looking foreigners with the most peculiar bathhouse customs over 1,500 years in the future in modern-day Japan! His contemporaries wanted him to modernize, and so, borrowing the customs of these mysterious bath-loving people, Lucius opens what quickly becomes the most popular new bathhouse in Rome-Thermae Romae.

Note: Won the third Manga Taishō and the Short Story Award at the 14th Tezuka Osamu Cultural Prize in 2010.

From [Aerandria Scans](https://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=1242):

Goraihou Academy — A world leading bourgeois school where mysterious creatures gather. In order to protect the academy, the members of the student council with attractive appearances and fickle personalities stand up to...?!

We meet Sakuragawa Shinya, Goraihouji Tadato, and Mashiba Naoki. Handsome and talented Shinya is more or less the main character. Together with Tadato, the president of the student council whose father also happens to be chairman of the board of directors for the school, and Naoki, who is always hitting on an uninterested Shinya, Shinya discovers the haunted secrets of Goraihou Gakuen.

Things begin to change when a dark creature is discovered hiding within the school. The trio go to investigate and find Gen-san. And from there on they solve mysteries and hauntings and other paranormal events within the school.

From Seven Seas:

Hatori Chise has lived a life full of neglect and abuse, devoid of anything resembling love. Far from the warmth of family, she has had her share of troubles and pitfalls. Just when all hope seems lost, a fateful encounter awaits her. 

When a man with the head of a beast, wielding strange powers, obtains her through a slave auction, Chise’s life will never be the same again. The man is a “magus,” a sorcerer of great power, who decides to free Chise from the bonds of captivity. The magus then makes a bold statement: Chise will become his apprentice and his bride.

**Original Manga:**   [Mag Garden](https://www.mag-garden.co.jp/comics/6990/)  | [Comic Growl](https://comic-growl.com/series/42831552a0d66)

seriesMetadata.description:
In every corner of society, there are women worshipped as goddesses: YouTubers, idols, announcers, models, wives, consumed by the public as perfect, untouchable images. But behind the glamour lie hidden desires, fractured relationships, and secrets no one is meant to see. “Breaking the Queen: The History of Stuffed Goddesses” is a dark psychological thriller that dissects the moment these carefully packaged facades collapse, told through sharp, intense episodic stories that pull readers in fast and leave a haunting resonance long after the final page.

**Original Novel:**    
[Aladin](https://www.aladin.co.kr/shop/wproduct.aspx?ItemId=388946778), [KyoboBook](https://ebook-product.kyobobook.co.kr/dig/epd/ebook/E000012774153), [Yes24](https://www.yes24.com/product/goods/184269689) 

**Official Translations:**    
[English](https://genesistudio.com/novels/qb)

Actor Arashi was deeply drawn to the acting of the popular star Tōru Ōtaki, even while harboring jealousy toward him.

One day, after watching a movie starring Tōru, Arashi found himself unable to shake his frustration and headed to a members-only club he frequented to clear his mind.

In that place—where everyone hid their true faces and prying into personal identities was forbidden—Arashi met a man who exuded a dangerously alluring aura.

The moment their eyes met, Arashi felt an overwhelming attraction, and the two spent a passionate night together.

Their physical compatibility was incredible, and the next morning, as Arashi woke feeling utterly satisfied, he discovered that the man sleeping beside him was none other than Tōru Ōtaki…?

Still stunned by the revelation, Arashi then received a call from his manager informing him that he and Tōru had been cast together in a drama.

What was supposed to be a one-night encounter ends up continuing as a friends-with-benefits relationship, thanks to their mutual interests aligning…?

seriesMetadata.description: Orphaned after his mother’s brutal murder by a yakuza gang, Yoichi Shindo learns the truth—his estranged father was the gang’s founder, and his mother’s death was the result of a betrayal by the organization’s No.2, Mikado. Determined to exact revenge, Yoichi infiltrates a secret academy where future yakuza leaders are trained. In a world where everyone is an enemy, he must navigate deadly power struggles, sharpen his strength, and climb the ranks—all while keeping his true intentions hidden. Fueled by vengeance, Yoichi’s journey to the top begins. Will he become the ultimate ruler of the underworld, or will he be consumed by the darkness he seeks to destroy?

When Yuna Lee's mother moves to Germany to pursue a music degree, she's left to stay with her father, a university professor, and her three older brothers, who are fiercely overprotective of her.

During her summer vacation, she visits her mother in Germany, where she falls off a cliff and is rescued by Rieno, an 18-year-old knight living in the land of Phantasma. Rieno makes a deal with Yuna: If he saves her life, she must come with him and become the Queen of Phantasma. 

After agreeing, she goes back home, only to return to Germany some months later, and is whisked away to Phantasma by Rieno. Now, she must cope with being the Queen of Phantasma, while forgetting the world she came from.

seriesMetadata.description:
From CMX:

Souka and her recently divorced mother move to a new place to start over. In looking for a school to enroll in, Souka decides to leave her preppy, private high school behind and transfers into a technical high school. To her surprise, she's the only girl student in the entire school! The first day of school is nothing like she ever imagined -- boys crashing through the window, fighting for all they are worth. One day, the school's current "Bancho" (a term for a gang leader) ambushes Souka. Determined to protect her, Yu, one of the classmates, comes to her rescue, but Yu ends up in a struggle. Trying to help, Souka swings her book bag and ends up taking down the Bancho herself! What Souka didn't know was that when someone takes down the class' leader, you became the leader of that class. This wasn't a role she was expecting for herself, but will she be able to relinquish it? 

------------

From [Esthétique](https://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=674):

Due to family problems, Hirayama Souka tranfers from a private high school to an industrial high school. However, upon entering the school, she finds out that there are 850 boys in the school, and that she is the only girl there. Apart from the great disparity between the number of boys and girls, she also finds out that gangsters still exist in this era. Furthermore, a conflict has erupted between her classmate Katou Yuuni and the gangsters. Thus begins Souka's eventful life in the industrial high school...

To pay back the damages, she is forced to work for the club, and it's there that she discovers just how wealthy the boys are and how different they are from everybody else.

seriesMetadata.description:
My first love, Joo Arin, whom I met again after five years. Why has she changed so much?

**Original Webtoon:**

After the Golden Kingdom is sunk underground by an insane magician, its king emerges, promising all of his treasure to any who defeat the magician, before crumbling to dust. Guilds are spurred on by this promise, traversing the labyrinthine dungeon in search of the magician. Laios Touden, the leader of one such guild, encounters a dragon that wipes out his party and devours his sister, Falin. Despite having lost the entirety of their supplies and belongings, Laios along with Marcille Donato, an elven healer, and Chilchuck Tims, a halfling thief, immediately reenter the dungeon, determined to save Falin.

Time being of the essence, Laios suggests the taboo of eating the monsters of the dungeon as a means of gathering supplies. Upon the preparation of their first meal in the dungeon, they are stopped by an on-looking dwarf named Senshi. An enthusiast of monster cooking, he helps them prepare their monster ingredients for safe consumption. After learning of Laios' circumstances, Senshi expresses his desire to cook a dragon and joins their guild, thus beginning their food-filled foray into the dungeon together.

**Original:**  [Harta Comix](https://www.kadokawa.co.jp/series/22301/?i=301411000826), [Kadokomi](https://comic-walker.com/detail/KC_000393_S?episodeType=first)

*Note: Nominated for the 9th to 12th Manga Taishou Award from 2016 to 2019. Won Best Comic at the 55th Seiun Awards in 2024 and the Harvey Award for Best Manga in 2024.*

“Welcome to the Witch’s Café”

Thirty-two years ago, the world was engulfed by a dark fantasy that overflowed.

Tsukimiya Kaoru, a “Witch Hunter” who hunts the demonic creatures born from the otherworldly “Black Paradise” that threatens humanity’s survival, arrives at the cursed island of “Karyūjima” seeking revenge. There, she encounters Fiona, the “White Flower Witch.”

Fiona, who runs a café and a “(mostly) anything-goes” odd-jobs business, makes Kaoru an offer:

“I want you to be my bodyguard.”

“…Huh?”

Though bewildered, Kaoru ends up staying with her. The very next morning, a case is brought to the “Nekoyūkan” café.

The first challenge for the “Witch” and the “Witch Hunter” is a series of mysterious disappearances occurring in the colossal, multi-layered structure “Gaikakurō” in Q City.

Alana, the daughter of a duke, became engaged to Crown Prince Abel through a political marriage.

Determined to become a worthy future queen, she devoted herself to relentless, painstaking effort.

However, one day she witnesses an affair between Abel and her own younger sister, Avril.

Shattered by the betrayal and despairing over everything she had worked for, Alana loses the will to live.

She asks her servant, Terrence, to prepare poison for her, deciding to bring her life to an end.

But then—?! ([Sana Scans](/group/zgbui9j/sana-scans))

K-pop idol Yoon Eden has wasted away for years under a mediocre label with an incompetent CEO. 

He is disillusioned and on the verge of quitting when he's sent back in time to the day of his debut. 

Now, Eden is determined to use his songwriting talent to rewrite his career and gain some well-deserved fame. 

Despite his CEO still pushing cheesy songs and tacky concepts, can Eden, with the help of his group members, truly reignite his spark and become a sincerely dazzling idol?

Makoto Misumi was an average, everyday high schooler, who found himself shipped off to another world at his parents’ whims. Upon arrival, however, he’s insulted by the Goddess for being too ugly and thrown into a desolate wasteland. He frantically searches for human warmth and connection, but can find nothing but monsters and inhuman settlers. Misumi Makoto was just a normal high-school student until the day he was summoned to another world because of an agreement his parents had made with a goddess. Except when he meets the only goddess in the world he's sent to, she insults him by calling him "extremely unattractive" and makes an arbitrary decision to banish him to a deserted wilderness. Makoto searches the desolate land to find other humans, but for some reason only finds creatures that are all nonhuman. Even the two pretty women who decide to follow him on his journey used to be a dragon and a giant spider. Along with two extremely eccentric characters (but really reliable in battles), so begins Makoto's unlucky adventure in the new world! A fantasy about a teenage boy who keeps getting hit by one problem after another!

As a male prostitute in the slums, Je-oh is at the bottom of the social hierarchy. A pawn among pawns. Sure, he's tried to break away, but each attempt has only left him with more wounds. Why he rescued Je-oh is unclear, but a slick-talking manwhore was definitely not part of anyone's plan. Regardless, Je-oh is no ordinary pawn. Sawa applies to Heaven’s Wing Academy, thinking she would look cute in the uniform. But she never expected the academy to be a previously all-boys’ school! And the head honcho of the school, the class president himself—Ran—doesn’t seem to  like her one bit and takes no pains to hide it. At first, adjusting to life at the academy is tough. Sawa is bullied and teased, and the boys in the class even throw her new shoes in the water. While attempting to retrieve her shoes, she falls into the water and is unexpectedly saved by Ran, who up until this point has made her life hell. The newfound gentleness in Ran intrigues her—and she finds herself falling for him. What will her days be like for the rest of her school life?


*Includes the following side stories called:

- *Endless March* in vol. 1  
Yayoi, a student studying piano, can't get along with her teacher, Terawaki. But as they continue the lessons, both of them will overcome their obstacles.

- *Home, Sweet Home* in vol. 4  
A short story about Sawa's parents and how they got together. 

- *Brown Garden Eki* in vol. 6  
A young girl named Kuro lives at the Brown Garden station. She has always lived in the station, collecting stories from travelers and then telling them to others. But why does she remain at the station?

Dominic, a war refugee who once lived as a nutritionist in a past life, settles in the small fishing village of Evergreen hoping for a quiet start. Instead, he is abruptly named village headman after the former leader steps down for the absurd reason that he refuses to learn how to read. Dominic’s nutritional and medical knowledge earns him unexpected attention when he diagnoses the former lord’s chronic foot pain through diet alone. His growing reputation soon draws the attention of the entire lord’s castle, changing his peaceful life forever.

Officer Seigi Wakaba joined the force for one reason: to hunt down the monsters who massacred his family and abducted his little sister.

But years of dead ends have left him broken. That is, until a cryptic letter from his missing sister leads him to an old, rusted New Nambu police revolver. Pushed to the absolute brink of despair, Seigi turns the gun on himself and pulls the trigger.

Click. Bang.

He doesn't die. Instead, the gunshot hurls him backward through time, waking him up just moments before the tragedy that ruined his life. Armed with a gun that shatters the timeline, Seigi finally has a chance to stop the massacre. But with every leap into the past, a sickening reality comes to light: the masterminds aren't faceless criminals. They are the smiling neighbors and trusted police colleagues he worked alongside every day. Betrayed by his world, Seigi stakes his life on the remaining bullets in his cylinder. He will dismantle their conspiracy piece by piece, but when the smoke clears, who will the final muzzle be pointed at?

After a long period of unconsciousness following a tragic accident, Nozomi awakens to devastating news - her baby was stillborn, and her husband has already remarried. Determined to move forward, Nozomi soon uncovers dark truth: the accident was deliberately orchestrated by her ex- husband and his new wife. Armed with the truth, Nozomi vows revenge. She undergoes a complete transformation - a new face and a new name - and infiltrates their household as a live-in housekeeper. Her treacherous ex-husband, his arrogant, scheming wife, and their secret lover... not one of them will be spared..

label: Inter-High Yuushoukou no Hoketsu no Hanashi

seriesMetadata.description: The Sumida East High School basketball team achieves a dramatic victory in the Inter-High School Championships. While the first-year students shine, third-year student Nakano, dropped from the starting lineup just before the tournament, has mixed feelings... A coming-of-age drama sharply portrayed by a promising young talent.

label: Kamen no Kuro Kishi. Shoutai Bareta no de Mou Gakuen de Musou Suru

seriesMetadata.description: The mysterious, strongest knight known as the “Black Knight” saves people in times of crisis. He was supposed to live as a masked hero in the shadows—yet his true identity is exposed as none other than Adele, the disgrace of a marquis family! Though Adel pretended to be incompetent in order to live a lazy life, his cover is blown, and now even at the academy he can no longer conceal his true power…!? A school tale of unrivaled dominance featuring a knight whose secret identity has been revealed!

The high school girl Manami who had fallen down the emergency stairs at school had, before she noticed, become a three year old in the world of an Otome Game. What's more, that little girl was one of the rival characters that appeared in the game; the can't-take-a-hint-burikko-type-rival daughter of a marquis family. What awaited her at the end was social obliteration.  
Although she did get a bad feeling about this, Aimi decided not to worry!  
It was a dream after all, so that had nothing to do with her. For now, she's going to master magic! Hooray!

seriesMetadata.description: Gil reigned as the strongest gladiator slave in the arena. Despite his dominance, he lived with a constant, unquenchable thirst for something more. One day, he finally seized a chance to escape. Having fled the city and gained his hard-won freedom, he heads for the neighboring kingdom of Bastel, where slavery does not exist. There, he begins a new life as an adventurer. However, for the world's strongest gladiator, the business of adventuring seems to be far too easy...?

label: Hacking Ghost Karada ni Shika Kachi no Nai

seriesMetadata.description: In an age where one in twenty people develops special abilities, Hiroto Takigami, a weakling who can only talk to spirits, is hated by his powerful stepsister, Rei, for a reason unknown. She will kill him the moment Hiroto graduates from the institution for ability users and gains the freedom to control his abilities. She tells him that his “remaining time” is one year. Lost in despair, a spirit appears before him, revealing an unbelievable secret about the true nature of his ability. Thus begins an unprecedented "body hacking" battle.

From Yen On:  
The year is 2095. Magic has been tamed as another form of technology, and the practice of magic is now a rigorous discipline. Brother and sister Tatsuya and Miyuki Shiba are just about to start their first year at the renowned First Magic High School of Japan. But the school's ironclad rules mean that the brilliant Miyuki enters the prestigious Course 1, while her older brother, Tatsuya, is relegated to Course 2 and that's just the beginning of their troubles.

Even in his wildest dreams, all Namwoo wants is to have enough money to survive each month. Si-eon, on the other hand, has everything he could ever want except happiness. Intrigued by Namwoo's humble wishes, Si-eon offers him the money he wants - the catch being, he has to date him.

"Can you be your natural self, if you know the truth?"  
"Can you assimilate into our school?"  
"Can you pledge secrecy when you are a human being?"

Fukuta Neko somehow finds herself applying to and enrolling in a secret school created by and specifically for animal/human shapeshifters, though only after difficult tribulations with those who manage the school. Neko befriends a fellow classmate, the cute Suzuhara Miiko, prior to the tough task of enrolling, and afterwards discovers her new found friend's "feline" side, though this changes nothing in regards to the close relationship just started between them. Join Neko on her journey into the mysteries of the prosperous Moritaka school for the sons and daughters of this literal Noah's ark.

*“Wanna stay over?”*

From their very first meeting, his next-door neighbor and film actor Choi Suhyeok comes in with completely unfiltered, straight-forward advances. Stunned and unable to keep up, Jung Seyun finds himself constantly swept along, ending up acting in what feels like several films that are impossible to tell apart from romance or comedy.

A modern romance about two exceptionally capable men who meet even more exceptional people, get overwhelmed by work, and end up getting just as overwhelmed by love.

They call Harriet Listerwell the Scandal Maker, but the reputation was carefully crafted by her cousin Bella. At an imperial banquet, another of Bella’s schemes unfolds—framing Harriet in a way which insults the handsome and formidable Duke Cedric Kailas. Disgraced, Harriet is sent to a convent. In exile, she discovers a troubling truth: Bella’s family may have been behind the death of her parents. Now Harriet is returning to the glittering society that condemned her. The Scandal Maker is back—and this time, she intends to live up to the name.

For the 99th time, he finally made it to the end of the game. Standing alone in front of the final boss’s chamber, Min Ryu was greeted with betrayal as the system killed him for not having four more players with him. On his 100th and final attempt, can Min Ryu find the help he needs to end this ruthless game? ([Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/the-100th-regression-of-the-max-level-player-comic/info))

A deep love bubbles beneath the surface, and a gentle touch is all Hikaru Kusakabe and Rihito Sajou need to release it. Sajou, studious and reserved, is yet to be accustomed to such strong feelings for Kusakabe, making him overthink and insecure. In contrast, Kusakabe, straightforward and bold, does not restrain himself from showing intimate affection.

While Kusakabe reveals his dream to one day become a professional musician, Sajou is tirelessly preparing for college. Their differing goals bring an unspoken, heavy cloud over their relationship: as the boys approach their graduation, it is unclear what awaits their romance. Nevertheless, their love warms them in the coldest winter and brings hope that, eventually, they will find the answer to their uncertain future together.

Years after the war nearly tore them apart, Himiko Toga and Ochako Uraraka have settled into their everyday lives as flatmates. In the safety of their home, lingering touches, fleeting glances, and shared moments grow a quiet longing between them. Uraraka fears to act on her desire, as the guilt-ridden Toga still carries the weight of her actions before the war. But desire cannot be denied forever, and one quiet night after a shared drink, their restraint finally shatters in a kiss that reveals the depth of the feelings they’ve both kept hidden and unleashes their held back desires.

Middle school student Izuku Midoriya wants to be a hero more than anything, but he hasn’t got an ounce of power in him. With no chance of ever getting into the prestigious U.A. High School for budding heroes, his life is looking more and more like a dead end. Then an encounter with All Might, the greatest hero of them all, gives him a chance to change his destiny.

Watching the news, Takemichi Hanagaki learns that his girlfriend from way back in middle school, Hinata Tachibana, has died. He lives in a crappy apartment with thin walls, and his six-year-younger boss treats him like an idiot. Plus, he’s a complete and total virgin. At the height of his rock-bottom life, he suddenly time-leaps 12 years back to his middle school days!! seriesMetadata.description:
After being poisoned to death as a result of their affair, I regress and take my revenge.” Duke’s daughter Leila Floria meets Gilbert Avalon, the second son of a ducal family famed as the best doctors in the country, through her father’s introduction. At first, she doesn’t get along with Gilbert, but thanks to her efforts, he eventually proposes to her. Leila savors her happiness and dreams of a blissful married life with the man she loves… Then disaster strikes: Leila is struck by a grave illness and becomes unable to bear children. Even getting out of bed is difficult, and in the midst of her agonizing struggle, she nearly breaks—but with encouragement from her fiancé Gilbert and her close friend Sherry Polish, she resolves not to lose to the illness. However, all of this was orchestrated by those two. The “illness” is actually poison they have been feeding her. Gilbert and Sherry are having an affair, and in order to be together, they decided Leila had to be eliminated. Betrayed and cast aside, Leila is driven out of the mansion and left alone in the forest. As she lies dying, filled with regret and seething hatred, one thought consumes her: She was betrayed by her beloved husband and her dearest friend—can such a worst‑possible ending really be allowed? No… she wants to take revenge on the two of them. As if in answer to that prayer, she opens her eyes to find herself healthy again—and time has rewound to before the wedding.

When it comes to light that Octavia de Reine isn’t a legitimate member of the noble House of Reine, she swiftly finds herself disowned. At first she takes this in stride...until her power hungry father and ex-suitor start vying for the house full of mysterious heirlooms that her doting grandmother left her. Little does her family know that she’s destined to inherit an even greater legacy. Olivia hopes to follow in Granny’s footsteps and become a famous detective, after all! She’ll face off against young noblemen, phantom thieves, and magical items corrupted by demonic forces. Oh, and one vengeful angel queen. Moreover, who’s this suspiciously young marquis that seems so smitten with her...?

The story begins when late at night, in a noisy gambling den, a gambler secretly stakes his family's treasured heirloom, the Seven Stars Sword, which is said to have the power to control demons! Shortly after, the apostle of the Divine Moon Sect, the Sichuan Overlord of the Four Heavens, appears out of nowhere, turning the gambling den into chaos and leaving bodies scattered.

From that day on, the world of murim is plagued by horrific and brutal incidents. The murim's dedicated arrest agency, Inryeong Unit, is dispatched to the scenes of these mysterious cases. They recognize the emergence of a massive dark force and set out to track its source.

Meanwhile, for the sake of her family's revenge, the disguised Hee-yeon joins the Inryeong Unit, but is discovered by the captain, Beom-yeop, on her first day! But for some reason, Beom-yeop allows Hee-yeon to remain in the Inryeong Unit.

Can the Inryeong Unit prevent the revival of the Divine Moon Sect, which was thought to have vanished into the legends?!

From [Bliss](http://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=318):

This is manga version of the popular Heian period novel focuses on Senjumaru, a chigo at the Nyoirin temple of Saga. Young and beautiful, Senju has to withstand constant abuse of conceited monks. However, his teacher and head patriarch of the temple helps Senju escape from their clutches, leaving him with a letter of release. When a government official, Fujiwara Moroe, saves Senju from the temple henchmen pursuing him, Senju vows to serve him in return for his kindess...

Do you know how this world ends?

Become the hero and defeat the 72 Demon Lords. The game that was boasted as the absolute hardest strategy game, 『Dungeon Attack』.

I used to be the ‘hero’ that had accomplished everything in this game, but after answering a suspicious survey, I found myself in the game as the weakest Demon Lord, 「Dantalian」.

With only my eloquent tongue and my memories of conquest as a hero—.

In order to survive as Dantalian. I shall tear this world apart.

**Original Novel:**  
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/home?seriesId=50281811),  [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=3075030),  [RIDI](https://ridibooks.com/v2/Detail?id=2036001157)

“Let’s make a warm home!” A renovation × romance drama about building a beloved home together with a gyaru.

Kazukage is suddenly presented with a divorce, accused of domestic violence he has no recollection of, and loses the home he could return to. At that moment, a cheerful gyaru calls out to him, “You can stay at my place.” She turns out to be Karen, his childhood friend who used to play “secret base” together with him when they were kids.

However, the house Karen leads him to is an old traditional house with years of wear—nothing like what one would expect from a gyaru.

While renovating the old house, the two gradually repair their wounded hearts and their relationship, rebuilding them anew. 

Just like the secret base they once had.

(Source: Square Enix, translated)

categories.name: Female Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description:
[“I accidentally touched the CEO’s groin while drunk”] Getting drunk is troublesome, but the CEO is even more troublesome. One day after the company party, after drinking just a little too much, with the background, the personality, and the unrealistic CEO and his juniors, Eunwoo ends up in an awkward situation. It’s not the time to be frozen in shock. Eunwoo, having regained consciousness at home, decides to flee before the CEO, who woke up from sleep, notices the incident. The CEO was also clearly drunk enough not to notice, so if Eunwoo pretends not to know, she could get away with it… that was the hope. The CEO, whom she encounters in the elevator while drunk, says, “Why did you go ahead first? Wake me up.” On that day, he knew all the truth. “I know this isn’t an excuse, but I… I was too drunk that day… I’m sorry.” “Well… I don’t know if there’s anything I should apologize for, or if you should be apologizing to me…” “…I thought everything that happened that day was unfortunate.” “Really? Should I say it specifically? Are you apologizing because you feel bad, or because you feel bad for me, or are you just apologizing in general?” The CEO, interpreting the groin incident as responsibility, did not let Eunwoo resign. Not because of modern work ethics, but because, apparently, he meant to date her. Eunwoo, who had no idea, starts a romantic relationship. Life is not easy.

[Original Webtoon](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=12977380)

Realizing he might become a burden to the village, Graham decides to leave. He begins a second life as an adventurer in the Kingdom, only to find out...?! It was late at night. The old-fashioned doorbell echoed through the run-down building, ringing on and on. Worried the noise might disturb the neighbors, Jee Heejin carefully opened the front door to see what was going on.

“Who is it…?”

“Hey… long time no see.”

Jee Heejin and Jee Hyunwoo, who once lived as step-siblings for five years after their parents’ remarriage, meet again after five years apart. Now a handsome medical student returning in triumph, Hyunwoo approaches the drunken Heejin and whispers that this time, they should become family not as siblings, but as husband and wife… and in this forbidden reunion, Heejin is forced to make a life-altering choice.

seriesMetadata.description:
The career full of love and sorrow! The "work as life" of a genius wedding dress designer!

In Minami, Osaka, nestled among rows of shady multi-tenant buildings, lies Nui Shishida's studio. Sewing as naturally as he breathes, he thinks about the brides wearing his dresses 24 hours a day. In this ultimate state where his personal and professional lives are entirely intertwined, Nui gets his heart broken again, exactly once for every dress he makes.

It's his true calling, yet a path of thorns. The curtain rises on this bride-obsessed comedy of a wedding dress designer!

Brilliant and overachieving, Misaki Ayuzawa is the President of the Student Council at Seika High School, formerly a boys' school. Unfortunately, most of the students are still male and stuck in their slovenly habits, so man-hating Misaki really socks it to 'em in an attempt to make the school presentable to attract more female students. But what will she do when the sexiest boy in school finds out that after school, Misaki works in a maid cafe.

label: A Retired Saint Will Raise Your Home Value

seriesMetadata.description:
I ended up transmigrating into the web novel *If You’ve Drawn Your Sword, You Might as Well Cut a Throat*, where the male lead, after endlessly regressing, loses his mind and sets the entire empire ablaze.

…And of all roles, I became one of the countless saintesses.

I have only one goal:

Get out before he goes insane and avoid the fiery ending!

But reality?

“Former Saintess Shuana. You are under arrest on charges of witchcraft and worshipping evil spirits.”

The moment I step outside the temple, some pseudo-religious bounty-hunting maniac starts chasing me, calling me a witch.

“You’re insane, right? Then die as much as you want. I’ll keep coming after you.”

The unhinged male lead obsessively hunts me down, even killing himself over and over just to regress and pursue me.

And to top it all off, I’ve been dragged into his endless regression loop.

…Will I be able to make it out of this novel alive?

"I have never loved you—not even once."

At eighteen, Beatrice is betrayed by the fiancé she loved most and meets a tragic end. Pierced by both his cruel words and a blade, she dies… only to awaken and find herself returned to the age of seven!?

In this second life, she meets a mysterious mage named Luca, who delivers a shocking revelation: “Your father was so enraged by your death that he tried to destroy the world.”

In her previous life, Beatrice believed her father to be cold and distant, incapable of affection. But now, learning of the depth of his love, she is left confused yet determined. For the sake of the world—and for her own happiness—she chooses to live a new life where she allows herself to be loved.

Thus begins the story of a young noble lady (now a little girl) who has returned from death, surrounded by an overwhelmingly devoted father who dotes on his daughter beyond measure and a cast of stunning protectors determined to keep her safe. ([Sana Scans](/group/zgbui9j/sana-scans))

label: While Others Became Female Leads in Romantic Fantasy Novels, I Became a Closet Monster

seriesMetadata.description:
When others were reincarnating as beautiful people or adorable animals, I ended up in the body of a creepy monster living in the male lead’s closet. 

Why? 

Not only that, but I also became the nasty monster that torments the male lead. According to the original story, the male lead was supposed to fear me. But— 

“Your horns are more beautiful than roses.” 

“Can I give you a name?” 

The male lead doesn’t seem to be scared of me at all. I thought it was fortunate that I, now a tenant (?), was able to get along with the male lead, the owner of the room. 

“I’m scared to sleep alone. Let’s sleep together.” 

But I didn’t expect us to get this close…. 

*** 

Dedrick stared at the monster sleeping soundly in his closet. This monster, who had suddenly appeared one day, had saved him from his hellish life. The corners of his lips curled up in satisfaction. 

‘My very own monster.’ 

Something that was only his, something he would never let go of.

Massage Research Society's high expected star Chiaki is a normal, quiet high schooler. She immediately wants to massage the guy with the beautiful back who she sees on her bus, then coincidentally she also sees him at her school. From Kodansha:  
As players of Monster Hunter and Dungeons & Dragons know, the slime is not exactly the king of the fantasy monsters. So when a 37-year-old Tokyo salaryman dies and wakes up in a world of dragons and magic, he’s a little disappointed to find he’s become a blind, boneless slime monster. Mikami’s middle age hasn’t gone as he planned: He never found a girlfriend, he got stuck in a dead-end job, and he was abruptly stabbed to death in the street at 37. So when he wakes up in a new world straight out of a fantasy RPG, he’s disappointed but not exactly surprised to find that he’s not a knight or a wizard but a blind slime demon. But there are chances for even a slime to become a hero.

This funny and heartrending romantic manga set in modern Tokyo is not the fairy tale you remember! This time, Prince Charming is a teenage janitor, and this Sleeping Beauty’s curse is a supernatural, gender-bending dream that threatens to pull them both into a deeper and deeper slumber…

High schooler Tetsu Misato is hardworking, frugal, and easily scared, but he commits to a part-time job at the mansion on the hill—the one that’s rumored to be haunted. As he toils away, he notices a building separate from the estate, and the mysterious girl who lives within it: Shizu Karasawa. Tetsu slowly becomes enchanted by Shizu’s lonely smile, but by their second encounter, he quickly finds himself in over his head. There’s an unsettling feeling he can’t quite shake, but there’s love there, too.

*Source: Kodansha USA*

seriesMetadata.description:
Cane Lele was born into the fashion industry. Her mother, Ye Fei Yi, was Taiwan's top model, and her father was also a model, until a tragic airplane crash left Lele without parents. Therefore, it is no surprise that Lele hates the industry, thinking it superficial and unnecessary.

Raised by her maternal grandmother, Lele reaches seventeen before she is sucked in by her mother's sister, Ye Fei Hong, a fashion model agent (and former model), convinces the reluctant Lele to model. Lele had been adverse to the whole idea, until she sees a photo shoot of popular American model Angus Lanson, and she begins to see modeling as an art form.

When Aunt Fei Hong's magazine editor invites Angus Lanson to a meeting of all the top fashion ambassadors, Lele is invited to meet him and is very curious. She does not know that Angus' twin elder brother, Eros Lanson, is secretly accompanying his brother. This obviously leads to confusion and is the start of a charming story of Lele's goals: fashion in NYC, becoming a top model, and love?

seriesMetadata.description:
Compilation of short stories:

• *Hotel: Since 2079* (2006)  
It is the year 2272 A.D.  
A computer continues to live on in order to complete a mission in a world where all life, including Mankind, has gone extinct. This is a record of those 27 million years of its heroic struggle.  
• *Present* (2006)  
Hanako suffers from a terrible disease. After awakening from a deep slumber, Hanako has only three days to live.   
• *Subete wa Maguro no Tame datta* (It Was All for the Tuna) (2008)  
Tuna have become extinct and Jun Shiozaki will do everything possible and imaginable to bring them back.  
• *Stephanos* (2007 Mandala Vol. 1)  
Set in modern-day Japan, our main character Noriko finds out that she is pregnant with her lover Matsumura’s baby. He, however, is an important doctor with a family and everything already. Noriko wants to have the baby, but Matsumura says that it’s actually a rapidly growing cancer and that they have to remove it immediately. It might also be neither of these things…  
• *Diadem* (2008 Mandala Vol. 2)  
A "Diadem" is a word for 'crown' that has its root in Greek. "Stephanos", which appeared in "Mandala" 01, was also a 'crown'. It seems that we could consider this the second work in a continuing series of shorts that should perhaps be called a "Crown series".

Tossed around by desperation and confusion, can Tarou and Takahiro rebuild their once blissful relationship?

Asebi is a flower shop owner whose intimidating aura tends to scare his customers away. One day, a girl being chased suddenly rushes into his shop. He soon learns that she’s the daughter of the strongest dragon in the world. When soldiers come to capture her, Asebi easily drives them off. But this quiet florist has secrets of his own… and the girl isn’t the only one hiding a mysterious power.
And so begins the journey of an unlikely duo, the flower seller and the dragon girl, as they travel the world together to gather the scattered powers of dragons.

Bessho coincidentally meets Makita in a university lecture they share, finding out that they both like cute things. While Bessho hides his preferences like a dirty little secret, Makita makes no excuses for who he is and what he likes. Despite the twists and turns they encounter along the way, the pair of lovers deal with their possessive and jealous urges on their slow journey to answering the age-old question: what is the best way to fall in love?

Ally, a blind girl, begins walking the path toward becoming the kingdom’s first female physician after a fateful encounter with Darius, the kingdom’s top court doctor. The patient entrusted to Ally is young Prince El, a boy who has lost his voice and shut his heart to the world. Ally starts treating El with ideas no other doctor has ever considered. recommendations.title: Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori

seriesMetadata.description:
Mai Taniyama's school has an ancient, abandoned, and allegedly cursed building. Whenever it is about to be torn down, a series of unsettling deaths occur and halt the demolition. To prove it is haunted, Mai and her friends try to summon a specter by telling ghost stories. No ghosts appear, but the group encounters Kazuya Shibuya, a 17-year-old transfer student. Though her friends are charmed by Kazuya's attractive looks and great manners, Mai does not trust him.

Following a mishap, Mai discovers Kazuya's real identity as the president of Shibuya Psychic Research, a group hired by the school principal to investigate the building's rumored paranormal activity. As a consequence of her actions, Mai must temporarily help Kazuya if she does not want to pay him damages. Joined by other individuals experienced with the supernatural—former Buddhist monk Houshou Takigawa, self-proclaimed Shinto priestess Ayako Matsusaki, famous medium Masako Hara, and Catholic priest John Brown—Mai and Kazuya must uncover the mystery surrounding the building before any more innocent lives are lost.
