He struggles desperately to survive, and awakens a hidden power driven by memories of the hero who once saved him--the ability to design a labyrinth and turn it into a weapon against monsters. Yet monsters aren’t the only threat. Corruption runs deep in this society ruled by powerful and greedy hunters, and Yul must overcome a series of unexpected challenges to become the hero he set out to be.

Kujimaru Otori is a fairly successful 25 year old manga author who has fallen on hard times. His so called girlfriend Rika has milked him for 50 million yen before blocking his number, and has left his life in shambles. While resolving himself to try to win her back, a strange (and strangely dressed) foreign woman suddenly appears in Kujimaru's room, claiming to be the long deceased Queen of France, Marie Antoinette. Though understandably skeptical, the "Queen of the Guillotine" soon proves her identity true.

Thus, Kujimaru is roped into a once in a century supernatural tournament, where the "heroic" souls of history's most dangerous women form contracts with the living in order to battle it out for the opportunity to wish for anything their mortal hearts desire. A tournament called "Villainess Ranking"...

seriesMetadata.description:
"Welcome to the Restaurant of Revenge! What will you be ordering today?" On top of excruciating work and her boss, Mido, taking all her credit, designer Ayase is subjected to severe harassment in the workplace. In a last-ditch effort, she finds the courage to speak out to the company president, but a coworker betrays her, and the truth gets buried. Further targeted by lascivious harassment and escalating abuse that strips away her humanity, Ayase is utterly cornered, and even contemplating taking her own life. In the midst of her despair, a mysterious female chef guides her to the Restaurant of Revenge. Here, villains are treated as ingredients, and punishment is served without mercy. As the chef lures Ayase into a spectacular revenge plot, she is determined to transform her deep hatred into the ultimate spice.

Half a year has passed since Yurgenschmidt inaugurated its first underage aub. Hannelore, now an archduke candidate for the country’s top-ranked duchy, is in the midst of a crisis. Despite her natural indecisiveness, she finds herself pressed to choose from a growing list of marriage candidates. Her father suggests Kenntrips and Rasantark, her childhood friend,s but then her half-brother Raufereg throws his hat into the ring. And what about Wilfried, the apple of her eye? Convinced that Liebeskhilfe, the Goddess of Binding, is toying with the threads of her fate, Hannelore turns to her dear friend Rozemyne for guidance. In the debut volume of this battle fantasy, the divine avatar fights to settle an engagement! Features two original short stories and four-panel manga by You Shiina.

Weekend Betsuender:

A collection of 5 short stories: 

1. *Natsu no Kakera*  
When Miyuki goes off to the countryside to visit her grandfather in the hospital, she accidentally enters Madoka’s room instead. Although she finds him rude at first, they end up seeing each other every day and get closer. But, Miyuki only has a limited amount of time in the countryside. As the summer passes, how will things turn out for them?

2. *Yuki no Kakera*  
Aya usually has the library to herself after school - that is, until she witnesses an incident that leads to her discovery of Tono’s feelings for her fellow librarian, Konno. The three end up spending time together, and Aya finds it odd that she can’t stop watching them. As winter goes on, the snow falls and builds up like the fragments of Tono’s emotions - fragments that slowly find their way into Aya’s heart.

3. *Koi no Kakera*  
What was initially sheer admiration for the club president, Kondo, spurred Konno into joining the Home Economics Club. Little did she know that these feelings of admiration would eventually grow into something bigger and she decides to knit him a scarf as an expression for her feelings. However, life is hard when the target of her affections is the harshest handicraft critic around. Would a scarf knitted with the her fragments of her emotions be enough to convey her feelings?

4. *Harumichi Soushi*  
On the third anniversary of her author father's death, Hinata gets swept into a manuscript he left in his library-- literally!

5. *Akiiro Kimiiro*  
Kanako had always dreamed of falling in love; and when she finally does, things don’t exactly go according to plan. Ihara is cold, aloof and rude – but despite that, she is relentless and refuses to give up. Vibrantly coloured by all the moments they had together, it was the autumn their lives changed forever.

label: Dungeon ni Tojikomerarete 25-nen. Kyuushutsu sareta Toki ni wa Rippa na Fushinsha ni Natteita

seriesMetadata.description:
This suspicious person is about to become a legend." A young man, Nagano, vanished after challenging a dungeon that suddenly appeared in modern times. He survived for 25 years in its uncharted depths, eating ferocious monsters and gaining an incredibly powerful body. When he finally returns to the surface, he finds himself in a future Japan where dungeon streaming has been made mandatory. His rampage, which surpasses even disaster-class monsters, is immediately streamed, and he quickly joins the ranks of top explorers. Armed with 25 years of experience, Nagano rises to become a legend of this new era.

seriesMetadata.description:
From Baka-Tsuki:  
Chris was a boy who was cursed with the Brand of the Beast that devoured the fates of the surrounding people. His life changed when he met a girl when he was wandering a corpse-laden battlefield as a young mercenary. She, Minerva, appeared before his eyes waving a huge sword in clothes of pure white. With the power of foresight and overwhelming swordsmanship, she was a legendary swordswoman feared as a grim reaper. Smiling in slaughter and weeping in sleep, that was the heavy burden shouldered by the girl. That fateful night, Minerva's fate of being killed by Chris was distorted by the brand. The two souls destined to be in the company of death met in the depths of despair. In the symphony of blades and blood, the boy and girl's beautiful legend of sorrowful magnificence is born.

From Viz:  
Xin’s quest begins when his friend Piao, another war orphan who shares his dream of becoming a great general, is taken away by a mysterious minister to the capital, and Xin is left to work and train on his own. But one fateful night, Piao returns bloodied and on the brink of death, with his dying words being for Xin to carry on their dreams and meet a certain person in a nearby village. Xin rushes to fulfill Piao’s final request, only to meet a boy who looks exactly like Piao. But this is no ordinary boy. It’s the king of Qin, Ying Zheng! And assassins are hot on his tail!

seriesMetadata.description:
My reincarnation destination is the villain princess who becomes obsessed with the “King‑Wolf Hero” and gets killed!? Luna, the youngest princess of a small kingdom, realizes she is now living inside a novel she read in her previous life. In that story, Rudolf, the King‑Wolf Hero, is a crown prince who cannot find his fated mate, and the only way to stop his rampage is through love—yet the “true heroine” who should fill that role dies, and princesses are murdered again and again. Fated to be hated by Rudolf, Luna is ordered by him to “act as a fake mate”… only to find herself loved to the point of drowning in his affection. Can a pretend bond overturn a doomed fate and rewrite the story meant for the true mate?

Trapped in a cycle of violence, his only solace is Dr. Oh, the mysterious ringside doctor who watches over him. But when Mignon witnesses the doctor’s bloodthirsty secret, instead of running, he offers himself up completely. As their dark bond deepens, Mignon dangerous reality threatens to drag them both into hell. *(Source: Lezhin US)*

“Sotel, the healer. By order of the Demon King, I take your life.” After decades as an F-class healer, Sotel continued to fight to save others, even as he was used up by his comrades. However, when he was attacked by the “Demons,” his miserable life finally came to an end – or so it seemed. When he opened his eyes, he found himself reincarnated in the body of a young man he didn’t know. This time, he will finally seize all of his unfulfilled dreams, freedom, and comrades. A classic redo fantasy in which an oppressed healer’s comeback begins!

Logan MacLine, a middle-aged knight fighting for the independence army, is intent on getting revenge against the empire which took over the kingdom and executed his brother when he ends up dying in battle. But when he wakes, he is a young man again, and has yet to be disowned for his terrible behavior. Using his experience and knowledge from his past life, Logan recruits a few talented individuals to develop new weapons, build an army, and make enough money to fund it all. But will he be able to make amends with his family and stop the empire's march?

seriesMetadata.description:
From J-Novel CLub:  
After hitting her head particularly hard one day, Duke Claes' daughter, Katarina, suddenly recalls all the memories of her past life: that of a teenage Japanese girl. Just before her untimely death, this girl recalls playing an otome game. That is exactly like the world she's living in now. She is now Katarina Claes, the antagonist of the otome game, who nastily hounded the protagonist until the end. Knowing all the possible outcomes of the game, she realizes that every single possible route ends with Katarina being murdered or exiled.   
In order to avoid these Catastrophic Bad Ends, she has to use her knowledge of the game and her own wiles, starting with breaking off this engagement with the prince. Will Katarina survive while making her way through this world, where bad flags trip at every turn? Find out in this reverse-harem rom-com, led by everybody's favorite villainess.

Dahlia had an ecstatic, once-in-a-lifetime experience on her wedding night. As she longed for that moment to happen again, her married life went on in a dull and painfully monotonous way, until she witnessed her husband’s infidelity. One night, while drunk, her husband slipped on the rooftop and died. At her husband’s funeral, Dahlia suddenly finds herself unjustly accused of murdering him. Then Sebastian, her husband’s identical twin brother, appears before her. Sebastian offers to help her avoid the royal guard’s infamous interrogation, on the condition that she bear his child. When she refuses, he reveals a shocking truth. “Dahlia, do you really believe the man who spent your wedding night with you was Calix?” The truth is, the one who shared that intoxicating wedding night with Dahlia was not her husband, but her brother-in-law.

label: I Became a Genius at the Academy in a World Where Magic Reigns Supreme

seriesMetadata.description:
Shuichi was born in modern society as an ordinary high school student. After losing his father, he struggled desperately to protect his mother and sister, but was brutally bullied at school and even lost his life in an unexpected accident. However, when he woke up, he found himself reborn as Lucas Ryan, a noble boy from another world! It seems that Lucas once incurred the wrath of the magic god and died without being granted magic. Shuichi's soul resides in Lucas's body, and at the same time, he receives the blessing of Mars, the god of war! However, in this world, magicians are revered and martial artists are looked down upon. Reborn as Lucas, he would rather not live a life of despise by those around him—that's the last thing he wanted! Shuichi will master martial arts as Lucas and seize glory with his fists.

Unfortunately they're a group of failures nicknamed "Small Fry Platoon", a platoon formed from bunch of self-centered people who can't cooperate and have personality problems. Will they manage to overcome their weaknesses and shine as the strongest platoon?

seriesMetadata.description:
Ye Fan, the Supreme Immortal Venerable of the immortal realm, unexpectedly falls and is reborn in the modern world. Though his cultivation has been completely lost, he retains a thousand years of memories.

Using techniques from his previous life, he re-embarks on the immortal path:     
He refines Spirit Pills to cure the Han Family’s flame poison.    
Creates protective talismans for the Mu Family’s young lady.    
Gathers spiritual veins and slays demon beasts.    
Obtains Foundation Establishment inheritance in the Hengshui Mountain valley.    

Rising from an abandoned nobody to a regional overlord, Ye Fan returns to the modern city with the bearing of an Immortal Venerable. Mortal schemes and power plays are suppressed with a flip of his hand; immortal cultivation enemies are annihilated with a snap of his fingers.

In this world, only he reigns supreme.

Isaku Honjō is a cold-hearted prosecutor who will fabricate evidence if that is what it takes to see criminals punished.

One day, he dies in an unexpected accident together with his wife and daughter and falls into Hell. There, a “Millennial Festival” held by demons is underway. The demon Bune singles Isaku out as a candidate to serve as his “devil’s proxy” and offers him a contract: if he participates in the festival and obtains the legendary Ring of Solomon, any wish will be granted—he and even his family can be brought back to life.

Forming the contract, Isaku throws himself into the Millennial Festival as Bune’s agent, wielding the sword of judgment against demons themselves. Will he succeed in claiming the Ring of Solomon?

A top-tier dark fantasy about a star prosecutor who now passes sentence on devils in the depths of Hell.

Tsukimi Kurashita has a strange fascination with jellyfish. She’s loved them from a young age and has carried that love with her to her new life in the big city of Tokyo. There, she resides in Amamizukan, a safe haven for girl geeks who regularly gush over a range of things from trains to Japanese dolls. However, a chance meeting at a pet shop has Tsukimi crossing paths with one of the things that the residents of Amamizukan have been desperately trying to avoid a beautiful and fashionable woman! But there’s much more to this woman than her trendy clothes! This odd encounter is only the beginning of a new and unexpected path for Tsukimi and her friends.

seriesMetadata.description:
After three long years of endurance, I’ll finally divorce you—

Asha has endured endless cold treatment and scorn from her husband, Rejes, who treats her like nothing more than a servant.
One day, she discovers a mysterious book containing a message written in Japanese, awakening memories of her previous life.
This world, she realizes, is the setting of the novel Forbidden Love that she once read, a story about the “fated romance” between the Queen and Rejes.
If the story follows its course, Asha will be consumed by jealousy, attempt to assassinate the Queen, and be executed as a villainess.

There’s no way she’s letting herself die as a disposable pawn in someone else’s love story!
Determined to defy fate and rewrite the narrative, Asha begins her quiet resistance, planning her counterattack for three years later—when all the conditions will finally be in her favor.

Thus begins a thrilling tale of revenge and rebirth, where past and present lives intertwine, and one woman takes destiny into her own hands. 

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/346938/

Theo Ragnar, the 31st son of the mighty Grand Duke of Ragnar, was born without the legendary Ragnar Gift—a fatal flaw in a family where might is right. Labeled the “Ragnar Defect,” he and his mother were betrayed, meeting a brutal end at the hands of those they trusted. 

But death was only the beginning. 

Reborn at 17, Theo awakens not only with the Ragnar Gift, but with powers far beyond imagination. Fueled by vengeance and a second chance, he sets out to claim the glory he was once denied.

seriesMetadata.description:
“Is this your first time with a woman?”     

“No… I mean yes… Farming keeps me really busy…”     

Jaei is a five-year editor at ZQ, a magazine at the cutting edge of fashion trends. She is utterly exhausted by her trashy situationship and the dull, monotonous life in Seoul. So, after impulsively leaving for Gangwon Province, she happens to meet Chunhyuk, a farmer who owns a peach orchard of over 1.65 hectares and has celebrity-level looks. 

There, Jaei begins to discover what true sweetness really means…

**Original Webtoon:**

A man who has never experienced the warmth of affection finds himself consumed by an obsession with a user named “Cocorose” in an anonymous group chat. To a man whose existence in a cramped gosiwon is already hanging by a thread, a single emoticon was enough to stroke his vanity, and a solitary delusion was enough to shatter his reality. The moment he misinterpreted an anonymous woman’s message as a sign of love, his bottom-tier youth began its descent into total catastrophe. Now, he is trapped in a collision between the woman from his daily life and the one from the digital shadows. It wasn’t truly love he was seeking, but a sense of salvation. This is the chronicle of a “trash-tier” romance, ignited by the desperate fantasies of a man with nothing left to lose.

label: Caste Saikai Danshi no Isekai Gekokujou

seriesMetadata.description: Ayumu Tachibana was constantly bullied and mocked by the girls in his class, sinking to the very bottom of the social caste. One day, he is suddenly summoned to another world. But the world he arrives in is one where women are favored and men are treated as inferior. Forced into harsh underground labor, Ayumu reaches his breaking point and in that moment, the forbidden skill sleeping inside him awakens: Dominator's Eye, Herrschaft. After rebelling against those who oppressed him and seizing his first victory, Ayumu meets Eir, the Eighth Princess. Together with her, he begins his rise from the very bottom to change the world.

seriesMetadata.description: Due to a mistake by a goddess, the overly kindhearted office worker Fuyuya Satori meets an untimely end. As an apology, he’s granted an appraisal-type skill and reborn in another world as a ten-year-old boy named Toya. But with almost zero knowledge of fantasy worlds, Toya’s second life seems off to a shaky start… Yet his gentle, polite nature soon draws the attention of skilled adventurers, merchants, and guild members alike. What’s more, the “apology skill” he received turns out to be an infinitely evolving, overpowered gift! A story of a pure-hearted yet secretly cheat-powered boy finding warmth, bonds, and adventure in another world— the heartwarming fantasy now brought to life in manga form!

Jasper was entrusted with the care of Mana, the daughter of his mentor and closest friend, Melias, who had gone missing. However, he quickly ran into a major obstacle: "food." Mana, heartbroken and withdrawn, refused to eat, so Jasper decided to try cooking for himself for the first time in his life. With clumsy hands, he gripped the knife, and through cooking, he wove together memories of the past and the future that the two would walk together. This is a story of remembrance and rebirth, where cooking connects everyone's hearts.

Veteran actor Cha Jae-hwan has built his career on discipline and perfection. So when a close director friend asks him to star in the historical film Jahwa, he expects a challenge, but not this one.

At the first script reading, Jae-hwan meets his co-star, Shin Seong-hyeon, a rookie actor with raw potential but zero polish. His delivery is flat, his timing off, and his presence all over the place. For someone like Jae-hwan, who breathes precision, it’s unbearable.

Yet instead of walking away, he finds himself guiding Seong-hyeon, patiently at first, then with a curiosity he can’t quite name.

*“Shin Seong-hyeon is an invasive species,”* the director jokes. *“You can’t control him. You just have to let him adapt.”*

But as rehearsals blur into something far more intimate, Jae-hwan begins to wonder who’s really changing whom…
The performance, it turns out, isn’t just on camera.

---

Konta, once a promising swimmer, saved a young girl from drowning in the sea. Though she survived, she fell into a coma. Consumed by guilt, Konta abandoned the sport entirely.

Five years later, he has become a recluse — a shadow of his former self. Worried for his future, his older sister invites him to coach the powerhouse swimming team at Shikinomori High School. Reluctantly, he headed to the pool — and there he met the very girl he had saved many years ago...

seriesMetadata.description:
The strongest in the martial world, leader of the Hojeongdan, Lee Hwan! During a mission, he battles the Heavenly Demon of the Demonic Sect, Deung Gwang-cheon, and loses consciousness… 

When he opens his eyes, he’s at home? No… This is my childhood home? It’s hard to believe, but if I really have returned to the past, this time I won’t just stand by and do nothing! 

On the night of August 8th, when he was 17 years old, a sudden, splitting headache strikes, and something comes to mind. 

“Cheonsu Ilgi Hap (Thousand Hands One Energy Unification), Deukwon Gang (Obtain Original Strength)…” He muttered absentmindedly and then paused. “Wait, this is the Absolute Demonic Art of the Heavenly Demon! How do I know this technique? Am I going crazy?!”

seriesMetadata.description:
Olivia was born as the only daughter of a ducal house renowned for possessing the greatest magical power in the kingdom. However, unlike her father, she possessed almost no magic of her own and took after her mother instead.

Because of this, her father would not even spare her a glance, and her mother, perhaps out of guilt, put Olivia through a harsh education from an early age. Even so, Olivia remained pure-hearted and cheerful, never allowing her smile to fade.

Neglected by her father and pushed to her limits by her mother, Olivia placed all her hopes on her sixth birthday. But when the long-awaited day of her celebration finally arrived, her father didn’t even bother to show up.

It was then that she overheard the servants whispering the reason for his coldness was simply that she had almost no magical power…

Ilegenes is an island internationally known for its prowess in genetic engineering research and technology. But behind the scenes, it is a breeding ground for illegal clones, which are sold for major profits in the black market. After witnessing the death of his parents, young Fon F Littenber joins the Ilegenes Military Academy to rid the island of both its connection to the black market and its tainted name: The Genetic Sodom.

The city is plagued with strange accidents, and somehow, pets from that shop always seem to be involved. Detective Leon Orcot is determined to pin the blame on Count D, the shop’s caretaker. The witch Lisa lives quietly in the mountains with her apprentice, until one day she is suddenly branded an “evil witch” for a crime she never committed. Having realized that dying while avoiding people was unbearably lonely, Lisa decides to enjoy this second life to the fullest. She meets the knight Orlando, and the two gradually grow closer. However, Orlando is a descendant of the Ende family, the very house that once attacked Lisa, and he bears the “fate of slaying witches.” Lisa wants to hide the fact that she is his destined target, but then a mysterious man who knows her past appears and everything changes.

seriesMetadata.description:
“Why? Do you want to kiss me?” 

Sol nodded, unable to take her eyes off his deep pupils, which seemed to draw people in. For some reason, she became endlessly honest in front of him. Maybe it was because she felt that, until she made all three wishes, he would be completely on her side. A faint dimple appeared on Jinhwi’s cheek as he stretched his lips into a straight line. 

Was it just her imagination that he looked nervous? 

“As long as we don’t go all the way, kissing is fine.” 

He whispered in a gentle voice as he brushed Sol’s hair aside with his hand. Did saying kissing was fine mean that if they went all the way, it would count as the third wish? 

“Then what exactly counts as ‘going all the way’?”

Unpredictable! What will be the ending of this heart-pounding feeling?

When she gets a “hunch,” she’s right 100% of the time!

Boyoung, known as the “master of hunches,” is a couple manager who ranks first in matching success thanks to her almost supernatural sixth sense.

But, as the saying goes, “a monk can’t shave his own head.” Her own love life fails again and again. On top of that, because those hunches come to her anytime and anywhere, people often treat her like a strange person. That is why her first meeting with Eungi was, in short, a complete disaster.

A handsome face, but a personality that doesn’t match.

Eungi, famous as a divorce lawyer, does not believe in love, which he considers nothing more than an empty emotion, after witnessing the unhappy end of his parents’ marriage during his childhood.

Then, while handling a divorce case, Eungi is attacked by a stranger and loses his memory. When he sees Boyoung, who comes to visit him at the hospital, his heart begins to race like crazy.

When his memories suddenly return upon seeing her, Eungi starts looking for her every day, using his memory as an excuse. However, at the same time, he hurls cruel words at her, saying that “once he regains his memory, this heart-pounding feeling will disappear too”...

What will be the ending of this romance that began by chance?

**One man answers a want ad for a part-time job and winds up in a world of dreams—literally! A dreamy supernatural comic about a charming himbo and his moody but cute boss.**

When 24-year-old Jungoh answers an ad seeking an assistant for a shaman, he expects a straightforward part-time gig. The ad called for someone strong, patient, and quick on their feet—perfect for Jungoh. But when he arrives, he’s thrust into a bizarre world where the rules are anything but ordinary.

His boss, Shin Ibeom, is a grumpy yet undeniably cute shaman, cursed with uncontrollable arousal due to a nightmare seedling. As Ibeom’s assistant, Jungoh must help him navigate this strange situation while working inside people’s dreams. But the deeper they dive into the dream world, the more bizarre and unpredictable things become—especially as Jungoh finds himself battling a growing attraction to his mysterious boss.

What started as a simple job quickly turns into something far stranger, as Jungoh navigates both the surreal dream realm and the complexities of Ibeom’s heart!

*Source: Seven Seas Entertainment, Vol. 1*

Eros becomes curious to see if the power of the golden arrow will affect him as well.

From Viz:  
Shirayuki is famous for her naturally bright-red hair, and the prince of Tanbarun wants her all to himself. But when she escapes into the woods of the neighboring kingdom, a young man named Zen and his two friends come to her aid. But who is Zen really? 

Vol 1 includes *Hachigatsu no Shikisa* (Four-season Colour of August):  
Sakinomiya Hazuki decides to go the beach before she moves to a new home, and along the way, she catches and hat that flew by. She almost falls when a boy helps her. He introduces himself as Komatsu Yuuto, but the little kids, Haruki (Spring) and Fuyumi (Winter) call him Natsu-neechan (Summer) because he comes to play with them in the summer. She introduces herself, but the boy gives her the nickname , Aki (Autumn), because her original name was too long. They play together throughout the summer, but will they want to split up when it’s over?

Vol 2 includes *Bokura o Tsunaide* (Bind Us):  
Toshiya has died and now has permission to go back to Earth to check on things. He finds that his best friends are the same as they always were- in love, but afraid to get together because it might break up the friendship that the two of them and Toshiya had. Toshiya is depressed when he sees this, and hopes that his friends will move on and live in happiness.

Vol 14 includes *Natsu Yasumi Zero Zero Nichime* (00 Days of Summer Vacation).

seriesMetadata.description: “In a world where someone like you is at the bottom, your thesis isn’t even worth reading.” In a society where the strength of your innate skill alone decides everything, Kazuki Shindō, who possesses only the weakest skill, falls with no chance to turn things around and ends up living in an alleyway. He believes the world would change if only his research were recognized—but that hope is crushed when he dies in a back alley before achieving anything. When he next comes to, he has regressed seventy years, back to his student days, still retaining all the knowledge and techniques of “Tuning,” the life’s work of his research. “With this… I can change everything.” From that day on, his life—and the world around him—are completely transformed. Branded trash who can only use the weakest skill, he smashes those scornful expectations with sheer ability and claws his way up through the ranks of an academy where talent is everything.

“My destiny… I’ll never let you go again—”

Bianca carries memories of her previous life, in which she was murdered by the husband she had entered a political marriage with.

Determined to have an ordinary marriage in this life, she looks forward to a fresh start.

However, by pure chance, she reunites with Nero, the prince of a neighboring kingdom—who turns out to be the reincarnation of her former husband.

Traumatized by the memory of being killed, Bianca desperately tries to avoid him.

But for some reason, Nero passionately confesses:

“I love you. This time, die together with me.”

…and even proposes to her?!

A turbulent reincarnation romance featuring a yandere prince who offers endless devotion and a count’s daughter trying to escape the obsessive love that has followed her across lifetimes!

categories.name: Male Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description:
Shin Geurim, an extramarital child of a huge corporation and a stage director by profession, wakes up one day inside a web novel. She has possessed the body of Luiza Messena, a villainess who obsessively collects beautiful things and is so consumed by beauty that she ends up executed. Even though she’s now in the body of a villainess whose ending is death, there’s only one thing she can truly do inside that body: 

“I’ll put on a play.” 

In her world, there’s nothing but directing, actors, the stage, and the audience. There’s the cheeky slave actor who says, 

“Didn’t you buy me because you wanted to have me? You don’t need excuses like ‘actress’ or ‘actor’—I already belong to you. So you can kiss me however you want.” 

And the fiancé who tells her, “You really are someone who can’t love anything except the stage. In that case, use me as you please.” …but Geurim sets them both aside.

Euna Chae, the youngest granddaughter of a powerful rich family, has it all. Beauty, brains, and wealth. But just as she becomes an adult and expects her future to finally blossom, she's told to get married?! Losing control of her credit card and having to get married is bad enough, but why does her fiancé have to be her sworn-enemy ex-boyfriend?! To protect her marriage (but really her credit card), a secret newlywed life begins at school!

From 1st Chapter:

The lead character is a naive boy who's fallen in love with an older girl who everyone considers a genius writer. He's so in love in fact, that he has forgotten for the last 2 months about his secret hobby. For the past 10 years he has been writing the "character profile" of a single girl. Her birth date, personality, hobbies, conversations, etc.... is all recorded in a large pile of notebooks. All this time this fictional girl has been his friend and lover, but now that he is in love with a real girl he decided to throw them all away. 

In order to "purify" the notebooks, he decided to burn them at a nearby shrine. To his surprise, the senpai he's in love with was also there. It starts to rain and as they talk the girl confesses she's having trouble writing her novel due to inexperience. As the storm gets even stronger, the lead character believes that since she confessed her "weakness" to him it is OK for him to show her his own "secret". Filled with courage, the boy opens the bag where he brought all the notebooks... except that instead of notebooks, the bag now contains the girl (naked of course) he's been creating for the past 10 years!!

seriesMetadata.description: A man realized that he had been reincarnated as the extreme masochist (Do-M) villain Wraith Validoor from the Game "Holy Orb Fantasy" he used to Play in his previous life──In order to resist his own ruinous End, he resolves to begin training in magic and swordsmanship. Ever since then, starting with the Main Heroine who is destined to defeat him, the Heroines appearing in the Game begin to show up one after another before Wraith. ……But something about them has changed from the time in the Game!?

label: This Is What Revenge Looks Like

seriesMetadata.description:
Grace, a girl who lost her parents and even had her family house taken from her. For thirteen years, the only thing she held in her heart was revenge. 

And Ares, a man who lost everything to the very same enemy. 

For the sake of revenge, Grace proposes a fake relationship to him, and the two enter into a cold, calculated contract. However, emotions that take root within the flames of revenge slowly spread into love, and they begin to fear that those feelings may become an obstacle to their revenge… 

...........................................

Standing between revenge and love, what choice will the two of them make as they race toward the end?
A girl who lost her parents and her house spends thirteen years holding onto one goal: revenge. 

A man ruined by the same enemy crosses her path. She proposes a fake relationship and they sign a cold contract. As their plan advances, real feelings take root and begin to threaten the mission. 

Between revenge and love, they have to choose how it ends.

I should have been an ordinary working adult, but somehow I ended up as a little girl who had been abused by her stepmother and was on the brink of death from weakness. It seems this is the world of a novel, and I’ve been reincarnated as Lilia, the “villainess who is condemned for a crime she didn’t commit.”\r\n\r\nBut now that I’ve regained the memories of my past life, there’s no way I’ll let things go as written. As a first step, I escaped from the room where I was being confined and sought help from this world’s final boss, Queen Hilbert… only for the outcome to be completely unexpected—!?

Yubi leads the action-packed life of a legendary martial artist on the hunt for her father’s killer. Shinwoo is the aloof teen heartthrob with a heart of gold who’s searching for his leading lady. As heroes of their own respective genres, their destinies are seemingly set in stone. But when their worlds collide in a miraculous twist of fate, the two team up to stray from the paths originally laid out for them. Now, they’ll have to mix tropes of both the action and romance genres to battle assassins, terminal illnesses, and unnecessary love triangles. As they enter each other’s worlds and come to understand the struggles of one another, will these lost protagonists be able to overcome the odds and make it to their happily ever after?

The kingdom’s strongest knight, Aldia, was the central figure in ending the war between the Kingdom of Leshfeld and the Vulcan Empire. However, when Aldia woke up, he found himself in a world six years before the war broke out! Determined to save Valtrune’s life, which he could not do before, Aldia decides to pledge loyalty to the Princess as a knight of the Vulcan Empire in his second life and change the world!

This is a regression story of a once-executed knight who returns to be the strongest again!!

But his soul does not fade, instead, he is reincarnated as Liese, the villainess of an otome game. Protagonist gets a job at an important company – purely by mistake.  Unqualified, but unwilling to admit they made a mistake, they tell him instead to go help out the women...

The world I've transmigrated to is teeming with players, making survival difficult enough, but I'm further burdened by a system, becoming the most conspicuous NPC... The natives dislike me, and the players see me as a thorn in their side. Since I can't coexist peacefully with you all, then I'll—stop pretending, I'm laying my cards on the table! A wonderful life in this other world? Mine! Endless suffering? Yours! The sorrow is for the players, the rewards are for myself. The boss you can never defeat is me!

[Original Webtoon](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/657316)

This manga follows the adventures of a group of mercenaries: the barbarian Mocha (the main character), the rogue Buruman, and the mage Kiliman (Blue Mountain and Killie Mountain, respectively, are famous coffee brands in Japan). 

Mocha and her gang belong to a dark mercenary guild. Mocha, being a barbarian, has great physical strength and, of course, she has no brain. Despite her very revealing suit, she is very innocent, pure and naive. The story starts when a light master seeks to hire some mercenaries, and the guild refuses to help him since he has no money with him. So the dark guild master sends Mocha, Buruman, and Kiliman to aid him. It's really not a great start but this is how everything begins.

The author's drawing dramatically improves after volume 5. The plot becomes much more refined as well. It can be considered a typical adventure story. However, this manga goes a little deeper than that.

After volume 10 or so, the plot becomes really profound and deep. Dragons are involved, and whole nations go to war. The scale becomes quite large. Really enjoyable manga.

In Teirin High School, you are either part of a gang or an elite sports player. Sousuke Youki, called 'the predator,' is an undefeated master at fighting. One morning, as he finishes up a fight, Kazumi, a prodigy amateur golf player, took a look at Sousuke, ignored him, and walked right by. Infuriated, Sousuke sets out to get revenge on Kazumi for dissing him but Sousuke's revenge takes a detour as he gets himself involved in playing golf by the thuggish golf coach. Will this delinquent break legends and become "the King of Golf"?

King Golf also won the 56th Shogakukan Manga Award in January 2011 in the boys category.

label: For Some Reason, the School's Madonna Keeps Asking About My Weekend Plans

seriesMetadata.description:
Aikawa Ryouichi is an ordinary high school boy with one overwhelming obsession about fishing. One day at the beach, he happens to rescue the school’s beloved “Madonna,” Watanabe Misa, from a group of persistent pick-up artists.

Ever since then, for some reason, Watanabe-san keeps asking about his weekend plans, and before he knows it, Ryouichi finds himself roped into regular “dates.”

“Love you!”
Huh…? Does Watanabe-san love fishing too?

“I want a kiss…”
Oh! You mean kisu (Japanese Sillago) tempura? Ok, let’s make some!

Meeting in secret every weekend, the two slowly… painfully slowly, begin to close the distance between them, thanks to Ryouichi’s rock-solid density and Misa’s straightforward all-out advances…?

A frustratingly sweet seaside rom-com featuring a single-minded, full-offense high school girl and a hopelessly dense, brick-wall boy whose feelings just can’t seem to line up!

Hajun absolutely detests cults. This is because his grandmother, his only guardian, squandered her fortune on a cult before passing away. Hajun, who lived day by day doing grueling manual labor to make ends meet, encounters a child wandering the streets barefoot one winter. Unable to leave the child alone in the cold, he takes him in; the child turns out to be the god of the cult that drove his family to ruin. The god pushes Hajun to the limit, and he sets out to find a way to kill him. However, the god occasionally reveals an inexplicable emotion to him... What kind of connection did the two share?

label: Kimi wa Midara na Boku no Joou

seriesMetadata.description:
From MangaHelpers:  
When the two were still young, Saito and Kawana Subaru were close friends. But with Subaru coming from a wealthy family, she was sent to the top school while Saito had to settle for a regular education.

But after painfully studying for years, he was finally accepted as a high school freshman through a scholarship program that only a handful of students are awarded. But what Saito thought was going to be a heartwarming reunion turned out horrible. Subaru had grown up beautiful and was the most popular person in school as she was kind to everyone, all except towards Saito who she seemed to despise.

Almost regretting his decision to come to the school, Saito wishes that somehow their dorm rooms would connect to each other. Magically, because it turns out that Subaru wished the same thing, their wish comes true but, in return, Subaru loses her self-control for one hour per day. During that time, her erotic desire for Saito, that she can normally hide, comes pouring out and her true intentions are revealed.

He wants to take advantage of this once in a lifetime chance but doing so might jeopardize their relationship during the other 23 hours.

label: Onani Master Kurosawa: after the juvenile (Novel)

seriesMetadata.description:
Two years after his memorable school trip, Kakeru Kurosawa decides to visit Osaka once again with his former companions. Among this crew are the often-bullied Pizza-tan, the cheerful otaku Keiji Nagaoka, the energetic bookworm Magister Takigawa, and the timid Aya Kitahara—the main source of Kurosawa's troubles during their time in school.

The trip is off to a rocky start as Kurosawa is berated by his girlfriend for not inviting her along with the group. Coupled with drama between Keiji and Takigawa and a tense ferris wheel ride shared by Kitahara and Pizza-tan, the gathering quickly becomes more and more uneasy. Though these longtime friends reunited to rekindle their old bonds, the strains in their relationship threaten to end their meeting in total disaster.

label: Men and Women Under the Influence

seriesMetadata.description:
After a long struggle, Jihoon, an ordinary 29-year-old man, finally lands a job at a liquor company. He dreams of a happy future with his girlfriend Yejin, who has faithfully stayed by his side for six years. A college student finds herself resurrected as Eumiella, an evil daughter of the nobility in the world of an Otome RPG that she played in her previous life. In the RPG, Eumiella isn’t worth thinking about at first, but in the endgame content, she returns as a hidden boss, complete with ridiculous stats that put her on par with even the game’s heroes.  
After being essentially abandoned by her parents at their family domain, the flames of Eumiella’s former gamer soul are ignited, and she takes to leveling, and leveling, and leveling, until at the time of enrolling in the Royal Academy, she discovers that she is level 99. Though she’d originally planned to live a peaceful and discreet life, the game’s heroine and her love interests suspect that Eumiella is the infamous Demon Lord. These ridiculous powers invite all manner of trials and tribulations. So begins the fantasy tale of a most powerful, evil hidden boss (who wishes she could just live a life of peace).

seriesMetadata.description:
"Try! Try! Try!" is a brief manga series created by Kiyohiko Azuma around the time he was working on "Azumanga Daioh", circa. 1999-2001. It is a protoype version of his later series "Yotsuba&!".

Pages of Try! Try! Try! were originally published on his personal website, "A-ZONE", and the website of the studio of Hideki Satomi, "TRIATHLON". He would later go on to create "YOTUBA SUTAZIO" with Satomi, which currently handles the production of Azumanga Daioh and Yotsuba&!.

In July 2001, Pioneer released a book entitled Azumanga Two (あずまんが 2 あずまきよひこ作品集), featuring a comic by Azuma Kiyohiko. Along with the book came bundled two small, one-episode comics (Wallaby and Try! Try! Try!), and a bonus CD.

Try! Try! Try! encompasses three comics. The first and longest – "Summer Vacation 1/40" – is about Yotsuba playing with a variety of characters over summer vacation. Also included are two web manga originally distributed on CD-ROMs: the first of these – "Ena-chan's Mishap"– features Ena finding a hamster, and the second – "Fractional Episode" is about Yotsuba painting the walls outside peoples' houses in a 4-koma style.

Only chapter 2 and 3 are in full color, Summer Episode is in BW.

Chapter list:
1. Summer Vacation 1/40 (Special episode)
2. Ena-chan's Mishap (Episode minus 1)
3. Fractional Episode

A collection of oneshots.

Main story: Love Progression of an Honours Student.

Yukio is a cold girl with a poker face, not to mention cute. She works like the president of student council with the two most popular guys on school. But under all that seriousness, her throbbing heart is desperate to be loved by someone. 

Even so, why cant she tell him?

+ Love Progression of an Honour Student extra

label: Looking for the Villainess's Contract Husband

seriesMetadata.description:
One day, while suffering from a fever, I realized that I had been reincarnated as the daughter of the villainess in a novel.

Thanks to recalling the original story, I became aware of the future, but it wasn’t exactly hopeful.
My mother, the villainess, would be used by others until her death, and I was destined to die from an incurable illness.

Still, there was one good thing.

Though there was no way for me to survive, I could save my poor mother.

Mom, you’ll live. Instead of me, live happily.

To save my mother, I went to find the duke who was a supporting character in the original story.

So please propose to my mother, Your Grace.

Knowing the original story, I made a deal with him, and in return, the duke rescued my mother and me from the clutches of my cruel maternal grandfather.

After successfully completing the contract, I intended to quietly face my death in a place where no one knew me…

Libby, I think I’m feeling a bit unwell. Could you stay by my side?

…Wait, why is this sickly-looking young man holding on to me? But seriously, is he really sick? Something seems off.

So one day, she asks the store owner to marry her on a whim, and to her surprise, he agrees?

seriesMetadata.description:
Lucella, who lost her only sibling, her sister, was now raising her sister’s son, Lucian, on her own. One day, she realizes that this world was actually inside a book, and Lucian was destined to become a villain in the future. Worse, he will be a terrible villain who torments the protagonist and gets brutally killed! 

“I can’t let my precious nephew die!” 

To keep her promise to her sister and to save the nephew she loves, she decides to raise Lucian to be a good person instead of a villain. But then… 

“Auntie, I want you to marry the Marquis.”  As if raising him properly wasn’t hard enough, now he’s saying weird things! 

“My uncle might not be the best husband material, but… at least he looks decent.”  Even the original story’s heroine was seriously trying to set up a matchmaking meeting. 

“I agree with that opinion.”  And her uncle just nods along like it makes sense. 

“Sorry, but I won’t think about marriage until I raise Lucian properly.” 

“So, you mean… as long as Lucian is raised well, it’s okay?” 

“Th-That’s not what I—” 

“I understand.” 

Why is everyone looking so excited?!

**In this charming tale, a woman gets transported to a fantasy world and pursues her own quest: opening a book café!**

Tsukina is a single, thirty-something office worker whose favorite thing is curling up with a good book. When a god tells her that she must go to another world to become its magical savior, Tsukina isn’t interested. She has zero desire to go on some grand hero’s journey. So when she arrives in this strange new land, she decides to use her magical powers to create a cozy little book café instead. Her first customer is a handsome soldier who loves reading almost as much as she does. But when a fellow “savior” starts causing trouble, Tsukina might have to play the hero after all!

*Source: Seven Seas Entertainment, Vol. 1*

[Original Manga](https://urasunday.com/title/834/84216)

categories.name: Male Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description:
Mashiro Ichijou, an attractive and popular high school student, has always lived his life as a boy. However, nobody notices that deep down, he resents the fact that his body is half female. He has decided to conceal his femininity from those around him, while in reality, he is insecure about who he is supposed to be.

One day, an unfamiliar nurse asks Mashiro to follow her to the school's infirmary in the basement—an office that has never existed until now. Little does he realize that the moment he steps into the mysterious room, he will never be capable of returning to being the person he was before.

As he struggles to find his true identity, Mashiro must face the disquiet in his own heart, all while protecting himself from the prying eyes of his classmates. Slowly but steadily, the unbecoming truth of the world is laid bare: all its lies and deceit engulfed in nightmares that only unfold in broad daylight.

During the great pandemic, my gym went under. While desperately trying to make ends meet, I possessed a character in Murim. I was excited to see that I was in the Shaolin Temple, but what the hell? Everyone's bodies are wrecked from working out the wrong way! How can I just sit back and watch when I used to be a personal trainer?! I'll teach you the correct, modern exercise methods and heal you all with low-frequency treatment and infrared therapy using inner energy! X Days until the Shaolin Gym opens.

The dark blade Gruhorn, constant companion to heroes throughout the ages. Knights, rebels, and slayers—all became legend wielding this sentient blade. But, centuries after being claimed by the first hero, Gruhorn winds up in the clutches of his descendant: a greedy, greasy, bratty lout of a first prince. From Tokyopop:  
Class rivals June and Lucia vie for the honor of being named the Queen of Light, entrusted with protecting the people from the King of Darkness. June is an attractive girl whose feisty, hot temper and general laziness may prevent her from receiving the crown. Lucia has a more regal quality and a strong desire to match, but she is always overshadowed by June. Will petty jealousies, love triangles, and one cute boy interfere with the Queen's royal duty?!

From Yen Press:  
Seventeen years ago, Takafumi’s uncle fell into a coma but now he’s back like a man risen from his grave. Soon, Takafumi discovers two bizarre things: His uncle treasures video games above all else, and, while comatose, he was actually transported to another world as some heroic guardian! Now, not only does Takafumi have to room with an uncle who is literally magical, he also has to catch the guy up on two decades of history. Smartphones, high-speed internet, modern anime tropes and the traumatic outcome of the ’90s console war.

seriesMetadata.description:
https://www.cmoa.jp/title/303886/
Duke’s daughter Yulia carries memories of her past life, in which she studied agricultural science at university. In this new world, she lives on and manages the poor territory she is meant to inherit, devoting herself to improving crop varieties. One day, however, the king orders her to become the fiancée of Rigras, the second prince—an ill-reputed man surrounded by unsavory rumors. At their formal meeting, the slightly plump Yulia is cruelly insulted by Rigras, who calls her a pig. Thankfully, the engagement is canceled. Relieved—or so she thinks—Yulia is soon approached by Loren, the first prince, who proposes marriage. With their interests aligned, she agrees to become his fiancée. But Yulia doesn’t yet realize the truth. This world is actually the setting of an otome game she played in her previous life—and she was originally destined to become the villainess fiancée of Prince Rigras.

From [Dazzling Scans](https://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=65109509067):  
Hirata Mihane has a scary face and isn't ladylike at all. In fact, she lets her temper get the better of her and often lets out small bursts of violent behaviour—even though she doesn't mean to. Because of this, the entire school calls her a "Satsujinki" (murderous monster). Even so, she's in love with the kind and popular Touma-kun, who doesn't mind the way she looks and is always nice to her. But... will Touma ever see her as a love interest?

Spin off of Junai Tokkou Taichou! showcasing the romantic life of Hirata and Yusa's daughter.

Nearly 2000 years ago, the prosperous Han dynasty of China collapsed. Heroes rose and fell, and three nations emerged--Wei, Shu, and Wu. Historians refer to this period as the Three Kingdoms period. The Romance of the Three Kingdoms is an intriguing tale of heroic deeds, of alliances forged and broken, of loyalty and betrayal. Hong Kong artist Chan Mou retells this classic tale in "The Ravages of Time" from the perspective of the Sima clan, which in the end united the three kingdoms.

seriesMetadata.description:
Cheon Yujin, who became the world's strongest necromancer—controlling legions of corpses and called a "one-man army."
But because he was too strong, he was abandoned by both the gods and humanity. Facing death, he chose regression.
In his new life, borrowing the power of Chronos—a god who was himself abandoned by the gods—he vows to survive this time, no matter what.
Yet the moment Chronos's power was engraved into his body, the necromancer—who wielded the energy of death and was a natural enemy of the gods—turned into a saint wielding the gods' sacred power.
With two conflicting powers dwelling in a single body, Cheon Yujin, now even stronger, begins his vengeance against the gods and humanity who abandoned him in his past life!

seriesMetadata.description:
To escape a life of poverty, Jang Youngkuk aspired to be a famous actor. And he succeeds... at the cost of his mother's life. Upon proceeding to take his own out of despair, Youngkuk miraculously returns to his childhood. With a second chance to make things right, he swears to abandon acting and be the good son he never was. However, when financial troubles begin to haunt Youngkuk and his mother, he discovers that he may have no choice but to return to the set for one last take.

"I'm breaking off my engagement with a villainess like you!" -- Marie-Ange, a saintess, is suddenly denounced and told by the Crown Prince that her engagement is broken. Furthermore, her saintly powers are stolen by the Baroness's daughter, the Crown Prince's lover. However, this is the beginning of ruin for both the Crown Prince and the new saintess...
"The powers of a saintess can be given to others, but only temporarily." 
Knowing this, Marie-Ange enjoys a brief respite, living freely with the Duke's son Darren and her friends. Meanwhile, the Crown Prince, whose life is spiraling out of control, seeks Marie-Ange's help, but she only smiles...

The late crime boss’s final command: 

“Protect my daughter!” 

Jason, a clumsy hitman flown in from Mexico, begins an unexpected childcare mission in Suyu-dong, Seoul. But the three-year-old girl turns out to be far more terrifying than her father ever was. From chaotic tantrums to outrageous antics, Jason’s new life becomes a nonstop disaster of survival parenting. And when she starts daycare, he realizes the chaos has only just begun.

From Alpha Manga:  
Because Prince Cecil is extraordinarily intelligent, life is boring for him. His days are without much excitement, but he becomes engaged to Bertia, the daughter of a marquis. The first thing she says to him when they first meet is quite baffling. She claims she is the “villainous heroine” in the story of his life!! According to Bertia, she has memories of her previous life. In a certain “romance game” she played in her life before, she played the character of the “villainess.” Her purpose in her new life is to become an exemplary villainess and ruin the prince’s engagement. In order to achieve this goal, Bertia does one outrageous thing after another and brings chaos and confusion into his life. A unique “love” story with a twist.

seriesMetadata.description: The only reason he is the strongest is... effort!! Ichitaro, a high school boy, has a personality that causes him to get completely absorbed in a single thing. One day, his entire class is transported to another world as heroes. The hero rank assigned to him at his destination is the worst. Deemed a useless existence, Ichitaro is locked away in a prison where time has stopped. What he did there... was training for 100 million years. By the time he left the prison, he had mastered each and every swordsmanship style, becoming the strongest hero!!

Returning college student Do-yoon (top) is forced by financial circumstances to rent a cheap villa rumored to be haunted. However, he soon discovers that what people mistook for ghost noises are actually the erotic moans coming from the man next door. Relieved, he tries to ignore it, but the daily “moan attacks” make it impossible for him to sleep. Frustrated, Do-yoon goes next door to complain. But upon meeting his neighbor, Je-yi (bottom), he is stunned by his beauty and shy demeanor, and ends up only giving a mild warning before leaving. As he turns away, Do-yoon cuts his finger while removing a flyer from the door and lets out a soft groan. In that moment, the seemingly innocent neighbor Je-yi suddenly changes and rushes toward him, making a completely unhinged request to record his moan.

*“Hey! I fell in love with your moan. Please let me record it—”*

A full-scale, perverted moan ASMR live show between two neighbors. Would you like to listen in?

---

Nokoru Mitsuhashi, a Systems Engineer working for a black company, has improved his quality of life by introducing telework. As he arranges the interior design of his room and becomes more involved with his balcony, he meets his neighbor, Natsu Izumi, a graduate student. This is the story of how one man met his future wife through teleworking, and how they got married after many ups and downs.

seriesMetadata.description:
From NetComics:  
Sangbum, a misogynistic and germophobic (that is, mysophobic) plastic surgeon, is shocked to discover that the sperm he donated when he was a medical student has produced a 13-year-old daughter named Myunghae!

Myunghae's other parents were killed in an accident, so she is suddenly dropped into her biological father's life. Sangbum is unprepared for the responsibility of fatherhood, but he quickly learns to love the daughter who looks so much like him.

In the midst of her happy new life with Sangbum, however, Myunghae is shocked to find out that her boyfriend Hyunjoon is going out with her best friend Mijoo. The truth is that Hyunjoon and Mijoo just wanted to teach Myunghae a lesson, but unexpected feelings are growing between them. Meanwhile, a popular student named Donghui is attracted to Myunghae. 

With so many changes in their lives in so little time, how will the new, small family of two cope?

label: Aigan Juu ~Isekai Teni Saki de Sate Yurosu no Onii-san ni Shuuchaku Sare Kakowareru~

seriesMetadata.description:
**A twisted obsession and a loss of innocence...**

In a strange twist of fate, Tsukimi gets transported to another world and is taken in by Rox, a satyr.

Mistaking her for his now-deceased dog, the drunk and delusional satyr brings her to his home, only for regret to set in soon after. He says he'll take Tsukimi to a shelter post-haste, but the traumatized woman begs to stay with him until she can find her bearings. And so, he extends her stay under the condition that she does the housework, while feelings begin to bloom under the surface.

As the two finally get close, she begins to see Rox as a brother figure and an unlikely family forms under their roof. With Tsukimi's help, Rox gets back on his feet and starts working again, whilst Tsukimi suffers in loneliness at home. When the satyr returns one night, Tsukimi begins to plead, "Please don't throw me out... I'll be good..."

As soon as those words are spoken, she unknowingly sets herself down a path from which she can never return...

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.dlsite.com/girls/work/=/product_id/RJ01609254.html), [S.Chinese](https://www.dlsite.com/girls/work/=/product_id/RJ01571128.html), [T.Chinese](https://www.dlsite.com/girls/work/=/product_id/RJ01571130.html), [Korean](https://www.dlsite.com/girls/work/=/product_id/RJ01571108.html)

**Junjou Romantica**: Takahashi Misaki is suddenly having some unexpected and odd problems. What started as a need for some college entrance exam tutoring has somehow led him to being romanced by a suave older man who also happens to be his big brother’s best friend. Confused by all of his brand new emotions, Misaki struggles to deal with his suddenly very odd life. And if that wasn’t enough, his suitor, Usami Akihiko, has plenty of issues of his own. A man-child who decorates his room in giant teddy bears and toys, Usami is a famous novelist who also writes steamy boys’ love novels on the side. When Misaki cracks open one of these books and reads sentences like “Usami licks every inch of Misaki’s hot body”…well, let’s just say that all hell breaks loose. Plus it doesn't help with Usami claiming he's in love with him.

**Junjou Egoist**: Kamijou Hiroki is a broken man, consumed by unrequited love for his childhood friend, Usami Akihiko (the writer from Junjou Romantica). Along comes Kusama Nowaki, whose name "Nowaki" means "typhoon", an orphan working his way through life since middle school. Like the typhoon he is named for, he whirls into Hiroki's life and heart, blowing all resistance away before him.

**Junjou Terrorist**: As fate would have it, Miyagi Yoh (whom Hiroki is working with as assistant professor) and Takatsuki Shinobu, a high school student, cross paths. Bits of pieces start to link together from the first two stories. That aside, Miyagi, who has a sad hidden past in himself involving a relationship with his teacher, is faced with Shinobu, who just says whatever is on his mind. The wheel of destiny is beginning to turn once again...

**Official:**   
[Kadokawa](https://www.kadokawa.co.jp/product/200301000037/)

seriesMetadata.description:
“As a princess, your life ended today. You can only live as an Omega.” The first princess of the Orkerium Kingdom, Maria — a skilled warrior who prefers to dress as a man — loses her homeland and parents after a sudden attack by the neighboring Svart Empire. While protecting her younger brother and fleeing the ruins, her Omega instincts suddenly awaken, and she’s captured by the enemy’s Alpha forces. Now, she faces a humiliating fate: becoming the bride of the enemy’s second prince, Ralph, used as a tool for producing heirs. Determined to someday reunite with her brother and rebuild their nation, Maria steels herself… yet must endure being in Ralph’s arms. An enemy-to-lovers omegaverse romance from Koisuru Soiree.

**Others in print:**  [German](https://tokyopop.de/buecher/boys-love/finder/), [Italian](https://b2c.magicpressedizioni.it/801-yaoi/3495-you-re-my-love-prize-in-viewfinder-1-9788869137013.html), [Polish](https://kotori.pl/nasze-wydania/finder/)

---------------------
**Volume 1:**  
Freelance photographer Akihito Takaba is captured by the very subject he’s been stalking in his viewfinder—the handsome and enigmatic crime lord Asami Ryuichi! The older man ravages him, both body and mind. Does this mean the end for the naive photographer, or will he live to shoot another day?

**Also includes:**  
- *Love Lesson* (Love Lesson part 1)  
Yuusuke's senior, Ichijou, tells him an old horror story of an ill-fated lover who, rumor has it, was left to die in what is now the present-day basement of one of the school's buildings. Sent on an errand between classes, Yusuke can't help but recall the story as he makes his way through the eerie surroundings, when suddenly... he blacks out...  
- *Koi o Suru Shokubutsu* part of [Koi o Suru DNA +](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=14580277705)  
- *Risky Society - God Bless My Justice*  
A rookie to a society of people with supernatural abilities must prove himself (and his love) to his superior.  
-*Hardworking Photographer Akihito Takaba* from the SuBLime "Deluxe Edition.'' 

**Volume 2:**  
Impulsive freelance photographer Akihito Takaba isn’t one to back down from a challenge. Undeterred by the ravaging his body took at the hands of Ryuichi Asami, Akihito stakes out the handsome crime boss’s club hoping to get the information he needs to take him down. Meanwhile, rival mafioso Fei Long returns to Hong Kong after his run-in with Asami and reminisces about their time together seven years earlier. What could the future possibly hold for this very deadly love triangle?

**Also includes:**  
*Koi o Suru DNA* part of [Koi o Suru DNA +](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=14580277705).

**Volume 3:**  
Freelance photographer Akihito Takaba has something Fei Long wants, and this Hong Kong crime boss will stop at nothing to get it, including kidnapping the young photographer’s friends! Akihito turns to the only person he can think of for help—Fei Long’s former lover and current rival in crime Ryuichi Asami. But even Asami can’t stop the sparks from flying when his old flame meets his new replacement!

**Also includes:**  
-*Baked Sweet Glasses*  
Overenthusiastic salesman Fujiya is determined to win over businessman Mikami. But what exactly is Fujiya aiming for? And how does he know about Mikami's secret love of sweets?  
-*Koi o Suru Baby Leaf* part of [Koi o Suru DNA +](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=14580277705)

**Volume 4:**  
Impetuous photographer Akihito Takaba finds himself in trouble again! After pursuing crime boss Fei Long, he’s captured and spirited away to Hong Kong, but not before Asami takes a few bullets during a failed rescue attempt. Now all the despondent Akihito can think of is whether or not his lover is alive, and if so, are Asami’s feelings strong enough to attempt yet another rescue?

**Also includes:**  
-*Gakko no Kaidan (School Ghost Story)* (Love Lesson part 2)

**Volume 5:**  
Crime boss Ryuichi Asami puts everything on the line to save his lover, Akihito Takaba, from the hands of his enemy. Unfortunately for them, Fei Long has grown quite fond of his captive. Meanwhile, Russian mafioso Mikhail Arbatov takes advantage of the situation to steal something precious. When three of the underworld’s biggest crime bosses clash, will Akihito be the one caught in the cross fire?

**Volume 6:**  
After being held prisoner in Hong Kong, Akihito Takaba is finally brought home to Japan by his lover Ryuichi Asami. But once again, the feisty photographer escapes Asami’s grasp! It’s not long, though, before Akihito becomes ensnared in a stalking incident and sees Asami’s darker side return. Will he chase the scoop or the man he’s not quite ready to admit he’s attracted to?

**Also includes:**  
-*Koisuru Finder no Hyouteki* a.k.a. Koisuru x VF Crossover  
Takaba Akihito (Finder) has his hands full with Mizuno and Hiyama from [Koi o Suru DNA +](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=14580277705) when they go to Kyoto for their graduation trip.

**Volume 7:**  
Akihito is freeloading at Asami’s apartment, polishing up not only his photography skills but also his skills as a househusband. His career is on the upswing, even though he still finds himself in perilous situations and has the occasional run-in with police. So imagine Akihito’s surprise when, while out chasing a scoop, he spots Asami with another man clinging to him…in tears! Are Akihito’s days as Asami’s live-in numbered?

**Volume 8:**  
After crime lord Asami's subordinate Sudo betrays him, freelance photographer Akihito attempts to chase Sudo down, only to wind up captured and at his mercy. Sudo's fixation on Asami has only grown stronger with time, to the point of wanting him dead. But Sudo isn't the only threat: another enemy appears on the horizon, gunning for the power Asami wields!

**Volume 9:**  
It’s been months since mysterious assassins attacked Asami and Akihito in their condo, and since then Akihito has been hiding out at a temple deep in the mountains. Asami, however, has spent this time flying around the world in order to keep his criminal organization together. Upon arriving in Hong Kong, he’s paid a surprise visit in his own hideout by former lover and longtime rival Fei Long! Will Asami survive long enough to find his way back to Akihito?

**Volume 10:**  
Akihito has been searching for Asami in Hong Kong, and after months apart, they are finally reunited. But things can never be easy for these two, and the helicopter they’re in crashes! When the star-crossed lovers come to, they find themselves stranded on a desert island, surrounded by paradise! Never ones to pass up an opportunity, the two quickly make up for lost time, temporarily forgetting their dire straits.

**Volume 11:**  
Asami prepares to face off against his greatest enemy yet! Worried for Akihito’s safety, he tells him to wait somewhere safe. But sitting idly by has never been Akihito’s thing, so he insists on staying by Asami’s side. The two know that when the big showdown begins, there will be no turning back. Will they prevail once again, or has their luck finally run out?

**Volume 12:**  
After their big showdown with the Russian mob, Asami and Akihito find themselves injured and once again separated, and it takes six long months of recuperating and searching before Asami is able to locate Akihito. As expected, the two have a passionate reunion…until Akihito pulls out a knife and attempts to kill Asami! 

**Volume 13:**  
Akihito is back with Asami but has lost his memories of him. And to make a bad situation worse, Akihito is going through withdrawal from no longer taking the drug responsible for his memory loss. But despite not remembering his lover, the warmth of Asami’s kindness has Akihito feeling confused about his growing attraction. Will that be enough for Asami to get his old Akihito back?

seriesMetadata.description:
One day, Mizuho, a university student, receives news that her classmate in high school, Origuchi Haruka, passed away. Mizuho doesn't remember being best friends with Origuchi, but apparently, Origuchi told her mother that Mizuho was her best friend. And now, her mother wants Mizuho to help her find the boy Origuchi dated during high school. Mizuho told Origuchi's mother that Origuchi was a very plain girl, and she was never seen with a guy, but her mother told Mizuho that Origuchi got pregnant and had an abortion when she was in high school. Mizuho was shocked, but she still starts asking her other classmates in high school and following the traces Origuchi left behind.

Note: Won the 58th Shogakukan Manga Award in the Shoujo manga category in 2013.

It was a hasty, arranged marriage. And on their wedding night, he ran away.

He lived for ten years under a false name, becoming one of the seven Great Masters of the Continent, but returned home when he heard news of his father’s passing.

There, he found his wife, whom he had thought had already left, whom he had only seen once before.

She was still as beautiful as the first time he saw her.

seriesMetadata.description:
From J-Novel Club:  
Retired adventurer Belgrieve thought he was done with excitement but his peaceful life is upended when he discovers a baby abandoned in the nearby woods. As her adoptive father, he teaches his new daughter Angeline everything he knows about the adventuring life. A past he had thought long forgotten after he lost his leg in battle. Angeline idolizes her father and wants to follow in his footsteps, so she leaves home for the big city. As the years pass, she ascends the ranks, eventually becoming renowned as an S-Rank adventurer: the Black-Haired Valkyrie. But it turns out that being the best comes with its own struggles, and she can barely catch her breath between battling fiends. With everyone turning to her for rescue, can Ange get out ahead of each new disaster and finally reunite with her beloved dad?

Queen Ceris, falsely accused and sentenced to death, reaches the end of her life— when suddenly, she is enveloped in a light emitted from her pendant. Through this mysterious power, Ceris is sent one year back in time, to the day of her wedding, narrowly escaping death. Having been given a second chance at life, she resolves: “I have nothing left to lose.” Determined to change her fate with her own hands, Ceris sets out to carve a new future for herself.

seriesMetadata.description:
“Reincarnated into a novel world with a Bad End confirmed—?!” And on top of that, her role is the caretaker who gets killed first by the villainess?! Former nursery school teacher Musashi Ayaka is reincarnated as “Aria,” arriving at the mansion of a young girl named Fia — a child who is fated to grow up and destroy the empire as a villainess. Aria has one and only one mission in this world: as Fia’s childhood caretaker, pour unconditional love into her and raise her in the right direction before she becomes a villainess. As Aria throws herself wholeheartedly into caring for Fia, her dedication slowly begins to change even the heart of Fia’s adoptive father, Proud — a dark magic wielder feared as the most terrifying man in the empire. Before she knows it — the girl who was supposed to become a villainess has grown attached to her, and the man who was supposed to be cold and ruthless keeps closing the distance between them. “Why am I, just a caretaker, being showered with affection?!” The side-character caretaker who was supposed to be the first one killed has started being loved — the world’s most demanding child-rearing fantasy begins here!

Bi-Kwang offers to assist the swordfighter on the condition that he introduces Bi-Kwang to his enchanting sister. Unbeknownst to him, the swordfighter is actually the sister, Hwa-Rin Dahm, who must assume different identities to advance the story. label: I've Been a Savior Every Cycle, but This Time I'm Apparently the Demon King

seriesMetadata.description:
The Savior.
A hero destined to defeat the Demon King, yet such a figure has never once truly appeared in the world, existing only as a legend.

Six chosen individuals serve as Saviors every cycle, facing the Demon King again and again. Each time they challenge him, they are brutally slain, only to be reborn and forced to fight once more. The cycle has repeated so many times that they can no longer remember how often they have died.

Everyone believed this endless struggle was simply their fate until this cycle proved different.

One of the six Saviors, Rudbeckia, has been reborn not as a hero, but as the next Demon King.

Thrown into an impossible existence, the former Savior struggles to survive while searching for a way to reunite with his companions. Yet as he begins to uncover the hidden truth behind their repeating fate, the future waiting beyond that revelation may change everything…

What is the most dangerous creature in the world?

Beasts with fangs that shatter steel and hearts burning with ferocious fire. They stand at the very top of the food chain as humanity's greatest predator.

—Dragons.

The war against them has lasted for 400 years. No one thought the grim tides of this battle could ever be reversed.

...That is, until he was let loose.

1-4) *Ikenai Otoko*   
Ryou was dumped because of his lousy sex techniques and in order to improve his skills, he turned to JS Pro, a company full of handsome men. His debut as a seme was a complete failure! He decided to challenge the uke role by teaming up with Tatsuya, a man he admired, however…

5) *Take Love Easy*  
The first encounter of Shino and Josh!! "Shino ~ The person you saw in the video wasn’t the real me… Would you let me hold you and show you the real me?" "Josh ~ Is my roommate truly the actor in the gay video that I fell in love with!?"

6) *Ikenai Invitation*  
The extra chapter features Iijima from [Rumble Rush](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=7604).

Ho-jun gets dumped by his lover yet again, all because he’s a "quirky tiger who wants to be held."

While drowning his sorrows at his usual bar, completely drunk and bemoaning his fate, he catches the eye of Sahyeon, who happens to walk in at that very moment.

Intrigued by Ho-jun—ears and tail on full display, sniffling as he wallows in self-pity—Sahyeon naturally slips into the seat next to him.

_Source: [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/bad_snake/), translated_

**Original Webtoon:**

Helia Bailey was born with the power to discern good from evil. The favor of her grandfather, King Alphonse, the oath of her childhood friend, the knight Levain, and the devotion of her maid, Eli... these were supposed to protect her. But with the king's death, everything began to unravel. The shadow of a great evil creeps in, and Eli's goodwill vanishes. To protect herself, Helia chose to become consumed by darkness herself. Soon, she came to be known as "the most wicked woman in history." The most arrogant and greedy woman in the kingdom. And Levain, too, broke his oath without knowing the truth. Helia lost everything. But if she revealed the truth, the great evil would turn its attention to Levain. "I will protect you, the light that you are." Even if it is a lonely path, even if my world sinks into darkness. Levain, I will protect you alone. Her epic tale now begins.

Now, Suho's out to save the country from the worst of its criminal scum by gaining the strength to stop them before they can strike. Can Suho power up and protect the nation, even if it means starting over completely? Or will justice be thwarted once more?

Avoid the bad ending at all costs! When her fiancé breaks up with her in front of the entire student body, noblewoman Aileen d’Autriche is devastated-or she would have been, if that wasn’t also the exact moment memories of her past life came crashing back! Turns out, she’s been reborn as the villainess of a dating sim…and according to the story, she’s slated to die at the hands of the demon king in three months! But Aileen’s already got a plan: Step one, get Demon King Claude to fall in love with her. Step two, live!

We all hate the greedy villains hell-bent on sabotage.  
Enter Carnelia Easter, the awful secondary villainess of the romance I'm reading, who trapped the prince in marriage at the behest of the evil empress. I didn't shed a tear when her head lopped off, but now I'm Carnelia! I gotta play this smart and convince him to divorce me instead!  
Still, between the prince, the empress, the heroine, the second prince, my terrible health...this story's getting unpredictable. Will I survive after all?
