seriesMetadata.description:
Mami and Chiki have always shared everything in life, they are identical twins, yet so different in character and personality: Mami tender and helpless, courted by boys to whom she doesn't never "no" for excessive kindness, Chiki with a strong sense of duty and a great spirit of sacrifice, would do anything to see her sister happy. But comes a time, however, when one realizes there are things cannot be shared, especially when it is something extremely rare and unique... just like an alien?!

Included in the [Orange](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=74907) volumes.

While staying late to pack up alone, Yo-ham discovers a maid outfit amidst the boxes. Unable to suppress a secret urge, he hides inside a locker—and just as he crosses a forbidden line, Joo Ui-young—the junior he has always only admired from afar—walks in through the door. Of all moments, he gets caught at the very one he least wanted anyone to witness. "Sunbae... turns out you're an even bigger pervert than I am?"

[Original Webtoon](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000077556)

Seou always knew that running away from the son of a murderer would eventually haunt her, but she never expected to be locked underground with him. Years after she abandoned Wonhyeok following a bloody secret on some stairs, a twist of fate traps them together in the suffocating darkness of an abandoned bunker. As the heavy door clicks shut, Seou must decide if the boy she betrayed is here to finally protect her, or if he’s been waiting all these years to exact his revenge.

seriesMetadata.description:
A new teacher comes to a boys school and immediately has a young student hitting on him. Along with another student always glaring at them when they're together. So the teacher decides to go along with it and make a game out of it even though he's straight. But what starts out as fun soon elevates into the teacher trying to keep the student who admires him away.

From DramaQueen:

A math teacher unwittingly formulates a love triangle with two diabolical variables divided over him. Unhappy teaching at an all boys school, the heterosexual Amamiya entertains his bitterness by toying with an adoring student. The surprising interference of the boy's fierce former friend, however, places Amamiya at the center of a wildly twisted tug-of-war. Teacher and student: a taboo love affair gone... comedy?!

seriesMetadata.description:
Ping pong. Table tennis. Fast, furious. You might have seen it - even played it - but never anything like this! The action is centered around Tsukimoto ('Smile' and Hoshino ('Peko'; childhood friends who have been playing the sport ever since they were elementary students. 

Tsukimoto - the impassive, bespectacled, seemingly-emotionless boy described as a robot by everyone who knows him, plays "to kill time". Hoshino, the passionate, out-going, charismatic boy who Tsukimoto idolized during their childhood, plays because he "loves ping pong and hates to lose". 

How will the world of competitive sports treat these two who are so different? And what will happen upon their inevitable meeting as contenders for the High School Men's Singles Trophy? 

Adapted to a [feature-length film](http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0328258/) by SORI in 2002.

**Note:** New cover editions that were released in 2002 are consist of 9 thin volumes actually. These thin volumes’re reunited as A (first 3 vols), B (the 2nd) and C (the 3rd). *Soushuuhen* is a memorial release for Ikki Magazine’s first issue which covers the series fully with over 1000 pages, the prologue was added as well.

Small-town girl Hinagi learns one day that her crush, Ishidori, is leaving the countryside for Tokyo. Hinagi hatches a plan to liven up their town to make Ishidori reconsider moving! To do so, she'll undergo the transformation of a lifetime...!! Can love turn a girl into a devil?! Here comes a high-speed romantic comedy!

label: Shinkage no Samurai, Academy de Musou suru

seriesMetadata.description:
On Earth, a calamity known as the [Gates of Ruin] suddenly appears. From these gates, countless creatures pour forth, driving humanity to the brink of extinction. The ones who save the world are “Selectees” who form contracts with gods and heroes to gain supernatural power.

Meanwhile, Hinata Kamio, a boy with no abilities at all, spends his days as a failure, enduring relentless bullying. In the depths of his despair, a mysterious samurai hero of unknown identity appears before him.

Once the weakest of all, Hinata begins walking the path to rise to the top at the academy where Selectees gather.

Appointed as the new sex education teacher at an all-boys high school, school nurse Mr. Dong Jung-nam continues his relentless exploration of sexuality today. True to his name (which literally means 'male virgin'), he is a lifelong singleton and a complete virgin with absolutely zero interest or experience in sex. However, what began as a study session driven purely by his sense of duty as a teacher is slowly starting to awaken desires and sensations he never knew he had!

[Original Webtoon](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/school_nurse)

Having lost their parents, Shiroyama must put aside his dreams and work hard to support not only himself, but his younger brother and sister. He steps into a world that he knows he must guard himself safely from, to protect himself and the ones he cares for. A world where transvestites work at entertaining patrons and alcohol flows freely. A world that offers him many firsts, including a kiss. But is it enough to light the fires of romance into his cold heart?

label: Faran, the Knight Princess of Salvation

seriesMetadata.description:
A girl named Faran, born as one of the Tokoyo People, a race said to possess the power to rule the world. However, her clan was wiped out by a mysterious force, leaving her as the sole survivor. Six years later, carrying vengeance in her heart, she sets out for the Empire. Along the way, she encounters a magical beast subjugation squad. Its leader is the beautiful imperial prince, Iris. After meeting him, Faran ends up accompanying the subjugation mission—and in the moment she shields a hunted magical beast, her hidden power awakens…! Will the scheming prince really leave such a free-spirited, extraordinary girl alone!?

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/357678/

A territory-reforming fantasy stirred up by a genius, brainy 0-year-old revolutionary!

An infant named Rutolf awakens with an adult-level consciousness thanks to “memories” from another world.

By gathering information and comparing it with these memories, he learns that he is the second son of a baron’s family—and that their territory is drowning in problems such as food shortages and crippling debt.

Realizing the situation is so dire that the villagers may not even survive the winter, Rutolf teams up with his older brother, Wolf—who has discovered his secret—to begin reforming their land and saving their people! (Sana Scans) 

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/351012/

This is a small love story unfolding in a corner of a peaceful country somewhere.

A gentlemanly guard loyal to the princess, and a
pure and tomboyish princess who is in love with him.

A heartwarming romantic comedy that will make your heart flutter, woven together with sweet and sour exchanges that transcend social status and age differences.

Now alone in a completely unfamiliar world and betrayed by the only people she thought she could depend on, our hot-headed heroine swears vengeance…

At the Tristain Magic Academy, her classmates call bumbling witch-in-training Louise Francoise le Blanc de la Valliere "Louise the Zero." During an important coming-of-age ritual, when each student must summon their own witch’s familiar, Louise confirms her classmates’ opinion by accidentally conjuring up a normal teenage boy from Japan. Whether the two of them like it or not, the laws of magic bind them as master and servant forever! A hilarious novel with romance interwined.

They were always just fighting, but then something happened between those friends.
Doha is an alpha, and Jio is an omega, yet they've been childhood friends from early days until now. One day, Doha's heat hits, and right then, Jio—who happened to stop by Doha's place—runs into him...

Doha, whose memories of that night are foggy due to the heat,
sees Jio dry-heaving and thinks to himself: It seems like I must've jumped him, and judging by the lack of any condom traces, probably...

"So... I... I'll take responsibility...!!"

Please, just talk it out, you two... no, let's live together, baby!

label: Akogareno Nasaka-san ga omotteta no to chigau n desu kedo...

seriesMetadata.description:
From DLsite:

Nasaka-san, a colleague from the same company, is older than me but has a gentle demeanor—someone I've always admired.

After two years of harboring feelings for him, I finally became his girlfriend.

My heart was pounding with excitement for our first "date at home," but—

"Did I give you my address?"

A small sense of unease sent a shiver down my spine.

"Well, I just looked it up a little, so... yes.
I wasn't even sure where you lived..."

Before I knew it, I felt the cold touch of metal on my wrist.

I was at the mercy of his insane touch, and was being dragged into a merciless wave of pleasure—

When Vidrak the Death God invades and the fate of humanity hangs in the balance, the greatest mages of the realm stand in defiance… only to find that their spells have no effect, as the dark overlord effortlessly picks apart their attacks. Overwhelmed by a horde of monsters, long-range mage Setsuna Cromwell uses his last resort, the Amulet of Resurgence, to travel 10 years into the past. With that resolve, Seraphina disguises her appearance and figure, attending the academy as a deliberately “unremarkable” girl.

But then, the second prince, Leonardo, takes an interest in her and proposes a certain deal…!?

As Pil-Hyun works to overcome his problem, his love interest likes someone else, he gains a crazy stalker girl, and the women he lives with are all scary in one way or another. label: Cataclysm Hunter: I Have an Experience Points System

seriesMetadata.description:
In a world devastated by catastrophic disasters, humanity is pushed to the brink of extinction as terrifying monsters and supernatural beings begin appearing across the world. Cities collapse, chaos spreads everywhere, and survival becomes more difficult with each passing day.

Amid this disaster-filled era, one hunter awakens a mysterious Experience Point System that allows him to continuously grow stronger through battle. By defeating powerful enemies and surviving deadly encounters, his abilities rapidly evolve beyond ordinary hunters.

However, the world’s dangers continue to grow as stronger monsters and hidden threats emerge from the shadows. To survive this brutal new age and uncover the truth behind the disasters, he must continue fighting and become one of humanity’s strongest hunters.

Under the curse of Orochi, the great demon serpent reborn every 300 years, Japan has been shrouded in clouds for as long as anyone can remember. Top actress Yu Fengzhi works herself to death and wakes up inside a novel—as the vicious supporting villainess who is fated to die miserably. To escape her doomed ending, she decides on a simple survival strategy: cling tightly to her frail husband, Pei Jue, the sickly heir who is treated as a disposable side character in the original story. As long as she protects this “cannon-fodder” young lord, she figures she can quietly coast through life. But the delicate, weak-looking Pei Jue turns out to be anything but harmless. When she acts the perfect black‑lotus villainess, he stands behind her, backing her up and handing her the knives. To raise money for his sister’s medical treatment, Lin Yu has no choice but to take a dangerous job as a cremation worker at a high-risk crematorium. There, he accidentally unlocks a Soul-Devouring System — granting him the ability to absorb the souls of cremated warriors and monsters, gaining their memories and abilities in the process. Using the soul of the first warrior he absorbs, along with the souls of two mutant beast corpses, he acquires body-tempering techniques and combat skills far beyond those of any ordinary person — and uses that power to rewrite his fate entirely.

I was a public official who worked part-time to survive. I was knocked out by a speeding car while making deliveries in the middle of the night. I have a strong memory of dying prematurely in a hit-and-run.

At some point, I became the second son of the collapsing Jo Ga-cheol Clan. This family has neither the authority to drop a flying bird nor the power to carry out one’s will. There is only an enormous amount of debt that can annihilate the entire family. There’s only one way out!

The story of a successful modern man who has to utilize all the knowledge and experience of a public official begins now!!

Welcome to a magical world entirely ruled by academic prestige. Here, if your test scores are low, your very humanity is stripped away. Eito, a low-tier outcast working as a miserable supply clerk, thought he had seen the absolute rock bottom of this ruthless society. But his world truly shatters when his beloved younger sister is brutally murdered by a mysterious monster known only as the "Unknown."

Losing everything in a flash of despair, Eito expects the end—only to awaken twenty years in the past, standing right in the middle of the Academia’s entrance exam hall.

Gifted with a legendary, ultra-high-spec skill set in his second life, the boy once mocked as the academy’s weakest link is back. Armed with flawless foresight and unmatched power, Eito is ready to completely smash the academic caste system to pieces and seize the top spot by absolute force!

This time, he will protect his sister, uncover the truth, and rewrite the world. The ultimate academic-caste battle fantasy begins now!

“Pig Legs.” That was the nickname Makabe Masamune was cursed with by childhood classmate Adagaki Aki. But a lot has changed in eight years. He’s lost weight, changed his name, and turned himself into a whole new man and a handsome one at that. Masamune’s grand plan is ready to begin. He’ll make Adagaki fall in love with him, and then dump her hard! It’s a story of love and vengeance, plain and simple. What could possibly go wrong?

label: Izure Keikoku Akujo to Yobareru Miya Onna wa, Hiya Tei no Aishihi

seriesMetadata.description:
Hongyu, princess of the Lin Kingdom, was born with white hair, which is said to bring misfortune.

One day, a rebellion broke out. The inner palace was burned, and she lost everything.

Five years later… she lives a life of poverty among commoners, named as Honglin.

But fate takes another turn when she enters the imperial harem of the current emperor, Guan Zhao, the very man who once led the rebellion.

Using the knowledge she gained as a princess, Honglin begins to stand out in a problem-ridden inner palace. 

Even the strange and enigmatic imperial guard starts to take notice of her. But his true identity is actually… the cold emperor, Guan Zhao, who is rumored to despise women and never show himself in the inner palace…?!

Isol Yeon, the school’s top student and biggest outcast, gains the ability to see people’s true feelings about her through the Hashtag Lens, which she acquires after making the ten‑quintillionth wish. Through the lens, she discovers that Shinu Seong, her former middle‑school best friend she had a painful fallout with, has tagged her as “#my_first_love_and_trash.” Can Isol mend their broken relationship and overcome the pain of being betrayed by her first love?

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=844730), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13367561)

label: Maoyuu Maou Yuusha - "Kono Watashi no Mono to Nare, Yuusha yo" "Kotowaru!"

seriesMetadata.description:
After a long and treacherous journey, our Hero finally arrives at the Overlord’s castle only to find himself being asked for help. The Hero explains how the war that the demons have brought upon the humans have killed thousands and put more in misery. The Overlord however argues that this war has made the human society band together as one and showed empirical evidence how it has increased population, increased production, boosted economy and improved society overall. Furthermore, she explains to the Hero that ending this war will result in a civil war that will produce more bloodshed than there ever was. The Hero, convinced that the only way to bring peace, relatively speaking, is to join forces with the Overlord, agrees to help with her plans!

[Official English Translation](https://global.bookwalker.jp/series/21530/)

Koizumi Takashi, a salary man, dies slipping on the skin of a banana. If he can reach the magical Fountain of Purification which resides at the bottom of a difficult dungeon, he will be allowed into Heaven. But to accomplish that, he needs to conquer the dungeon by summoning monsters. His first monster was a lvl 1 female goblin.

recommendations.title: Tondemo Skill de Isekai Hourou Meshi

label: Tondemo Skill de Isekai Hourou Meshi

seriesMetadata.description:
"I'll love you no matter what form you take." Is that love truly salvation, or is it something else...? Oma, heir to a family of exorcists, and Yumi, the daughter of a prominent family, were two besotted lovers on the verge of engagement. Then one day, Oma was shot by an unknown assailant and died before that dream could be realized. Driven to despair by her deep grief, Yumi proclaims "I will join you on the other side", but she is suddenly attacked by an evil spirit. Oma, now himself a spirit, swoops in and saves her, saying, "Even if I fall, I'll never let you go again." The two are happily reunited, one living and one dead. This time, they refuse to let go of their love… even if it ends in ruin.

[Official English](https://coolmic.me/titles/8603)

label: A Nursery School Teacher in My Previous Life, a Villainess in This One? And Now I'm the Spoiled Princess's Tutor!?

seriesMetadata.description:
Fujisawa Tsuki, a kind-hearted nursery teacher, dies in an accident and awakens as Deanna, the spoiled daughter of a marquis. Using her childcare skills, she repairs her strained family ties and finds peace in her new life. But at her academy’s graduation party, her fiancé suddenly announces their breakup, and a mysterious prince appears with an unexpected offer to become the tutor of a spoiled princess. A warm and witty fantasy about a reincarnated teacher who brings kindness and patience into the noble world.

label: Going on Vacation With My Dumped Junior

seriesMetadata.description:
Han Tae-yang was out drinking during his long-awaited vacation when a message arrived from a junior soldier who was on vacation with him. He said he had been dumped by his girlfriend. At that single sentence, Han Tae-yang rushed to where his junior, Cha Woo-jin, was without a moment's hesitation. He didn't know then. He didn't know that he would be the first person to have his rear opened up by that very junior.

[Original Webtoon](https://ridibooks.com/books/297089028)

The young man Mirza is enshrined as a "living goddess" who heals his people in the Mansion of Flowers, but in truth, he possesses no healing powers of his own.

That miracle is entirely due to the divine water residing in the mountains of his homeland.

One night, he saves a young foreigner struck down by a cursed poison, only for his secret to be discovered.

The true identity of this young man is Asura, the "Headhunting King" of a neighboring land.


As curses and faith intertwine, the two find themselves drawn to each other, crossing boundaries of both kingdom and god.

But their feelings are strictly forbidden.

And so, they are swept away by the turbulent waves of destiny...

Two years after moving to Tokyo, Kizamu Kamoda has lost all his money and is searching for work when he stumbles upon a sushi bar. There he meets the master, a guy in nothing but a loincloth and a face right off a fish! Kizamu starts working right away, but it seems this place also performs exorcisms at night...

From [StarryHeaven](http://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=135):

Yuurin, the daughter of a low ranking government officer, came to the royal palace after hearing of a job with higher wages. However, that job is to act as the bride of Haku Reishou, who is feared as being the ruthless and heartless "His Majesty, the Wolf". In the royal palace where conspiracies swirl, after learning His Majesty's secret, Yuurin ends up stuck being his temporary bride...?!

All he wants to do is put his hunting days behind him, but in order to survive his new power-hungry relatives, Xinyun must hone his skills again, starting from level one. Can his own unique blend of necromancy and martial arts take him from useless bum to ultimate boss?

seriesMetadata.description:
A world forever changed by the "Great Cataclysm."
Seo Gio, a former art teacher, dies in a sudden fire, only to be pulled into a portrait and become part of the painting itself.

Within the world of the portrait, Gio gains godlike powers that allow him to create life and even open gateways to other dimensions.

Through his abilities, Gio encounters countless people and tries to help them overcome the problems they face.
However, the more he crosses dimensions and resolves the incidents he encounters, the closer he comes to uncovering the truth hidden behind his own death...

label: Sono Yubi Dake ga Shitte Iru

seriesMetadata.description:
From DMP:

At Wataru Fujii's high school, it's all the rage to wear paired rings with the girl you love. Wataru wears one though he is single, and one day inadvertently discovers that his ring pairs up with that of tall, handsome and smart Yuichi Kazuki, the senior classman idolized by the entire school. Though Kazuki has a reputation for being kind to all, when dealing with Wataru, he is strangely harsh. Their paired rings somehow draw them together and the two alternately clash and attract, as they must sort out their budding feelings for each other.

“No more marriages for me!”

Enough suffering! This time, her goal was to become wealthy. Just as she was steadily increasing her fortune, two men appeared by her side.

“Let’s date, not marry, Noona.”

“I’m not as nice as Yuri. Why not just be my woman?”

Will she really embark on this madness for the third time?

Taken from the wiki page...

The story set in the contemporary South Korea. Some 30 years ago, unidentified creatures appeared out of nowhere and have attacked people. They have caused massive destruction wherever they go. The monsters are called "Trouble", and get the world have fallen into chaos. Along with the first appearance of the "Troubles", some number of humans were born with or acquired supernatural abilities. These mutants called "Trace" are the only ones who can fight off the "Trouble". The "Trace" are also considered freaks and generally shunned by the community because some of them misused the powers for their own interest.

The plot revolves around two main characters. Sah Gang-kwon, a high school student born as a "Trace" who attempts to hide his ability. The other is Kim Yun-Seong, who acquired his "Trace" abilities during his early 30s. Soon after the acquision, his wife and daughter were taken away from him for experimental purposes.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%ED%8A%B8%EB%A0%88%EC%9D%B4%EC%8A%A4/1047), [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/47497773)

From Tokyopop:

Young Mikan runs away to Tokyo to follow her best friend, Hotaru, who has been enrolled in an exclusive, secretive private school for geniuses. But it turns out that Alice Academy is a lot more than meets the eye. If Mikan wants to stay by Hotaru's side, she has to both pass the strange "entrance exam" and face the even greater challenge of befriending her very odd new classmates. Whether it's Hotaru's gift for inventing gadgets, the cranky Natsume's fire-casting ability, or Professor Narumi's control of human pheromones, everyone at the school has some sort of special talent. But what ability, if any, does Mikan possess? Mikan is going to have to rely on her courage and spunk if she's going to stay in school, or even stay alive!

seriesMetadata.description:
After witnessing her stepmother’s affair, Hina is pushed down the stairs. Just when she thinks she has died, she finds herself reincarnated into the world of her favorite novel, *The Road to the Tyrant*. Worse yet, she has possessed the body of a villainess destined to be killed by her favorite character, Uriel. “Ah, so this is the usual pattern where I have to avoid a bad ending,” Hina thinks. However, the truth is that Uriel has already realized she is a transmigrator! Hina continues playing the role of the villainess without knowing a thing, while Uriel pretends not to notice. Though they are drawn to each other, both keep hiding their feelings so the other won’t find out. Just when will these two finally be honest with each other…?

seriesMetadata.description: Kent, a cynical adventurer earning daily wages, receives a summons from the guild one day. There, the highly anticipated super elite rookie, Cordelia, had already been called in. The guild orders them to form a party because they have "the greatest compatibility in history", but!? The strongest pair consisting of a bottom-tier adventurer living day-to-day and an elite beautiful girl with strong ambitions goes wild day and night♪

Seo Na-young, a shy and ordinary college sophomore, joins the board game club “Playmate” with pure intentions. Friendly upperclassmen, a warm atmosphere—at first, everything seemed perfect. But one day, the club reveals a completely different side.

“Whoever loses the game must carry out a penalty.”

At first, it was just a lighthearted joke. But as the games continued, the penalties gradually crossed the line, and Na-young finds herself confronting desires she didn’t even know she had.

Even as she wants to run away, she finds herself eagerly awaiting the next game. And she realizes: once you become a player, there’s no stepping off this game board.

Welcome to Demon School. Hopeless pushover Iruma Suzuki has found himself in a devil of a predicament. His trashy parents have sold off his soul, and he now has to live and attend school in the Netherworld. But with his unique survival skills and doting demon grandfather’s support, Iruma will surely make it through this hellish experience. He’ll just need to subjugate rival classmates, summon familiars, and more, all while never revealing that he’s human. Easy as aleph, bet, gimel, right?

Lee Sehun is a master blacksmith who was supposed to save the entire world before its destruction—if only he had realized that sooner. As Pandemonium and its Demon Gods drown the world in the Sea of Annihilation, he hears the mysterious sound of crashing waves that usually guides him and decides to make his last creation before doing the unthinkable... But then, he awakens 31 years in the past! And this time, he must remaster his craft and use his creations to stop the impending apocalypse.

Becoming Necromancer God Through a Skeleton Clone

seriesMetadata.description:
The main character awakens the useless class "Necromancer" — but gains a skeleton clone in the underworld. Using this skeleton clone to kill monsters and level up in the underworld, he feeds the power back to his main body, continuously growing stronger. This is not limited to satisfying the feeling of pleasant growth for a character who depends on cultivation, but also takes advantage of information asymmetry to repeatedly create opportunities for "playing the fool to crush the strong." From a single skeleton, he embarks on the road to godhood.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[KuaiKan](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27711/)

Seungju has been secretly in love with senior student council president Junhyuk for a long time.

One summer day, as he suffers from the fever of his unrequited love, the person who appears happens to be Junhyuk’s younger brother, Jehyeon.

Seungju, who has been in love with the older brother, and Jehyeon, who approaches him despite that…

Will Seungju be able to break free from the torment of this relentless unrequited love?

**Official Translations:**  
Thai (Jul 14)

From Tokyopop:

High-school student Moon Bin Lee has difficulty sleeping due to a recurring nightmare: he's stranded over a thousand years in the past chasing a dark-haired girl into a deep abyss. 

Before long, the nightmare overwhelms him, and he is unable to tell whether he is Moon Bin, a Seoul teenager at the end of the second Millennium, or Sa Kyoung Kim, the son of a prominent warrior family in the middle of the first Millennium. People in his present-day life assume roles in his historical life as he struggles to learn exactly who he is and what he's expected to do, straddling a transmigratory portal through time and space. 

In the present, his school's kendo club battles to stay in the championships... but in the past, Moon Bin finds himself at the threshold of a territorial dispute on the plains of Mongolia.

categories.name: Past Life/ves Play/s a Big Role

label: Haru Kaede-kun wa Make Heroine ni wa Naranai!

seriesMetadata.description:
"You're not being sexy about it at all. Let me show you." Hearts are sure to pound as mutual love is realized in this BL about a "mom-type" protagonist and the cool, stoic guy who's won his heart. Childhood friends Fuyuki and Haruka have decided to live together upon starting college, and Haruka gets to be the only one to see a flawed side of the otherwise perfect Fuyuki. Haruka acts like he doesn't enjoy taking care of Fuyuki, but he secretly loves to spoil his crush. However, he overhears a group of guys at school talking about how childhood friends always end up as losing heroines in romance stories! Will Haruka never end up with the guy of his dreams...? That night, he gets overexcited and pushes Fuyuki down onto the bed "as a prank"... "I want to get to first base with Fuyuki, and then maybe even score a home run," he eagerly resolves to himself. Haruka wants to escape being the guy version of a losing (male) heroine and become Fuyuki's boyfriend if it's the last thing he does!

[Official English](https://coolmic.me/titles/8624)

Mok Hwi‑yeong, a great merchant of the Central Plains, is killed in a demonic cult’s attack. The next thing he knows, he has regressed thirty years into the past, back to his childhood days training as an outer-sect disciple of the Wudang sect. 

Before him appears a mysterious bamboo slip, a “shop” that lets him buy martial talent with money. With a merchant’s brain and a pay‑to‑win system that sells everything from heavenly insight to a Martial King’s physique, the returned Mok Hwi‑yeong begins shaking the entire jianghu from within Wudang.

An independent collection of short stories — Ultramarine Schooldays highlights the color that evokes faithful memories, tenderness, and melancholy. These stories take place in Japan and in the West, in the past and in the present. They may involve a romance in the city, an energizing walk in the forest, the daily mundane life of a waitress working in a café, or a medieval intrigue; but what connects these stories are the powerful messages they deliver.

In her previous life, Justina—a count’s daughter with absolutely no interest in romance—caught the attention of the God of Love. While trying to avoid an endless time loop, she suddenly finds herself on the brink of disaster after her fiancé cheats on her and breaks off their engagement!

seriesMetadata.description:
Demian, a boy raised in an orphanage, discovers that his benefactor was actually his biological father. To escape the shadow of his father’s family, he throws himself into a foreign war.  

On the desolate battlefield—where he has no reason to survive, no goals to pursue—one day he receives a letter, gentle as a spring breeze:   
“Hello, soldier whose name and face I do not know. I’m delighted that fate has connected us this way. I am a lady from a humble family living in the countryside with beautiful scenery. I’m not anyone remarkable, so I don’t have much to introduce myself with.”  

The noblewoman introduces herself as Lintrey. What begins as a chance pen pal relationship gradually becomes Demian’s only solace, and the woman beyond the letters becomes his first reason to want to live.  

Later, Demian is discharged after an unexpected accident. He travels to the address from the letters to find his pen pal, but…  

“That house burned down in a huge fire not long ago.”   
“If the Lintrey you’re talking about is the maid from that house, then she’s dead.”   

A burned mansion. Conflicting testimonies…  
Did Lady Lintrey ever really exist, or was it all a lie from the beginning?  

Confused and shaken, Demian clings to a faint hope that she cannot be dead and heads to the capital city of Nihiro to search for her.  

Will Demian be able to meet Lintrey again in that place?

And will he finally receive an answer to the words he never got to say?

The manga's story begins when ordinary high school girl Chiyo Watanabe wakes up one day into a fantasy world, inhabiting the body of a Venessa, a lady of a ducal family. Though she thinks at first that she can enjoy the aristocratic high life, the discovery of her family's lordly sum of debts puts an end to that. Her last hope lies in her apparent betrothal to Alfred, the king of the Kingdom of Willand. Though the king does not seem to enamored with marriage, one year of a false relationship may buy Venessa the money she needs.

Half-demon Luo Binghe rose from humble beginnings and a tortured past to become unrivaled in strength and beauty. With his harem of over three hundred wives, and dominion over both the human and demonic realms, he is truly the most powerful protagonist—in a trashy web novel series!

At least, that's what Shen Yuan, online alias "Peerless Cucumber," believes as he finishes reading the final chapter in Proud Immortal Demon Way. But when a combination of rage and a poor meal choice leads to his death, Shen Yuan finds himself reborn into the world of the web novel, in the body of Shen Qingqiu—the beautiful but cruel teacher to a young Luo Binghe. Although as Shen Qingqiu he now has incredible power and abilities as a cultivator, he’s also destined to be horrifically punished for crimes against the protagonist, so this new Shen Qingqiu has only one course of action: get into Luo Binghe’s good graces before the young man’s rise to power. That’s the only way he’ll escape the awful fate of a true scum villain! *(Source: Seven Seas)*

But his plans for a quiet comeback are disrupted when Taeyeon, a cheeky junior, discovers a secret from Beomhwan’s past he’d rather keep buried. Enticed by the cash rewards attached to solving infamous campus ghost stories, Taeyeon ropes Beomhwan into teaming up with her athletic friend Mari. Together, the trio investigates the school’s darkest rumors—perverts in trench coats, animal cruelty, hidden spy cameras, and more. As the mysteries unfold, Beomhwan and Mari find themselves growing closer, stumbling awkwardly through the unfamiliar terrain of first love. Haunted hallways, eerie rumors, and romantic tension blend into a story of secrets, courage, and youthful longing.

Long ago, there existed a land divided into four countries: Sou, Kou, Do, and Ah.   

The King of Ah took on a wife from Kou and soon thereafter one from Do, creating a shaky alliance between the three nations. When the Second Queen gave birth to a son, the King cast aside the sickly First Queen and her daughter Aki into the depths of the Palace. But as Fate would have it, Princess Aki encounters a slave named Hakusei, who has peculiar golden hair and sky blue eyes. He promises his life to her and helps her train in the Six Arts under the guidance of the enigmatic merchant Seitetsu. However, when Aki outshines the Prince during a hunt in an attempt to gain her father's acknowledgement, she sparks a war by besmirching Do's honor and drives the Second Queen to poison her mother.   

With nothing left but her faithful Hakusei, Aki is banished to the small country of Kou with a vow to return to Ah one day for revenge. But in the face of the mighty allied nations of Do and Ah, will the two survive long enough to carry out Aki´s vow? 

*Note: Won the 60th (2014) Shogakukan Manga Award for Best Shoujo Manga in 2015.*

seriesMetadata.description:
[The Infinite Regression Genre]

Look in any fantasy novel, and you’ll find that regression is a guaranteed cheat code!

But what about the ability of Infinite Regression?

There’d be no need to worry about bad endings, not when the protagonist can simply reset to reach that eventual happy ending.

“Cheat code, my ass.”

I tried it myself just to find out otherwise.

The myths of regressors’ successes depicted in all those novels are actually fake…

It was all just vile propaganda!

“This run is doomed too.”

This is not a story of success. It’s a tale of the aftermath of failures.

Thus begins the heartfelt biography of a man with 1,183 runs of experience!

Ritsu inherited his sixth sense from his grandfather, along with a demon guardian named Blue Storm. Strange things just seem to happen around these two, and it's left to them to get to the bottom of all these mysterious events. Each story is independent but features recurring characters you'll come to know and appreciate as they, each in their own way, try to deal with things 'not of this world'.

Note: Won the Excellence Prize of manga section of Japan Media Arts Festival in 2006. Has sold over 5.5 million copies.

Manato Saeki is a low-ranking cop just scraping by, doing whatever he can to pay for treatment for his terminally ill mother. One rainy night, he receives a mysterious green object from a badly wounded hunter. From the instant he accepts that uncanny thing, his fate begins to twist in a cruel direction. “I never should have… taken it.” A vast secret organization known as Atlas is after the green object. In front of Manato’s eyes, his mother is killed and the one friend who ever stood by him is brutally murdered, yet he can do nothing. Branded with every crime and sentenced to death, he is pushed to the brink of execution. In that desperate moment, when rage and hatred boil his blood, something inside him awakens. Even if his limbs are shattered and his organs rupture, even if his body is torn apart and left in tatters, it relentlessly regenerates—an endless power of self‑healing. He cannot die. Not until his vengeance is complete.

In a land where magicians cast spells on bullets in order to perform magic, like summoning powerful monsters. There was once a witch so powerful that she challenged the gods and was cursed for it.

10 years before the current time of the story, that witch challenged and defeated another magician, and in doing so saved a small boy, who instantly fell in love with her and was inspired to use guns as his "Sword of Justice". That boy was called Zero. When he was ready, he set out on a quest and found that woman who saved his life... or did he? She is not the same person that he idealized; she is selfish, rude, arrogant... and quite a bit shorter. But at the times when she feels Zero's love and self sacrifice for her, she can bring forth incredible power. So the two set out together to find a cure and the reason why the gods only bothered to curse her.

A BL story between actors who go head-to-head in the world of fiction begins!

Hidaka Shuichi was once a popular actor. But now, with work on the decline, he's considering retirement.
But then, Hidaka receives an offer to co-star with another actor. This live-action adaptation of a popular manga is sure to generate a lot of buzz. And what's more, the other lead is the hottest actor of the moment, Taki Yamato. However, Taki has been against working with Hidaka since their first collaboration six years ago.

but Taki greets him cheerfully, as if there was no reason for them to not work together.
What is the true meaning hidden behind that smile?

seriesMetadata.description: Arc, the second son of a ducal house, was expected to inherit the prestigious [Sword Saint] class passed down through generations. However, he instead awakened a mysterious and seemingly useless class known as the [Rarity Changer]--a power of which effects were entirely unknown. Cast out to the remote and impoverished frontier of Japoli, Arc finds himself at a loss. Everything changes when he saves his childhood friend, Princess Lati, from danger. In that moment, his true ability finally awakens. As it turns out, the [Rarity Changer] is an extraordinary class that can maximize the value of anything, transforming it into SSS-rank quality! Crumbling fortress walls become impregnable defenses. Shoddy weapons are elevated into legendary armaments-- With this overwhelming power, Arc begins to rebuild the desolate land he was exiled to, turning it into an unstoppable stronghold that can even repel monsters. Once dismissed as worthless, the boy now reshapes the very meaning of value itself. An exhilarating fantasy of territorial restoration begins!

A doting romantic comedy between a yandere dog-like knight commander and a poor young lady who wants to live a simple life! 

A woman in her late twenties working as an office lady is reincarnated as Camille, the rival noblewoman in an otome game. Deciding to give up her longing for romance and live a simple life to avoid being humiliated, she immediately catches the eye of Lefit, the main love interest and next knight commander. It seems he has become interested in Camille, who behaves in a way that is unbecoming of a noble... "I'll keep an eye on you 24 hours a day."

Just when she thought a terrifying life of surveillance was about to begin, what awaited her was a heavy and sweet doting route!?

So when her first quest window tells her to find a grown-up who'll take her in, she marches down to the top guild in Korea and demands to be recruited. Sensing that this overpowered orphan shouldn't fall into the wrong hands, the guildmaster has no choice but to adopt her. But he has no idea this tiny girl is about to turn his life upside down!

label: A Kiss to the Knight Who Swore Revenge

seriesMetadata.description:
“You came to offer your fate to me.” 

Fine is a girl who unjustly lost her two older brothers in the kingdom’s greatest scandal, the “Neltop Incident.” Disguising herself as a man, she becomes a knight and tries to take revenge on the corrupt royal family, but she falls into a trap and is driven into a corner. The one who saves her then is Victor, known as the “Wizard of Ruin.” 

Victor tells Fine, “I’ll grant you your revenge, but in exchange, give me everything you have.” 

What he asks of her is to infiltrate the “Room of Domination,” the secret space of the crown prince and princess, and retrieve the vow ring containing the contract between the royal family and Victor. Fine and Victor begin working together toward the same goal. Though they constantly clash at first, before long, they begin to soothe each other’s loneliness and find themselves drawn to one another… 

A fated romance fantasy woven from the flames of revenge and the light of pure love.

seriesMetadata.description:
Sid Ranols was treated like dirt. Bound as a slave to the Hero’s party, he possessed the reviled ability of a [Necromancer]. He endured their cruelty with a single beacon of hope keeping him sane: the promise of finding his long-lost sister, Iris. But when the party cut him loose as bait in an S-Rank dungeon, he learned the horrific truth. His sister was never coming back. She had already been butchered—a mere plaything for the "Hero" Sylvan's twisted pleasure. "I will have... my revenge!!" Fueled by an inferno of hatred, Sid discovers the corpse of the legendary Vampire Princess, Ecarlate. Upon [Resurrecting] her, he awakens to the ultimate power: the [Shadow Necromancer]! A boy with nothing left to lose declares war on the Hero and the world that sanctioned his suffering. The curtain rises on this dark fantasy of absolute vengeance!

seriesMetadata.description:
Diana, the epitome of a noble lady, is sentenced to death for allegedly defaming Rachel, the beloved of her fiancé, Crown Prince August. As despair consumes her, a dainty girl whispers in her ear, “Thanks for playing the pathetic villainess ♡.” Though Diana is furious at being framed, it’s already too late—she is executed… or so it seemed. She wakes up on the very day of the fateful tea party that led to her downfall, time having been rewound! Determined, she vows, “This time, I’ll become an even greater villainess than her!” However, there’s only one hour left until the tea party! To clear her name and outwit Rachel by becoming the ultimate villainess, she has a lot to do—and barely any time to do it! A desperate race begins for a noble lady who sheds her mask of elegance to avoid her condemnation ending!

[Original Web Serialization](https://zerosumonline.com/detail/akujo)

seriesMetadata.description:
After a younger colleague from university gives birth, Kana Hayami begins to think about having children of her own.

However, due to the trauma of her first sexual experience, she harbors a deep fear of intimacy, preventing her from taking the step toward conception.

When she confides these worries to her husband, Akihisa, he whispers to her gently:

"It's okay. Just leave it all to me."
"You can get pregnant without any pain—just by living your normal life."

Soothed by these mysterious words, Kana drifts off to sleep...

"I'm going to pour plenty inside you so we can have a baby..."

"I'll get you pregnant while you sleep."

Kana has no idea.

Every night, while she sleeps, Akihisa is filling her womb with his seed, impregnating her...

label: Kyou kara Ma no Tsuku Jiyuugyou!

seriesMetadata.description: Yuri Shibuya was living a pretty normal life. That changed the day he was dunked into a toilet after an attempt to save a classmate from a gang of bullies. Instead of just getting a good soaking, he's pulled in. The next thing he knows, he's in a world that vaguely resembles medieval Europe. If that's not odd enough, he's told that he is to be the next Maoh, just because he has black hair and black eyes. The Maoh is the King of the Mazoku, who are coexisting not-so-peacefully with the humans in this world. Much to his subject's dismay, he's totally different from the rulers they're accustomed to. He's kind, considerate, a believer in justice, and not willing to use violence to solve conflicts. Not exactly someone they want running a country on the very brink of war. Now, Yuri has to deal with trying to become a good Maoh, while at the same time attempting to adapt to this land's customs and culture, all in a world where the tension between the humans and Mazoku is reaching its peak.

One day, 28-year-old overworked OL Kanzaki Kotono suddenly finds herself transported to another world. Summoned as a saint, she’s deemed too old for marriage by this world’s standards and is about to be cast out for being “unfit” for the role.

Desperate to survive in a world with different views, Kotono blurts out a wild idea, “Then let me work in the royal capital!” But when she starts her new life there, she somehow ends up being proposed to by a young duke…?!

May happiness be upon this overworked OL! A new otherworldly office rom-com begins!
https://www.cmoa.jp/title/346952/

She was a daughter of the general’s family and a gentle woman. She fell for Prince Ding and offered to be his wife. After supporting him for six years, she became his empress. 

After risking being a hostage in a foreign country, she returned five years later to find that she no longer had a place in his imperial harem. 

Lying in his arms, the new consort said with a sneer, “Sis, now that the country is stable, it’s time for you to die.” 

Her daughter died a tragic death and her son was removed as crown prince. The Shen family had been loyal, but they ended up being slaughtered. Shen Miao never thought that their marriage and mutual support all this while would end up being just an act Prince Ding put on! 

Prince Ding said, “On account that you’ve been with me for twenty years, I’ll allow you to die with your entire body intact. Now you may thank me and hang yourself to death.” 

Before she hung herself, Shen Miao made a resentful oath, “When I perish, I will haunt you day and night!” 

She was reborn as her fourteen year old self when the tragedies had yet to occur and her family was still intact. She was still the delicate and elegant daughter of a general’s family. 

Her relatives were evil, her cousin sisters were vicious and ruthless, and her aunties were eyeing her possessions. She had to protect her family, take revenge, and get back what belonged to her. In this life, she would be the last one standing! 

However, the Xie family’s young marquis, an unruly youth, pushed her up against the wall and said arrogantly, “Remember, the world belongs to you, and you belong to me!” 

---

The thirteen cities of You State… belong to you. 

The city of Dingyuan in Mobei… belongs to you. 

Yuzhou by the Yangtze River, the East Sea of Dingxi, the Green Lake of Lin’an, and Luoyang City… they all belong to you. 

If they all belong to me, what will you take, Xie Jingxing? Hmm… you. 

---

At first, he said impassively, “There has always been a clear distinction between the Shen and Xie family. For the Shen family’s daughter to suddenly show us goodwill, she must have ill intentions!” 

Then, he said calmly, “We're all on the same boat. Shen Miao, behave yourself. Who would have the audacity to force you into a marriage while I’m around?” 

After that, he said proudly, “Overthrowing an empire isn’t that hard. My dear, how shall we divide this great piece of land?” 

Finally, he waved his hand domineeringly. “Sweetheart, dividing them is too much work. Forget it! They’re all yours, and you are mine!” 

Shen Miao yelled, “Get out!” 

A domineering empress who was reborn and a young delinquent marquis. Both leads are righteous and they dote on each other.

While on his way to work, white collar worker Shoutarou Sagami got hit by a truck and died. And then, he was reincarnated–into a dungeon.

Whatever fate it was that caused Shoutarou Sagami’s body to become a dungeon, he decided to cultivate himself as a dungeon.

A story where a guy reincarnated with the body of a dungeon decides to advance of his own will. He starts as just a cave, and aims to become a gigantic labyrinth. But before he can get that far, he shelters a lost Elf, supports the cat-eared merchants in front of his entrance, and much more.

[Original Web Novel](http://ncode.syosetu.com/n1844cq/)

Choi Hyeon-gyeol is trapped in a hellish temporal prison. Every time the clock strikes midnight on the 15th, he is ripped back to the start of the previous day. Forced to repeat the exact same university assignments twenty times over, his sanity has worn dangerously thin. Pushed to his absolute breaking point by the monotony, Hyeon-gyeol decides to abandon all caution and indulge in a wild, impulsive escape from his scripted life. This leads him to an unexpected, heated one-night stand with his fellow classmate, Lim Yeonjeong.

He falls asleep expecting to wake up to the same familiar nightmare once again. However, against all odds, the loop finally breaks. For the first time in what feels like an eternity, Hyeon-gyeol opens his eyes to the fresh, uncharted morning of the 15th... with Yeonjeong right beside him. *(Source: LezhinUS)*

Haruto's a popular, kind, and reliable policeman.
During one of his patrol shifts, he almost gets into an accident, but is luckily saved by a tall, handsome guy named Sakura who catches and carries him off like a princess!
Sakura's younger and stronger than Haruto, and he's currently working as a bodyguard for a celebrity. Haruto can't help but be enamored with him, even as another man. When Haruto tries to get close to Sakura, he quietly distances himself from him... It seems Sakura has some kind of trauma when it comes to cops.
However, Haruto's cheerful nature eventually gets Sakura to open up.
Heart-throbbing events unfold as Haruto starts to discover a side of Sakura that only he gets to see...!

Both of them experience something they haven't in a long time through a mature version of youthful love that's both pure and bittersweet.

A laboratory filled with nothing but commotion and silence, devoid of any warmth.

[BU-001: Commencing the experiment.]

All Heesu wants is… death.

*“I don’t want to live any longer…”*

One day, Seunghyun—the ideal Guide—appears before Heesu, a Sentinel who has become so numb from heartless, painful acts and unwanted experiments that he can no longer feel pain or emotion.

*“So it’s you, my Guide.”*

Unlike other violent Guides, Seunghyun treats Heesu with tenderness, as if he were a fragile being, and as he watches him, he begins to feel a strange emotion he has never experienced before...

*“I’ll always be by your side, so rest easy, Yeomyeong.”  
“...Heesu... Not ‘Yeomyeong’—Heesu. Doh Heesu.”*

With Seunghyun’s arrival, colour begins to be added, bit by bit, to Heesu’s life, which had always been as black and white as a monochrome film.

**Volume 1:**

Once upon a time, a man and a woman from two feuding villages fell in love. Forbidden to marry, they committed suicide, pledging to marry in the next life.
Various disasters began taking place as a result of their unfortunate fates, and the people in the two villages began offering a man and a woman for holy matrimony to comfort the souls of the sad couple. And, thus, they had continued to avoid calamities for generations...

Momoki Shirakawa is told about this unbelievable legend and becomes a bride, expected to marry Chikage Kurotaki from the neighboring village.
Both young men give in to their family pressure and have no choice but to start living together despite the awkwardness.
Will they never be a match!? Find out in this yaoi about an odd marriage that's sure to end up in divorce... or will it? *(Source: Ebook Renta)*

seriesMetadata.description: Irene has been the acting queen for 20 years, single-handedly managing the country's political affairs while her warmongering husband, King William, was away at the front. The day after she finally ends the long war and is about to hand over all administrative duties to the returning king and take a long-overdue rest, she suddenly wakes up in a strange bed. When she looks in the mirror, she finds herself 20 years younger, back in time, on the day before the tea party where she was chosen as the crown prince's fiancée.She is shocked and furious to learn that the twenty years of her life she gave to the state have been undone. Realizing she was caught in someone else's regression, she decides to do things differently in her second life. She refuses to become the crown prince's wife, determined to live a life of leisure. However, in her place, her beloved younger sister is chosen as the new crown princess, setting the stage for a new and unexpected future.

This Life, I Will Succeed

A mountain of corpses, a sea of blood.
At the summit, only two people remained.

"Why did you save me?"
"At last... you're looking at me."
"I'll ask again. Why did you save me?"

The man was curious.
It was natural.
The woman was his sworn enemy.
And their rivalry should have ended there.
The final act was to be his death.
Those he believed were his subordinates stabbed him in the back, and even more enemies rushed to target him.

"Answer me. Why did you keep me alive!"

"Don't cry..."

"Am I... crying?"

Hot tears were flowing from eyes he thought had dried up long ago.

"Just think of it as a bad dream. A very painful and terrible dream."
"But if our time together held any value at all."
"Even at the end of this nightmare, please find me again."

Thump thump thump thump.
The mountain of corpses began to rumble.
Simultaneously, beyond the blood-red earth, numerous flags rose amidst a hazy dust.

"Uaaaaaah!"
The man roared upon seeing the massive blood-colored flag.

"Mangcheon Assembly! I won't let you get away with this."

Will Cho Un-hwi, who has been given a new life, be able to find his bride-to-be?

"Shino, you're actually a masochist, aren't you?" Because of her strong-willed appearance, Shino had been nicknamed "Queen" since her school days. That hadn't changed even after she became a florist, a job she had always dreamed of, and customers would come in almost every day begging her to "bully me!"...

I'm not a queen... Rather than bullying... I actually... The brothers who went on a date with her hoping that "maybe..." would be different... She thought they would just walk her to her room and go home... But the brothers, who had been kind and even cute, suddenly changed their attitude, and even though it was her first time, both her front and back were filled with theirs... "We're going to take turns putting it in now, so tell me which one you like better."

Makoto Hyakutake is a dull, unremarkable cop whose first life ends as a total “mob character.” As he lies dying, a flood of regrets washes over him—above all, the death of his beloved girlfriend Misaki, whom he parted from in a fight and failed to save. The only one he has ever truly loved is her; if he could live his life over, he swears he would protect Misaki no matter what. That wish is granted. Makoto is sent back ten years into the past, reborn as his younger self right after becoming a detective. Armed with foreknowledge of what is to come and everything he learned over those ten years, he throws himself into the struggle to change fate and, this time, protect Misaki to the very end.

Angela is mortified when her cringey fanfic about the dethroned Prince Rayburn is published behind her back and becomes a wildly popular bestseller. Not only is it super embarrassing, but the book gets her in trouble with the current imperial family, who now want her head for treason!

Luckily, Rayburn's sister Hoya offers to protect her—but in exchange, she must write a sequel that will improve Rayburn's tarnished reputation. But that's easier said than done, when the scary prince already hates her for writing the first novel. Will Angela be able to chip away at Rayburn's cold exterior and gather enough inspiration for her next book?

A pawnbroker offers him the perfect ingredient for crafting legendary medicine—but the “ingredient” turns out to be a mortally wounded elf! Legend has it the flesh and bones of elves can be ground up into a true panacea, and this elven maiden is on the brink of death after being ruthlessly tortured by slavers. seriesMetadata.description:
Nagiko Asakura, a former model now working at an apparel company, lives with her husband Ryosuke, who works in the same company’s sales department. Though busy as a dual-income couple, she believed they were living an ordinary but happy married life. But that illusion shatters when she discovers that Ryosuke is having an affair with his coworker, Erina Shiozaki. Worse still, Erina has no intention of hiding it. She constantly provokes Nagiko and tries to one-up her at every opportunity. Faced with humiliation and betrayal, Nagiko finally decides to fight back—and begins her revenge. ([Art Lapsa](/group/bqpkbsf/art-lapsa)) 

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/351002/

Erna is seen as a "fallen priestess" with a bad reputation. However, in reality, she is a true saint who can miraculously heal people's ailments, an ability that her adoptive father has exploited and forced her to use secretly for his own gain. When she suddenly loses her powers after enduring his abuse and is no longer of use to him, she is married off to Sigrus, a margrave feared as the "clergy killer." Unable to bear the harassment and loneliness in her new home, one night she weeps under the moon, exclaiming, "I just want a place where I belong." When she wakes up, she finds herself in Sigrus's body! Through their swapped bodies, they discover each other's hidden true feelings for the first time, and a deep, awkward love blossoms. The hearts of the two, once frozen, are now filled with a sweet passion as they are drawn to each other.

[Official English](https://coolmic.me/titles/8761)

Despite going to the same university as Yubin, Gahi can only daydream and grumble to her bestie and roommate Sara, as there’s never any sign of her crush on campus. But then, while having drinks at a nearby pub, Gahi meets a boy who’s the spitting image of Yubin. Seemingly more outgoing and down-to-earth compared to her idol, this look-alike is just the beginning of Gahi’s campus drama…

seriesMetadata.description: Natori Midori has been giving it all at her hum-drum office job for three years now, only to have the rug pulled out from under her when she's suddenly laid off. But just as she's feeling lost and adrift, she is summoned to the world of the visual novel she's currently playing, Fairy Tale of Jewels. And the person who summoned her there? None other than the game's cruel villainess, Lapis Tenebrau, who's trying to take down the main cast of the game. Driven into a corner, Natori pretends she's psychic and uses her knowledge of the game to save Lapis from danger. Now Lapis has taken a shine to her, and is going to make Natori her private secretary?! Can Natori handle this new job, and her growing feelings for her villainess boss?

label: Are You a Max Level Regressor?

seriesMetadata.description:
As a member of the "Nine Road" for decades, I've traveled the world preventing global catastrophes. My long-awaited retirement was finally within reach. At 56 years old, what awaited me was the fame of being a battle-hardened veteran who had reached the highest EX rank, and countless accolades as humanity's hero and Earth's guardian! All that was left was to truly enjoy a life of wealth and glory! And just as I was about to settle into a comfortable retirement... "Aaaargh! This can't be happening!" I woke up to find myself as my 24-year-old self from 32 years ago! Even worse, I'm back in the past when I had absolutely nothing!!! "I wasn't supposed to be the regressor!" Moreover, Nicholas from the Nine Road was meant to be the returner. Does this mean I have to gather the Nine Road myself from scratch? A life forced to start over as an unexpected regressor! This time, I'll finish things quicker and try to enjoy life.

seriesMetadata.description:
After living the same life 12 times, Joo Gonghyuk has perfected the method for conquering the Tower of Babel. His only problem is that no matter how many times he climbs it, he is unable to stop the destruction of the world. But not this time! His 13th return is going to be his last, and he'll stop at nothing to save his friends and stop the apocalypse. Will his knowledge from climbing the tower 12 times be enough? Or will Gonghyuk be forced to watch as the world meets its end once again?

label: Haichaku Kizoku no Skill Master: Tsuihou Saremashita ga, "Skill Souzou" de Sekai Saiykou ni Narimashita!? @COMIC

seriesMetadata.description: A world where "the more skills you possess, the more superior you are." The "Skill Zero" noble, Syuto, is reviled, disinherited, and exiled from the country. However, due to that shock, he regains memories of his past life, and the strongest human ability he awakens is—"Skill Creation"! To get back at those who exiled him, he goes through trial and error in creating and strengthening skills, and his status grows exponentially! One day, he ends up traveling with the princesses of a great empire whom he rescued in the forest...? Climb to the top with "Skill Creation," also making use of modern knowledge from his past life! A reversal, peerless fantasy!

The turmoil that engulfed many nations and dragged on for more than a decade finally came to an end, with the Kingdom of Weikling emerging as the dominant power. Its young king, Lionel, demanded that each country offer up hostages. In the Kingdom of Hammond, the only ones who met the conditions to be sent as hostages wwas the crown prince Jonas who was on the verge of marriage and the queen herself. Unwilling to sacrifice his family, the king of Hammond abdicated in Jonas’s favor, hastily arranged a marriage for him, and devised a plan to present a fake queen as the hostage. The woman chosen to be a wife for that purpose alone was Laura, the daughter of an impoverished baron. The person Jonas truly loved was Silvia, his original fiancée, and even after the marriage, he never spared Laura a glance. Though Laura had been threatened with her family’s safety and forced to abandon her dream of becoming a civil official to accept the royal command, she was sent off to Weikling as queen of Hammond with barely any preparations to her name. Awaiting Laura upon her arrival in Weikling were the cold and ruthless Lionel and the proud princesses from other nations, themselves hostages, who looked down on her for coming from a minor country. With not even a single lady-in-waiting by her side, Laura is bullied by those princesses as they compete for Lionel’s favor. Yet she endures it all, thinking of her family and holding on bravely. “It’ll be all right. I’m sure of it.” Even as she faces painful days, Laura continues to live with quiet optimism and in doing so, she catches glimpses of the deep loneliness and desolation that lie within Lionel’s eyes.

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/338224/vol/34/

In a world where witches have declared war against humankind, an agency of professional witch hunters is formed to defend humanity. Tasha Godspell, also known as the “Magic Marksman,” is one of the best witch hunters there is. Along with his sword-wielding Jack-o’-Lantern partner known as Halloween, Tasha puts his magical training and special weaponry to good use as he tracks down his prey. And yet, he cannot bring himself to fully hate the very witches he is tasked to destroy.

label: Kenzoku no Joou wa Yoru ni Shuuchaku Sarete Iru

seriesMetadata.description:
[title](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/903263/)
Queen Seirena of the Alcantia Kingdom had dedicated herself to her country, supported by the words of her parents who died young. However, one day, everything was suddenly taken from her by an imposter identical to herself. Betrayed by her fiancé and abandoned in a prison cell where no one came to help, Seirena resigned herself to death. However, the one who appeared before her was King Plum of the neighboring kingdom. He revealed his true identity as a vampire who had lived for many years and posed a question to Seirena: 『Will you become a vampire and come with me, or will you wait for death?』 In order to reclaim everything, Seirena enters into a blood contract with him.

After an intended confession turns into a grave accident, Tougo wakes up 4 years later with the failed attempt clearly etched in his memory. He sets out to confess again, but just how much has changed in those 4 years?

Akiyoshi has always had a hard time expressing his feelings towards his childhood friend, Mitsu. No matter how much he tries, only insults come out of his mouth. He loses all his chances when Mitsu meets her untimely end in an accident, but a year later, he finds Mitsu's ghost in his house! What's more, he's the only one who can see her! Can this be his chance to express how he really feels?

label: Global Class Advancement: The Archmage's Skills Can Add Infinite Affixes

seriesMetadata.description:
Transmigrating to an alternate world of universal job changes, An Bai tests positive for mage aptitude, but everyone advises him to give it up. After all, as an orphan, he cannot afford the expensive, time-consuming, and resource-heavy profession of a mage. However, An Bai awakens a skill affix system! Different affixes can be added to skills, allowing even the most basic fireball technique to have power close to a nuclear explosion in An Bai's hands! An Bai's name gradually resounds throughout this world. 

[Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27818)

There's a rift between Hell and the mortal world, and lost souls have been escaping to torment the living. To deal with the problem, the King of Hell released Majeh, the greatest swordsman of the underworld, to stop the wayward souls.

categories.name: Past Life/ves Play/s a Big Role

seriesMetadata.description:
After being unfairly crushed to death, Jiujiu ends up in the underworld, bickering with Yama. In a bid to silence her endless rambling, he reincarnates her into a novel—as a princess. But not just any princess—she’s an exiled royal trapped in the infamous Cold Palace! One day, thanks to the scheming heroine of the novel, Jiujiu’s biological father—the tyrant emperor—flies into a rage and prepares to beat her to death! Burning with fury and injustice, Jiujiu cries out in her heart: “With a cruel, ruthless tyrant completely blind to right and wrong, it’s no wonder the Western Chu Kingdom will fall in ten years! It’s a miracle it could even last that long!” To her surprise, the emperor suddenly freezes—he can hear her thoughts! With her mind exposed, has Jiujiu just sealed her fate—or changed her destiny forever?!

[Original Manhua](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/23379)

Eager to survive the plot, Selah manages to rescue Maria so that she and Duke Herbert, her fiancé, will be indebted to her. But then Admiral Ellaim notices her and her magical abilities that allow her to breathe underwater. Selah soon discovers that Ellaim is a merman called a siren, and that he needs her powers to recover from a mysterious illness. Will her dream of retiring by the sea in peace ever come true?

After years of training, Gu Hwaun finally decides to leave the Shaolin Temple in search of greater knowledge. Equipped with the supplies needed for a long journey, he sets out on an adventure, only to encounter the many hardships he expected along the way. To handle these situations, Hwaun turns to the potions he prepared in advance.

But wait… this is not an ordinary body-strengthening potion. It’s an aphrodisiac?!

By sheer accident, he subdues his opponent not with martial arts, but with an entirely different kind of enhanced body(!). Even so, with a lingering sense of unease, Hwaun moves on in search of new challengers.

What awaits him on the road ahead?

label: Card Game de Sekai ga Horobu Sekai ni Tensei Shite Card Shop o Kaiten Shitara, Shuui kara Zensaku Shujinkou da to Omowareteiru

seriesMetadata.description:
A World Obsessed with Card Games Gets Its “Protagonist” Back! (Not Really)

In worlds where card games dominate everything, it’s almost a cliché for the fate of the world to hang on the outcome of a card battle.

I, Mitsuru Tanefuda, found myself reincarnated into such a world. Thankfully, my dream came true—I became the manager of my very own card shop.

In this world, people duel with cards, filled with joy and excitement, and I wanted to watch it all up close.

But for some reason, everyone seems to think I’m some legendary hero who solved massive crises in the past, watching over the next generation like a noble predecessor.

The truth is, I’ve never resolved any world-shaking incidents—not even once.

This is the story of a reincarnated man who became the manager of a card shop in a world where card games take precedence over everything else. Despite having no great achievements to his name, everyone around him assumes he must have been a hero who once saved the world.

Ryu Suho, who struggles to fall asleep every night, has only one thing that ever helps him drift off—the voice from a channel called “J.” One day, that voice suddenly disappears.
His insomnia returns, cruel and relentless. Hoping that just for tonight he might finally sleep, Suho stops by a convenience store—only to hear the voice of “J,” a voice he believed he would never hear again. The only person who can cure this terrible insomnia. He can’t let him slip away. In his desperation, Suho blurts it out without thinking—
“…You’re J, right?”

From Devious Breezes:  
Uesugi Teppei and his father lives deep in the forest in search of a buried treasure. Isolated from society, Teppei became a wild child with no restaints until one day his uncle found him. Teppei finds out that he is actually from a very prestigious family with 5 siblings. For the first time in his life, he will have to attend school and live under his grandmother's rules. Can Teppei really adapt to his new environment?

Natsume Sōseki reincarnates!!

The great literary master races through the splendid Imperial Capital as a beautiful female teacher!!

In an alternate Meiji era where the conflict between socialists and the Meiji government has intensified into harsh suppression of free speech, the freedom of writers is under threat.

To resist all violence that seeks to oppress freedom, Natsume Sōseki forms an armed organization called the “Thursday Society” together with his disciples.

However, in the year 19X0, he is assassinated by unknown killers who see the group’s growing influence as dangerous—

Yet Sōseki is secretly revived through the forbidden medical techniques of the mysterious doctor Hideyo Noguchi. His brain is transplanted into the body of a woman, and under the false identity of “Natsuko Higuchi,” he is given the bizarre mission of infiltrating a girls’ high school as a female teacher.

—Why was Sōseki brought back to life?

—Who was responsible for his murder?

Set in a Meiji era where history and fiction intertwine, Sōseki seeks the truth behind the conspiracy surrounding him. Along the way, through encounters with various literary giants and extraordinary figures, he becomes entangled in a massive plot that threatens to overturn the entire Meiji world— ([Sana Scans](/group/zgbui9j/sana-scans))
Collection of series published under [Humiliation Romance Anthology] theme.

label: Don't Give Cookies to Hungry Wolves

seriesMetadata.description:
Kou Ichinomiya is the son of a wealthy businessman who holds a firm belief in his elite status. As such, he is determined to avoid becoming indebted to anyone; but one day, after a run-in with some mischievous kids on Arakawa Bridge, he ends up falling into the river running underneath. Luckily for him, a passerby is there to save him—but now, he owes his life to this stranger!

Angered by this, Kou insists on paying her back, but this may just be the worst deal the arrogant businessman has ever made. The stranger—a stoic, tracksuit-wearing homeless girl known only as Nino—lives in a cardboard box under the bridge and wants only one thing: to fall in love. Asking Kou to be her boyfriend, he has no choice but to accept, forcing him to move out of his comfortable home and start a new life under the bridge!

Ryoma Hamazaki's greatest love in life is women's wrestling, and he remained devoted to his favorite team Gigamax for years after their retirement. By coincidence, he finds himself falling into Gigamax's rebirth into the wrestling scene.   
As he manages the team's comeback efforts, he gets mixed up with horny girl wrestlers, fends off team rivalries, and tries to unravel the mystery of what caused Gigamax to disband three years earlier.

Note: The series continued in the form of hentai doujinshis.

Some people win the lottery or find their dream job, but Sohan…has an alien spaceship land on his brand-new house?! To make matters even worse, there’s an – admittedly sexy – alien inside threatening to wipe out the entire population. Sihwa has come to earth in search of someone specific and has no qualms about using Sohan to get what he wants. The thing is, things work differently on Sihwa’s home planet, and he seems to be expecting things from Sohan that sound downright impossible! Nevertheless, Sohan finds himself making a deal: help Sihwa find the person he’s looking for in exchange for the safety of humanity. But will this strange partnership turn into something…out of this world?

Mia loses her home and job in one fell swoop after being falsely accused by her comrades in the knight order. The reason given? She lacks "charm." She had hoped that when she grew up, she would meet a wonderful person and build a happy family, just like the heroines in her beloved romance novels. Now, feeling lost and thinking, "Maybe I'll be alone forever," she is suddenly reunited with her childhood friend, whom she hadn't seen in years. He offers to let her stay with him, on the condition that she acts as his "guard." However, the title of guard is just for show—she somehow ends up being the one protected and doted on.

Mugi Hwa, the one without equal, slashed through Murim's skies with his sword, toppling every lord who dared to face him–even Cheonma, Mugeuk Geom's father. But Mugeuk didn’t accept defeat. But this time, it's not just about power, but mending old wounds and forging new bonds to unite his people and prepare for the bloodtide to come.

seriesMetadata.description:
In a desolate world left only with extreme cold, a man named Chang-Jo lives alone, bravely and robustly thanks to his innate health. Chang-Jo works as a graveyard keeper in a village emptied by death, using knowledge gained from books to handle various tasks. One day, he discovers Yeon-Hwa collapsed in a snowfield. He picks him up and brings him home...

“After peeling the chili, you fuse together.”

Chang-Jo does his utmost to save Yeon-Hwa using the knowledge he learned from books (?).

label: A Benevolent Curse and a Tasty Childhood Friend

seriesMetadata.description:
'Sex with a childhood friend... Is that possible for anyone?'

Ensign Lee Seol, an S-class hunter in South Korea, has one childhood friend.
Captain Yeo Woogyeong, an S-class hunter who is so outstanding he even received a special promotion.

"You should suck, Seol-ah."

But with this foxy bastard...
She's been caught by a terrible curse that will kill her if she doesn't 'shamelessly' (or 'sexually') stick with him!

[Kissing her childhood friend vs. Kissing her friend's 'balls']

When she was a naive twenty-year-old, after sleeping with Woogyeong while drunk, Seol had resolved never to make trouble again.
However, because of the sudden curse, Seol's resolve crumbles, and their relationship becomes even more complicated...

'Are we still friends, or not?'

In a duke's household swirling with conspiracy, she throws herself into a life-or-death mission of child-rearing and reform. At least, that was the plan.
