label: When I Tried to Conquer the School Princesses, It Turned Into Romantic Mayhem

seriesMetadata.description:
“Make Me a Princess!”

One day, Kanbara Yuuma finds himself in a desperate situation when his younger sister, Ayane, blackmails him with a certain cringe worthy secret from his past.

Her demand? To secure her a spot among the “Hime 6,” the prestigious titles awarded only to the top six candidates in Himegasaki Academy’s famous general election.

Determined to claim a throne of her own, Ayane forces Yuuma to use his weakness as leverage, making him “conquer” her rival princess candidates and clear the path to her victory.

But winning over the school’s most dazzling girls, who have the entire student body captivated, is no easy task, and Yuuma struggles at every turn…
Worse still, as he gets involved, he finds himself tangled in the increasingly complicated romantic entanglements of the princesses themselves!

With egos laid bare and love and scheming colliding at full force, this is the most chaotic romantic comedy yet, and the madness begins here!

Hair regulations at Cheolleung High School are so strict, it's almost like an iron wall. Any violation of the rules will result in a slap from the teachers. seriesMetadata.description:
A messenger of the Heavens has arrived in Zhao Ge, which has been ruled by the Shang dynasty for generations. The current emperor, Zi Zhou, refuses to bow his head before the gods and declares to the messenger that he will no longer accept the tyranny of the Heavens. The gods do not take this kindly; and soon, the emperor of a neighboring land, Wu Jifa, leads a crusade against the rebelling Shang.

During the battle, the Shang forces are vastly overwhelmed, and just when the capital is inches away from being taken, Zhou joins the fight. Although he breaks through the enemy ranks and makes his way toward Jifa, out of nowhere a god falls from the sky, landing right before him, prepared to personally deal with the troublemaker.

In a world full of dungeons, monsters, magic, and non-humans, Marron Glace is a surprisingly strong shield bearer whose past is as mysterious as his constantly covered face. But the most peculiar thing about him isn't how he looks or his lack of modern knowledge—it's his appetite! As much as everyone else is disgusted, Marron is just as shocked to find that he can only stomach food made from monsters. Now, aside from his face, his penchant for monster meals is just one more thing to uncover.

seriesMetadata.description:
Lee Gyeong-suk — a mother who spent her entire life sacrificing everything for her family. She was the very symbol of devotion, yet her son Seo Min-wook never once managed to say “thank you.” After his mother passes away, Min-wook lives consumed by regret — until an unbelievable miracle sends him back in time, into the body of his maternal uncle Lee Dong-ho on the very day the family’s tragedy began. 

Lee Dong-ho. 

A man who trampled over his family’s dreams and hopes, swallowed up their entire wealth, and left everything in ruins. Returned to the past, Min-wook resolves to set things right — but is met with questions that only deepen over time. 

“If only our family could avoid this rain that falls on the whole world… would that truly be enough to satisfy me?” 

Can his choices to redeem the past make his mother truly happy? The story of sacrifice, regret, and redemption begins now!

Hime Kino's dream is to one day perform voice acting like her hero, Sakura Aoyama, from the Lovely Blazer anime. Eunseol, who works as an accountant at a loan office in an old downtown district, suddenly finds herself face to face with a dangerous yet captivating man: Choi Woo-kyung.    

“I can take care of the guy who’s bothering you.”    

There’s something suspicious about him — a scent of danger wrapped in charm.    

“In return, you just have to give yourself to me once.”  

“Why are you saying this to me?”.   

“I like pretty people too. And also…”Woo-kyung steps closer to Eunseol as she tries to leave, leaning in to whisper softly against her ear: “I’m really good at it.”

Mujin, whom Yuil had believed to be an ascetic and chaste priest, instead punishes him in a sadistic and obscene way.

seriesMetadata.description:
Lalart, a guardian elf, casts a grand magic spell that accidentally shrinks her body—and simultaneously awakens memories of her past life as a lazy Japanese office worker who loves beer and Korean BBQ! Driven by her newfound earthly cravings, Lalart violates her village's absolute taboo against eating meat and is instantly banished. Instead of panicking, she is thrilled to escape her strict home. Accompanied by her protective disciple Ilusha and a fluffy spirit beast named Fel, the tiny elf sets out on a slow-life journey to hunt delicious monsters and explore otherworldly cuisines!

_Source: [Kodansha](https://www.kodansha.co.jp/comic/products/0000427637), translated_

In ancient China there exists an alternate dimension called Jusenkai, whose inhabitants, the Senkaijin, possess tremendous powers. One of them, YanLang, fled to Earth along with his rebel army after being defeated during his attempt to overthrow the Emperor. In order to capture the fugitives, the Emperor sent his elite soldiers to Earth after them. 

LiFang has been traveling alone to find his father's murderer when he picks up a sick and injured man. That aloof man, TuoRen, turns out to be one of the imperial soldiers sent to earth to hunt and capture the Senkaijin rebels. While his comrades work in pairs, TuoRen prefers to be alone. That is, until the strangely powerful human, LiFang, decides to follow him on his quest.

**Note:** The volume 5 extra is an unrelated short story, "Time Lag."

label: Dengon Neko ga Cafe ni Imasu

seriesMetadata.description:
Jeong Tae-ju threw himself into the workforce to support his grandmother who was living alone, without even having had the chance to graduate properly. Working tirelessly at everything from food deliveries to odd jobs, Tae-ju found himself caught up in a false theft accusation, leaving him with a massive debt to loan sharks. Under the threats and coercion of the owner of the errand service, Tae-ju was forced to work at ‘Maehwa’, a high-end host bar.

*“Tae-ju, be careful.”*

One day, as Tae-ju was about to serve a table in the VVIP room, the head chef issued him a warning. Entering the VVIP room with a sense of unease, he found a blood-soaked man, gangsters, and the VVIP Gye Beom-ho already seated. Beom-ho, who had been sizing Tae-ju up, gave him a substantial tip for a simple serving,

*“If I keep receiving tips like this, I can get out of here within a year…!”*

Brushing off the head chef’s warning, Tae-ju sees hope in Beom-ho’s tips... Will Tae-ju manage to pay off his debts and escape ‘Maehwa’ unscathed? Or...

---

In the Kingdom of Embardale, Queen Fiona deeply loved her husband, King Cecil. But shortly after losing him to a widespread epidemic, she is falsely accused of murdering him and driven out of the palace.

On the run from those pursuing her, Fiona finally reaches the estate of Duke Windsor, Cecil’s close friend. While hiding there, the two of them begin to feel an inescapable sense that something is wrong about Cecil’s death.

Following the trail from the medicine he took while alive, they uncover a truth far more cruel than they could have imagined.

This is the story of a queen who, even after everything has been taken from her, continues to live for the sake of all those she loves.

seriesMetadata.description:
Jiyu, a student at Astor School—an elite private all-girls academy in Manhattan’s Upper East Side—lives in the same apartment building as Hunter, who attends Alton School, the all-boys academy just across the street. However, between Hunter, who lives in the penthouse of a luxury Fifth Avenue apartment overlooking Central Park, and Jiyu, who lives in a first-floor affordable housing unit, there exists a gap as vast as the highest peak and the absolute bottom of a pyramid. 

Even their personalities are polar opposites: Jiyu loves to sit quietly and read books, while Hunter cannot stay still for even a single second.

Showing a natural talent for tennis, Hunter begins competing in earnest in tournaments and wins every single match Jiyu attends. Because of this, Hunter becomes convinced that Jiyu is his winning good luck charm. 

Eventually, the turbulent storm of adolescence finds them both. Amidst all this, tragedy strikes Jiyu. 

With nowhere else to go, the Hamilton family takes her in, but Jiyu is relegated from being Hunter's friend to nothing more than a servant.

Jiyu exploits Hunter to survive, while Hunter exploits Jiyu because of his superstition.

In a tennis match, "Love" means zero. A love game is a game where one player's score is zero. Bound together in a tangled web of love and hate, the two face each other across the net, trading volleys in a love game. Who will ultimately emerge as the winner of this game?

It seems that the fiancée of Ian’s older brother—whose wedding is just around the corner—is having an affair with a coworker.

Determined to stop the marriage, Ian disguises herself as the secretary to the CEO of the company where her would-be sister-in-law works, planning to gather solid evidence within two months.

“Do you think boundaries exist just to be crossed?”

The man she ends up serving, CEO Cha Jeong-han, has a handsome face but a personality that leaves much to be desired. He constantly gets on Ian’s nerves.

“Yes. Boundaries exist to be crossed, actually.”

With no fear of getting fired, Ian decides to freely cross Jeong-han’s carefully drawn lines. And somehow, the once arrogant man who thought himself untouchable—

“Did you put on makeup today?”

“What?”

“It looks like you’re wearing lipstick.”

—suddenly starts acting differently.

“This won’t do.”

A thrilling romantic comedy with a dangerously escalating curve of emotions!

Through a peace marriage with an enemy kingdom, Elfreda becomes queen of a foreign realm. The only one to “welcome” this barbarian-born queen is the assassin sent to kill her. In that moment of absolute crisis, Elfreda is saved by her own husband, Einar, and falls for him at first sight, slowly and helplessly drawn deeper into her feelings. 

Meanwhile, Einar had married her from the start purely to use her, the granddaughter of his enemy. Yet despite himself, he finds he cannot help but be pulled in by Elfreda’s pure and endearing nature… 

She knows he cannot love her. 

He knows he must not love her. 

And yet the two are irresistibly drawn to each other. Will this love end in ruin?

A famous game romance action RPG "Dungeon Academia". In that famous world of "game to the death," I reincarnated as a mob with the worst job possible: "Healer. " My fate was dying right away... However... I'll use my knowledge from grinding this game for days on end in my previous life to overturn that fate. A reincarnation fantasy, where healing is turned into a weapon to fashion a meteoric rise to the strongest in the world.

Ordinary college student Ryu Dan-woo was chosen by a young devil he met on the street (?) You get beaten. The devil followed Danwoo into his studio apartment without permission and settled down, and from that day on, Danwoo's ordinary daily life completely became twisted. To return to his original daily life, he begins searching for clues to dimensional magic with his college classmate Si-deok and the witch Joo-eun...

Ysabel and a stranger named Xavier make a deal to get married as a means to survive a scandal. She thinks he's a rich, handicapped man who's still stuck on his crush who has passed away. Turns out he's not disabled and is madly in love with her.

seriesMetadata.description:
I’m a demon lord?! Blessed with unlimited freedom in this new world, it’s time to live the good life building the perfect dungeon! Reborn in another world as a demon lord, Yuki plans to use the incredibly handy online store that is the DP Catalog to create a super sinister dungeon where he can live the easy life! But the moment he starts his new life, he encounters the unimaginably strong Supreme Dragon. Just when he thinks the end is already nigh, things take a bizarre turn in his favor! The Supreme Dragon, who turns out to have a major sweet tooth, transforms into a lovely young girl hell-bent on freeloading off him. And she’s not his dungeon’s only new resident. Within days, he summons an adorable slime and rescues a sweet little vampire girl too! While taking care of his new family, Yuki experiments even more with the Catalog by learning how to create his own weapons. Their idyllic days don’t last long, though, as an unexpected menace appears…

*Source: J-Novel Club, Vol. 1*

I Thought It Was an Ordinary Potion

seriesMetadata.description:
“A Potion to Fall in Love?” 

After receiving a letter from his childhood friend Riley asking for help, Derek heads to the royal capital without delay. But what awaits him there is an absurd piece of news: Riley has developed a “potion to fall in love.” 

Determined to test its effects herself, Riley drinks the potion. However, when an unexpected reaction appears, the relationship between the two begins to turn dangerous in an instant. 

“I want to touch you.” 

“What?” 

“No. Derek… I want you to be the one who touches me. Please?” 

Will Riley and Derek be able to remain just friends once the potion’s effects wear off?

seriesMetadata.description: This is a slightly unusual hospital where those who are not human come to visit. From insects and plants to unidentified life forms that usually remain hidden, patients burdened with strange abnormalities quietly arrive today as well. Welcome to the Fantasy Hospital

Makoto has long been ostracized because of his odd hobbies and a sexual kink others would see as disgusting. One day he finds a book on summoning demons and manages to summon the intimidatingly beautiful and rather chatty Archduke J. The demon offers to grant Makoto's deepest twisted desire in exchange for his life. Once Makoto has sated his demented appetites, he fulfills his end of the bargain, only to find he's been reborn as a monster…in hell!

Jeong Ayeong has been prone to getting possessed by spirits since she was little. But just when she thinks she’s been freed of her unwanted ghostly interactions, she breaks the protective talisman given to her by her shaman grandmother. Now left totally vulnerable, Ayeong is quickly taken over by a new spirit. And this one gives her quite an appetite for desire, leaving Ayeong hungry for the two closest men in her life, the Kwon brothers, Seochan and Yichan.

seriesMetadata.description: Fuyuka, a Japanese woman, wanders into a different world of Chinese style and ends up living in a harem. Regardless of the troubles brought by the beautiful minister and the power struggle in the harem, she is obsessed with her favorite food. Her free-spirited gourmet life has begun!

A serial killer is staging corpses as “self-destruction art” and selling them to the ultra-wealthy for tens of millions. When failed artist Suchan Kim recognizes the concept as his own—stolen from an exhibition the world laughed into oblivion—his obsession with proving this mutates into something darker: a hunger for the recognition he never received. In a world where spectacle is worth more than life, will Suchan expose the killer, or become part of the masterpiece?
